'440,550p'\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":0,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1762,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":53995,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1762},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2wKeRe29zjePTDZgHu\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"18842c56-fb25-44da-99c4-eee10262b6ad\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:31.711Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"18842c56-fb25-44da-99c4-eee10262b6ad\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_018X8SGUGA8rcb48Cqzp4UNs\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"func (s *GenericAPIServer) PrepareRun() preparedGenericAPIServer {\\n\\ts.delegationTarget.PrepareRun()\\n\\n\\tif s.openAPIConfig != nil && !s.skipOpenAPIInstallation {\\n\\t\\ts.OpenAPIVersionedService, s.StaticOpenAPISpec = routes.OpenAPI{\\n\\t\\t\\tConfig: s.openAPIConfig,\\n\\t\\t}.InstallV2(s.Handler.GoRestfulContainer, s.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif s.openAPIV3Config != nil && !s.skipOpenAPIInstallation {\\n\\t\\ts.OpenAPIV3VersionedService = routes.OpenAPI{\\n\\t\\t\\tV3Config: s.openAPIV3Config,\\n\\t\\t}.InstallV3(s.Handler.GoRestfulContainer, s.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ts.installHealthz()\\n\\ts.installLivez()\\n\\n\\t// as soon as shutdown is initiated, readiness should start failing\\n\\treadinessStopCh := s.lifecycleSignals.ShutdownInitiated.Signaled()\\n\\terr := s.addReadyzShutdownCheck(readinessStopCh)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\tklog.Errorf(\\\"Failed to install readyz shutdown check %s\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\ts.installReadyz()\\n\\n\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(zpagesfeatures.ComponentStatusz) {\\n\\t\\tstatusz.Install(s.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux, \\\"apiserver\\\", statusz.NewRegistry(s.EffectiveVersion, statusz.WithListedPaths(s.ListedPaths())))\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn preparedGenericAPIServer{s}\\n}\\n\\n// Run spawns the secure http server. It only returns if stopCh is closed\\n// or the secure port cannot be listened on initially.\\n//\\n// Deprecated: use RunWithContext instead. Run will not get removed to avoid\\n// breaking consumers, but should not be used in new code.\\nfunc (s preparedGenericAPIServer) Run(stopCh <-chan struct{}) error {\\n\\tctx := wait.ContextForChannel(stopCh)\\n\\treturn s.RunWithContext(ctx)\\n}\\n\\n// RunWithContext spawns the secure http server. It only returns if ctx is canceled\\n// or the secure port cannot be listened on initially.\\n// This is the diagram of what contexts/channels/signals are dependent on each other:\\n//\\n// |                                   ctx\\n// |                                    |\\n// |           ---------------------------------------------------------\\n// |           |                                                       |\\n// |    ShutdownInitiated (shutdownInitiatedCh)                        |\\n// |           |                                                       |\\n// | (ShutdownDelayDuration)                                    (PreShutdownHooks)\\n// |           |                                                       |\\n// |  AfterShutdownDelayDuration (delayedStopCh)   PreShutdownHooksStopped (preShutdownHooksHasStoppedCh)\\n// |           |                                                       |\\n// |           |-------------------------------------------------------|\\n// |                                    |\\n// |                                    |\\n// |               NotAcceptingNewRequest (notAcceptingNewRequestCh)\\n// |                                    |\\n// |                                    |\\n// |           |----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|\\n// |           |                        |              |                                          |\\n// |        [without                 [with             |                                          |\\n// | ShutdownSendRetryAfter]  ShutdownSendRetryAfter]  |                                          |\\n// |           |                        |              |                                          |\\n// |           |                        ---------------|                                          |\\n// |           |                                       |                                          |\\n// |           |                      |----------------|-----------------------|                  |\\n// |           |                      |                                        |                  |\\n// |           |         (NonLongRunningRequestWaitGroup::Wait)   (WatchRequestWaitGroup::Wait)   |\\n// |           |                      |                                        |                  |\\n// |           |                      |------------------|---------------------|                  |\\n// |           |                                         |                                        |\\n// |           |                         InFlightRequestsDrained (drainedCh)                      |\\n// |           |                                         |                                        |\\n// |           |-------------------|---------------------|----------------------------------------|\\n// |                               |                     |\\n// |                       stopHttpServerCtx     (AuditBackend::Shutdown())\\n// |                               |\\n// |                       listenerStoppedCh\\n// |                               |\\n// |      HTTPServerStoppedListening (httpServerStoppedListeningCh)\\nfunc (s preparedGenericAPIServer) RunWithContext(ctx context.Context) error {\\n\\tstopCh := ctx.Done()\\n\\tdelayedStopCh := s.lifecycleSignals.AfterShutdownDelayDuration\\n\\tshutdownInitiatedCh := s.lifecycleSignals.ShutdownInitiated\\n\\n\\t// Clean up resources on shutdown.\\n\\tdefer s.Destroy()\\n\\n\\t// If UDS profiling is enabled, start a local http server listening on that socket\\n\\tif s.UnprotectedDebugSocket != nil {\\n\\t\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\t\\tdefer utilruntime.HandleCrashWithContext(ctx)\\n\\t\\t\\tklog.Error(s.UnprotectedDebugSocket.RunWithContext(ctx))\\n\\t\\t}()\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// spawn a new goroutine for closing the MuxAndDiscoveryComplete signal\\n\\t// registration happens during construction of the generic api server\\n\\t// the last server in the chain aggregates signals from the previous instances\\n\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\tfor _, muxAndDiscoveryCompletedSignal := range s.GenericAPIServer.MuxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignals() {\\n\\t\\t\\tselect {\\n\\t\\t\\tcase <-muxAndDiscoveryCompletedSignal:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n\\t\\t\\tcase <-stopCh:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tklog.V(1).Infof(\\\"haven't completed %s, stop requested\\\", s.lifecycleSignals.MuxAndDiscoveryComplete.Name())\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"828bb749-0471-4f56-b570-972a3729c3e6\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:31.727Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"18842c56-fb25-44da-99c4-eee10262b6ad\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"828bb749-0471-4f56-b570-972a3729c3e6\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01ERCX8FZUgCdMSRDucsE7ab\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Let me continue reading the Run method:\"}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":0,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1633,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":55757,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1633},\"output_tokens\":3,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2wRh4kmWg4skAgLMVT\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"bf86ad00-f9dc-4ce6-86af-258c4d7a029d\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:33.126Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"bf86ad00-f9dc-4ce6-86af-258c4d7a029d\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01ERCX8FZUgCdMSRDucsE7ab\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01NvmTo9xkUUBbGoPKuAiPKY\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/genericapiserver.go | sed -n '550,700p'\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":0,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1633,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":55757,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1633},\"output_tokens\":3,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2wRh4kmWg4skAgLMVT\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"d56a594d-14f0-4bfd-a490-994569a8de02\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:33.495Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"d56a594d-14f0-4bfd-a490-994569a8de02\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01NvmTo9xkUUBbGoPKuAiPKY\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"\\t\\t\\t\\tklog.V(1).Infof(\\\"haven't completed %s, stop requested\\\", s.lifecycleSignals.MuxAndDiscoveryComplete.Name())\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\ts.lifecycleSignals.MuxAndDiscoveryComplete.Signal()\\n\\t\\tklog.V(1).Infof(\\\"%s has all endpoints registered and discovery information is complete\\\", s.lifecycleSignals.MuxAndDiscoveryComplete.Name())\\n\\t}()\\n\\n\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\tdefer delayedStopCh.Signal()\\n\\t\\tdefer klog.V(1).InfoS(\\\"[graceful-termination] shutdown event\\\", \\\"name\\\", delayedStopCh.Name())\\n\\n\\t\\t<-stopCh\\n\\n\\t\\t// As soon as shutdown is initiated, /readyz should start returning failure.\\n\\t\\t// This gives the load balancer a window defined by ShutdownDelayDuration to detect that /readyz is red\\n\\t\\t// and stop sending traffic to this server.\\n\\t\\tshutdownInitiatedCh.Signal()\\n\\t\\tklog.V(1).InfoS(\\\"[graceful-termination] shutdown event\\\", \\\"name\\\", shutdownInitiatedCh.Name())\\n\\n\\t\\ttime.Sleep(s.ShutdownDelayDuration)\\n\\t}()\\n\\n\\t// close socket after delayed stopCh\\n\\tshutdownTimeout := s.ShutdownTimeout\\n\\tif s.ShutdownSendRetryAfter {\\n\\t\\t// when this mode is enabled, we do the following:\\n\\t\\t// - the server will continue to listen until all existing requests in flight\\n\\t\\t//   (not including active long running requests) have been drained.\\n\\t\\t// - once drained, http Server Shutdown is invoked with a timeout of 2s,\\n\\t\\t//   net/http waits for 1s for the peer to respond to a GO_AWAY frame, so\\n\\t\\t//   we should wait for a minimum of 2s\\n\\t\\tshutdownTimeout = 2 * time.Second\\n\\t\\tklog.V(1).InfoS(\\\"[graceful-termination] using HTTP Server shutdown timeout\\\", \\\"shutdownTimeout\\\", shutdownTimeout)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tnotAcceptingNewRequestCh := s.lifecycleSignals.NotAcceptingNewRequest\\n\\tdrainedCh := s.lifecycleSignals.InFlightRequestsDrained\\n\\t// Canceling the parent context does not immediately cancel the HTTP server.\\n\\t// We only inherit context values here and deal with cancellation ourselves.\\n\\tstopHTTPServerCtx, stopHTTPServer := context.WithCancelCause(context.WithoutCancel(ctx))\\n\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\tdefer stopHTTPServer(errors.New(\\\"time to stop HTTP server\\\"))\\n\\n\\t\\ttimeToStopHttpServerCh := notAcceptingNewRequestCh.Signaled()\\n\\t\\tif s.ShutdownSendRetryAfter {\\n\\t\\t\\ttimeToStopHttpServerCh = drainedCh.Signaled()\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t<-timeToStopHttpServerCh\\n\\t}()\\n\\n\\t// Start the audit backend before any request comes in. This means we must call Backend.Run\\n\\t// before http server start serving. Otherwise the Backend.ProcessEvents call might block.\\n\\t// AuditBackend.Run will stop as soon as all in-flight requests are drained.\\n\\tif s.AuditBackend != nil {\\n\\t\\tif err := s.AuditBackend.Run(drainedCh.Signaled()); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to run the audit backend: %v\\\", err)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tstoppedCh, listenerStoppedCh, err := s.NonBlockingRunWithContext(stopHTTPServerCtx, shutdownTimeout)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\thttpServerStoppedListeningCh := s.lifecycleSignals.HTTPServerStoppedListening\\n\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\t<-listenerStoppedCh\\n\\t\\thttpServerStoppedListeningCh.Signal()\\n\\t\\tklog.V(1).InfoS(\\\"[graceful-termination] shutdown event\\\", \\\"name\\\", httpServerStoppedListeningCh.Name())\\n\\t}()\\n\\n\\t// we don't accept new request as soon as both ShutdownDelayDuration has\\n\\t// elapsed and preshutdown hooks have completed.\\n\\tpreShutdownHooksHasStoppedCh := s.lifecycleSignals.PreShutdownHooksStopped\\n\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\tdefer klog.V(1).InfoS(\\\"[graceful-termination] shutdown event\\\", \\\"name\\\", notAcceptingNewRequestCh.Name())\\n\\t\\tdefer notAcceptingNewRequestCh.Signal()\\n\\n\\t\\t// wait for the delayed stopCh before closing the handler chain\\n\\t\\t<-delayedStopCh.Signaled()\\n\\n\\t\\t// Additionally wait for preshutdown hooks to also be finished, as some of them need\\n\\t\\t// to send API calls to clean up after themselves (e.g. lease reconcilers removing\\n\\t\\t// itself from the active servers).\\n\\t\\t<-preShutdownHooksHasStoppedCh.Signaled()\\n\\t}()\\n\\n\\t// wait for all in-flight non-long running requests to finish\\n\\tnonLongRunningRequestDrainedCh := make(chan struct{})\\n\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\tdefer close(nonLongRunningRequestDrainedCh)\\n\\t\\tdefer klog.V(1).Info(\\\"[graceful-termination] in-flight non long-running request(s) have drained\\\")\\n\\n\\t\\t// wait for the delayed stopCh before closing the handler chain (it rejects everything after Wait has been called).\\n\\t\\t<-notAcceptingNewRequestCh.Signaled()\\n\\n\\t\\t// Wait for all requests to finish, which are bounded by the RequestTimeout variable.\\n\\t\\t// once NonLongRunningRequestWaitGroup.Wait is invoked, the apiserver is\\n\\t\\t// expected to reject any incoming request with a {503, Retry-After}\\n\\t\\t// response via the WithWaitGroup filter. On the contrary, we observe\\n\\t\\t// that incoming request(s) get a 'connection refused' error, this is\\n\\t\\t// because, at this point, we have called 'Server.Shutdown' and\\n\\t\\t// net/http server has stopped listening. This causes incoming\\n\\t\\t// request to get a 'connection refused' error.\\n\\t\\t// On the other hand, if 'ShutdownSendRetryAfter' is enabled incoming\\n\\t\\t// requests will be rejected with a {429, Retry-After} since\\n\\t\\t// 'Server.Shutdown' will be invoked only after in-flight requests\\n\\t\\t// have been drained.\\n\\t\\t// TODO: can we consolidate these two modes of graceful termination?\\n\\t\\ts.NonLongRunningRequestWaitGroup.Wait()\\n\\t}()\\n\\n\\t// wait for all in-flight watches to finish\\n\\tactiveWatchesDrainedCh := make(chan struct{})\\n\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\tdefer close(activeWatchesDrainedCh)\\n\\n\\t\\t<-notAcceptingNewRequestCh.Signaled()\\n\\t\\tif s.ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod <= time.Duration(0) {\\n\\t\\t\\tklog.V(1).InfoS(\\\"[graceful-termination] not going to wait for active watch request(s) to drain\\\")\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t// Wait for all active watches to finish\\n\\t\\tgrace := s.ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod\\n\\t\\tactiveBefore, activeAfter, err := s.WatchRequestWaitGroup.Wait(func(count int) (utilwaitgroup.RateLimiter, context.Context, context.CancelFunc) {\\n\\t\\t\\tqps := float64(count) / grace.Seconds()\\n\\t\\t\\t// TODO: we don't want the QPS (max requests drained per second) to\\n\\t\\t\\t//  get below a certain floor value, since we want the server to\\n\\t\\t\\t//  drain the active watch requests as soon as possible.\\n\\t\\t\\t//  For now, it's hard coded to 200, and it is subject to change\\n\\t\\t\\t//  based on the result from the scale testing.\\n\\t\\t\\tif qps < 200 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tqps = 200\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t\\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), grace)\\n\\t\\t\\t// We don't expect more than one token to be consumed\\n\\t\\t\\t// in a single Wait call, so setting burst to 1.\\n\\t\\t\\treturn rate.NewLimiter(rate.Limit(qps), 1), ctx, cancel\\n\\t\\t})\\n\\t\\tklog.V(1).InfoS(\\\"[graceful-termination] active watch request(s) have drained\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"duration\\\", grace, \\\"activeWatchesBefore\\\", activeBefore, \\\"activeWatchesAfter\\\", activeAfter, \\\"error\\\", err)\\n\\t}()\\n\\n\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\tdefer klog.V(1).InfoS(\\\"[graceful-termination] shutdown event\\\", \\\"name\\\", drainedCh.Name())\\n\\t\\tdefer drainedCh.Signal()\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"8dd54bb2-81ab-4328-ba55-29b6176c74b5\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:33.512Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"d56a594d-14f0-4bfd-a490-994569a8de02\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"8dd54bb2-81ab-4328-ba55-29b6176c74b5\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_015bRWqE6y8ypxbnzbAMc8Px\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Let me now read config.go to understand the Config structure:\"}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":0,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":2290,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":57390,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":2290},\"output_tokens\":3,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2wZNfubRiRxaNciyDL\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"1b83a0fa-b6f3-4941-9c16-fbff8c22b021\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:34.449Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"1b83a0fa-b6f3-4941-9c16-fbff8c22b021\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_015bRWqE6y8ypxbnzbAMc8Px\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_018tFV16ysqG8PWFeb1Y1oYV\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/config.go | sed -n '75,300p'\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":0,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":2290,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":57390,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":2290},\"output_tokens\":3,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2wZNfubRiRxaNciyDL\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"047b5e11-b415-41dd-a8cb-4a051f9a665f\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:34.815Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"047b5e11-b415-41dd-a8cb-4a051f9a665f\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_018tFV16ysqG8PWFeb1Y1oYV\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"\\tflowcontrolrequest \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/flowcontrol/request\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/informers\\\"\\n\\trestclient \\\"k8s.io/client-go/rest\\\"\\n\\tbasecompatibility \\\"k8s.io/component-base/compatibility\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/featuregate\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/logs\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/prometheus/slis\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/tracing\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n\\topenapicommon \\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/common\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/spec3\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/validation/spec\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/utils/clock\\\"\\n\\tutilsnet \\\"k8s.io/utils/net\\\"\\n\\n\\t// install apis\\n\\t_ \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/apiserver/install\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// hostnameFunc is a function to set the hostnameFunc of this apiserver.\\n// To be used for testing purpose only, to simulate scenarios where multiple apiservers\\n// exist. In such cases we want to ensure unique apiserver IDs which are a hash of hostnameFunc.\\nvar (\\n\\thostnameFunc = os.Hostname\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\t// DefaultLegacyAPIPrefix is where the legacy APIs will be located.\\n\\tDefaultLegacyAPIPrefix = \\\"/api\\\"\\n\\n\\t// APIGroupPrefix is where non-legacy API group will be located.\\n\\tAPIGroupPrefix = \\\"/apis\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// Config is a structure used to configure a GenericAPIServer.\\n// Its members are sorted roughly in order of importance for composers.\\ntype Config struct {\\n\\t// SecureServing is required to serve https\\n\\tSecureServing *SecureServingInfo\\n\\n\\t// Authentication is the configuration for authentication\\n\\tAuthentication AuthenticationInfo\\n\\n\\t// Authorization is the configuration for authorization\\n\\tAuthorization AuthorizationInfo\\n\\n\\t// LoopbackClientConfig is a config for a privileged loopback connection to the API server\\n\\t// This is required for proper functioning of the PostStartHooks on a GenericAPIServer\\n\\t// TODO: move into SecureServing(WithLoopback) as soon as insecure serving is gone\\n\\tLoopbackClientConfig *restclient.Config\\n\\n\\t// EgressSelector provides a lookup mechanism for dialing outbound connections.\\n\\t// It does so based on a EgressSelectorConfiguration which was read at startup.\\n\\tEgressSelector *egressselector.EgressSelector\\n\\n\\t// RuleResolver is required to get the list of rules that apply to a given user\\n\\t// in a given namespace\\n\\tRuleResolver authorizer.RuleResolver\\n\\t// AdmissionControl performs deep inspection of a given request (including content)\\n\\t// to set values and determine whether its allowed\\n\\tAdmissionControl      admission.Interface\\n\\tCorsAllowedOriginList []string\\n\\tHSTSDirectives        []string\\n\\t// FlowControl, if not nil, gives priority and fairness to request handling\\n\\tFlowControl utilflowcontrol.Interface\\n\\n\\tEnableIndex     bool\\n\\tEnableProfiling bool\\n\\tDebugSocketPath string\\n\\tEnableDiscovery bool\\n\\n\\t// Requires generic profiling enabled\\n\\tEnableContentionProfiling bool\\n\\tEnableMetrics             bool\\n\\n\\tDisabledPostStartHooks sets.String\\n\\t// done values in this values for this map are ignored.\\n\\tPostStartHooks map[string]PostStartHookConfigEntry\\n\\n\\t// EffectiveVersion determines which apis and features are available\\n\\t// based on when the api/feature lifecyle.\\n\\tEffectiveVersion basecompatibility.EffectiveVersion\\n\\t// EmulationForwardCompatible is an option to implicitly enable all APIs which are introduced after the emulation version and\\n\\t// have higher priority than APIs of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version.\\n\\t// If true, all APIs that have higher priority than the APIs(beta+) of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version will be installed.\\n\\t// This is needed when a controller implementation migrates to newer API versions, for the binary version, and also uses the newer API versions even when emulation version is set.\\n\\t// Not applicable to alpha APIs.\\n\\tEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n\\t// RuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible is an option to explicitly enable specific APIs introduced after the emulation version through the runtime-config.\\n\\t// If true, APIs identified by group/version that are enabled in the --runtime-config flag will be installed even if it is introduced after the emulation version. --runtime-config flag values that identify multiple APIs, such as api/all,api/ga,api/beta, are not influenced by this flag and will only enable APIs available at the current emulation version.\\n\\t// If false, error would be thrown if any GroupVersion or GroupVersionResource explicitly enabled in the --runtime-config flag is introduced after the emulation version.\\n\\tRuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n\\t// FeatureGate is a way to plumb feature gate through if you have them.\\n\\tFeatureGate featuregate.FeatureGate\\n\\t// AuditBackend is where audit events are sent to.\\n\\tAuditBackend audit.Backend\\n\\t// AuditPolicyRuleEvaluator makes the decision of whether and how to audit log a request.\\n\\tAuditPolicyRuleEvaluator audit.PolicyRuleEvaluator\\n\\t// ExternalAddress is the host name to use for external (public internet) facing URLs (e.g. Swagger)\\n\\t// Will default to a value based on secure serving info and available ipv4 IPs.\\n\\tExternalAddress string\\n\\n\\t// TracerProvider can provide a tracer, which records spans for distributed tracing.\\n\\tTracerProvider tracing.TracerProvider\\n\\n\\t//===========================================================================\\n\\t// Fields you probably don't care about changing\\n\\t//===========================================================================\\n\\n\\t// BuildHandlerChainFunc allows you to build custom handler chains by decorating the apiHandler.\\n\\tBuildHandlerChainFunc func(apiHandler http.Handler, c *Config) (secure http.Handler)\\n\\t// NonLongRunningRequestWaitGroup allows you to wait for all chain\\n\\t// handlers associated with non long-running requests\\n\\t// to complete while the server is shuting down.\\n\\tNonLongRunningRequestWaitGroup *utilwaitgroup.SafeWaitGroup\\n\\t// WatchRequestWaitGroup allows us to wait for all chain\\n\\t// handlers associated with active watch requests to\\n\\t// complete while the server is shuting down.\\n\\tWatchRequestWaitGroup *utilwaitgroup.RateLimitedSafeWaitGroup\\n\\t// DiscoveryAddresses is used to build the IPs pass to discovery. If nil, the ExternalAddress is\\n\\t// always reported\\n\\tDiscoveryAddresses discovery.Addresses\\n\\t// The default set of healthz checks. There might be more added via AddHealthChecks dynamically.\\n\\tHealthzChecks []healthz.HealthChecker\\n\\t// The default set of livez checks. There might be more added via AddHealthChecks dynamically.\\n\\tLivezChecks []healthz.HealthChecker\\n\\t// The default set of readyz-only checks. There might be more added via AddReadyzChecks dynamically.\\n\\tReadyzChecks []healthz.HealthChecker\\n\\tFlagz        flagz.Reader\\n\\t// LegacyAPIGroupPrefixes is used to set up URL parsing for authorization and for validating requests\\n\\t// to InstallLegacyAPIGroup. New API servers don't generally have legacy groups at all.\\n\\tLegacyAPIGroupPrefixes sets.String\\n\\t// RequestInfoResolver is used to assign attributes (used by admission and authorization) based on a request URL.\\n\\t// Use-cases that are like kubelets may need to customize this.\\n\\tRequestInfoResolver apirequest.RequestInfoResolver\\n\\t// Serializer is required and provides the interface for serializing and converting objects to and from the wire\\n\\t// The default (api.Codecs) usually works fine.\\n\\tSerializer runtime.NegotiatedSerializer\\n\\t// OpenAPIConfig will be used in generating OpenAPI spec. This is nil by default. Use DefaultOpenAPIConfig for \\\"working\\\" defaults.\\n\\tOpenAPIConfig *openapicommon.Config\\n\\t// OpenAPIV3Config will be used in generating OpenAPI V3 spec. This is nil by default. Use DefaultOpenAPIV3Config for \\\"working\\\" defaults.\\n\\tOpenAPIV3Config *openapicommon.OpenAPIV3Config\\n\\t// SkipOpenAPIInstallation avoids installing the OpenAPI handler if set to true.\\n\\tSkipOpenAPIInstallation bool\\n\\n\\t// ResourceTransformers are used to transform resources from and to etcd, e.g. encryption.\\n\\tResourceTransformers storagevalue.ResourceTransformers\\n\\t// RESTOptionsGetter is used to construct RESTStorage types via the generic registry.\\n\\tRESTOptionsGetter genericregistry.RESTOptionsGetter\\n\\n\\t// If specified, all requests except those which match the LongRunningFunc predicate will timeout\\n\\t// after this duration.\\n\\tRequestTimeout time.Duration\\n\\t// If specified, long running requests such as watch will be allocated a random timeout between this value, and\\n\\t// twice this value.  Note that it is up to the request handlers to ignore or honor this timeout. In seconds.\\n\\tMinRequestTimeout int\\n\\n\\t// StorageInitializationTimeout defines the maximum amount of time to wait for storage initialization\\n\\t// before declaring apiserver ready.\\n\\tStorageInitializationTimeout time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// This represents the maximum amount of time it should take for apiserver to complete its startup\\n\\t// sequence and become healthy. From apiserver's start time to when this amount of time has\\n\\t// elapsed, /livez will assume that unfinished post-start hooks will complete successfully and\\n\\t// therefore return true.\\n\\tLivezGracePeriod time.Duration\\n\\t// ShutdownDelayDuration allows to block shutdown for some time, e.g. until endpoints pointing to this API server\\n\\t// have converged on all node. During this time, the API server keeps serving, /healthz will return 200,\\n\\t// but /readyz will return failure.\\n\\tShutdownDelayDuration time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// The limit on the total size increase all \\\"copy\\\" operations in a json\\n\\t// patch may cause.\\n\\t// This affects all places that applies json patch in the binary.\\n\\tJSONPatchMaxCopyBytes int64\\n\\t// The limit on the request size that would be accepted and decoded in a write request\\n\\t// 0 means no limit.\\n\\tMaxRequestBodyBytes int64\\n\\t// MaxRequestsInFlight is the maximum number of parallel non-long-running requests. Every further\\n\\t// request has to wait. Applies only to non-mutating requests.\\n\\tMaxRequestsInFlight int\\n\\t// MaxMutatingRequestsInFlight is the maximum number of parallel mutating requests. Every further\\n\\t// request has to wait.\\n\\tMaxMutatingRequestsInFlight int\\n\\t// Predicate which is true for paths of long-running http requests\\n\\tLongRunningFunc apirequest.LongRunningRequestCheck\\n\\n\\t// GoawayChance is the probability that send a GOAWAY to HTTP/2 clients. When client received\\n\\t// GOAWAY, the in-flight requests will not be affected and new requests will use\\n\\t// a new TCP connection to triggering re-balancing to another server behind the load balance.\\n\\t// Default to 0, means never send GOAWAY. Max is 0.02 to prevent break the apiserver.\\n\\tGoawayChance float64\\n\\n\\t// MergedResourceConfig indicates which groupVersion enabled and its resources enabled/disabled.\\n\\t// This is composed of genericapiserver defaultAPIResourceConfig and those parsed from flags.\\n\\t// If not specify any in flags, then genericapiserver will only enable defaultAPIResourceConfig.\\n\\tMergedResourceConfig *serverstore.ResourceConfig\\n\\n\\t// lifecycleSignals provides access to the various signals\\n\\t// that happen during lifecycle of the apiserver.\\n\\t// it's intentionally marked private as it should never be overridden.\\n\\tlifecycleSignals lifecycleSignals\\n\\n\\t// StorageObjectCountTracker is used to keep track of the total number of objects\\n\\t// in the storage per resource, so we can estimate width of incoming requests.\\n\\tStorageObjectCountTracker flowcontrolrequest.StorageObjectCountTracker\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownSendRetryAfter dictates when to initiate shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server during the graceful termination of the apiserver. If true, we wait\\n\\t// for non longrunning requests in flight to be drained and then initiate a\\n\\t// shutdown of the HTTP Server. If false, we initiate a shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server as soon as ShutdownDelayDuration has elapsed.\\n\\t// If enabled, after ShutdownDelayDuration elapses, any incoming request is\\n\\t// rejected with a 429 status code and a 'Retry-After' response.\\n\\tShutdownSendRetryAfter bool\\n\\n\\t//===========================================================================\\n\\t// values below here are targets for removal\\n\\t//===========================================================================\\n\\n\\t// PublicAddress is the IP address where members of the cluster (kubelet,\\n\\t// kube-proxy, services, etc.) can reach the GenericAPIServer.\\n\\t// If nil or 0.0.0.0, the host's default interface will be used.\\n\\tPublicAddress net.IP\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"90538875-b230-4d3d-a30f-10d62e095d79\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:34.831Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"047b5e11-b415-41dd-a8cb-4a051f9a665f\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"90538875-b230-4d3d-a30f-10d62e095d79\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Vdij3dAmGASGpgF6ZsFPRe\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now 2016 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage filters\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/metrics\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/request\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/httplog\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// WithPanicRecovery wraps an http Handler to recover and log panics (except in the special case of http.ErrAbortHandler panics, which suppress logging).\\nfunc WithPanicRecovery(handler http.Handler, resolver request.RequestInfoResolver) http.Handler {\\n\\treturn withPanicRecovery(handler, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, err interface{}) {\\n\\t\\tif err == http.ErrAbortHandler {\\n\\t\\t\\t// Honor the http.ErrAbortHandler sentinel panic value\\n\\t\\t\\t//\\n\\t\\t\\t// If ServeHTTP panics, the server (the caller of ServeHTTP) assumes\\n\\t\\t\\t// that the effect of the panic was isolated to the active request.\\n\\t\\t\\t// It recovers the panic, logs a stack trace to the server error log,\\n\\t\\t\\t// and either closes the network connection or sends an HTTP/2\\n\\t\\t\\t// RST_STREAM, depending on the HTTP protocol. To abort a handler so\\n\\t\\t\\t// the client sees an interrupted response but the server doesn't log\\n\\t\\t\\t// an error, panic with the value ErrAbortHandler.\\n\\t\\t\\t//\\n\\t\\t\\t// Note that HandleCrash function is actually crashing, after calling the handlers\\n\\t\\t\\tif info, err := resolver.NewRequestInfo(req); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics.RecordRequestAbort(req, nil)\\n\\t\\t\\t} else {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics.RecordRequestAbort(req, info)\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// This call can have different handlers, but the default chain rate limits. Call it after the metrics are updated\\n\\t\\t\\t// in case the rate limit delays it.  If you outrun the rate for this one timed out requests, something has gone\\n\\t\\t\\t// seriously wrong with your server, but generally having a logging signal for timeouts is useful.\\n\\t\\t\\truntime.HandleErrorWithContext(req.Context(), nil, \\\"Timeout or abort while handling\\\", \\\"method\\\", req.Method, \\\"URI\\\", req.RequestURI, \\\"auditID\\\", audit.GetAuditIDTruncated(req.Context()))\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\thttp.Error(w, \\\"This request caused apiserver to panic. Look in the logs for details.\\\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n\\t\\tklog.ErrorS(nil, \\\"apiserver panic'd\\\", \\\"method\\\", req.Method, \\\"URI\\\", req.RequestURI, \\\"auditID\\\", audit.GetAuditIDTruncated(req.Context()))\\n\\t})\\n}\\n\\n// WithHTTPLogging enables logging of incoming requests.\\nfunc WithHTTPLogging(handler http.Handler) http.Handler {\\n\\treturn httplog.WithLogging(handler, httplog.DefaultStacktracePred)\\n}\\n\\nfunc withPanicRecovery(handler http.Handler, crashHandler func(http.ResponseWriter, *http.Request, interface{})) http.Handler {\\n\\treturn http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {\\n\\t\\tdefer runtime.HandleCrash(func(err interface{}) {\\n\\t\\t\\tcrashHandler(w, req, err)\\n\\t\\t})\\n\\n\\t\\t// Dispatch to the internal handler\\n\\t\\thandler.ServeHTTP(w, req)\\n\\t})\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"ab917d05-79b9-4c5d-91a1-6893cef24f4d\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:36.463Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"411fe5ca-96f1-4ca6-ab89-5a3f7fab1fe6\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"ab917d05-79b9-4c5d-91a1-6893cef24f4d\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01DNtJgDosVa9fxM3C8jwZF8\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage endpoints\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"reflect\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sort\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\t\\\"unicode\\\"\\n\\n\\trestful \\\"github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sigs.k8s.io/structured-merge-diff/v6/fieldpath\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"golang.org/x/text/cases\\\"\\n\\t\\\"golang.org/x/text/language\\\"\\n\\tapidiscoveryv2 \\\"k8s.io/api/apidiscovery/v2\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/conversion\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/managedfields\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/deprecation\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/handlers\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/handlers/negotiation\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/metrics\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/request\\\"\\n\\tutilwarning \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/warning\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/rest\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storageversion\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\tversioninfo \\\"k8s.io/component-base/version\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\tRouteMetaGVK              = \\\"x-kubernetes-group-version-kind\\\"\\n\\tRouteMetaSelectableFields = \\\"x-kubernetes-selectable-fields\\\"\\n\\tRouteMetaAction           = \\\"x-kubernetes-action\\\"\\n)\\n\\ntype APIInstaller struct {\\n\\tgroup             *APIGroupVersion\\n\\tprefix            string // Path prefix where API resources are to be registered.\\n\\tminRequestTimeout time.Duration\\n}\\n\\n// Struct capturing information about an action (MethodGet, MethodPost, MethodWatch, MethodProxy, etc).\\ntype action struct {\\n\\tVerb          string               // Verb identifying the action (MethodGet, MethodPost, MethodWatch, MethodProxy, etc).\\n\\tPath          string               // The path of the action\\n\\tParams        []*restful.Parameter // List of parameters associated with the action.\\n\\tNamer         handlers.ScopeNamer\\n\\tAllNamespaces bool // true iff the action is namespaced but works on aggregate result for all namespaces\\n}\\n\\nfunc ConvertGroupVersionIntoToDiscovery(list []metav1.APIResource) ([]apidiscoveryv2.APIResourceDiscovery, error) {\\n\\tvar apiResourceList []apidiscoveryv2.APIResourceDiscovery\\n\\tparentResources := make(map[string]int)\\n\\n\\t// Loop through all top-level resources\\n\\tfor _, r := range list {\\n\\t\\tif strings.Contains(r.Name, \\\"/\\\") {\\n\\t\\t\\t// Skip subresources for now so we can get the list of resources\\n\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tvar scope apidiscoveryv2.ResourceScope\\n\\t\\tif r.Namespaced {\\n\\t\\t\\tscope = apidiscoveryv2.ScopeNamespace\\n\\t\\t} else {\\n\\t\\t\\tscope = apidiscoveryv2.ScopeCluster\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tresource := apidiscoveryv2.APIResourceDiscovery{\\n\\t\\t\\tResource: r.Name,\\n\\t\\t\\tScope:    scope,\\n\\t\\t\\tResponseKind: &metav1.GroupVersionKind{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tGroup:   r.Group,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tVersion: r.Version,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tKind:    r.Kind,\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t\\tVerbs:            r.Verbs,\\n\\t\\t\\tShortNames:       r.ShortNames,\\n\\t\\t\\tCategories:       r.Categories,\\n\\t\\t\\tSingularResource: r.SingularName,\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tapiResourceList = append(apiResourceList, resource)\\n\\t\\tparentResources[r.Name] = len(apiResourceList) - 1\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// Loop through all subresources\\n\\tfor _, r := range list {\\n\\t\\t// Split resource name and subresource name\\n\\t\\tsplit := strings.SplitN(r.Name, \\\"/\\\", 2)\\n\\n\\t\\tif len(split) != 2 {\\n\\t\\t\\t// Skip parent resources\\n\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tvar scope apidiscoveryv2.ResourceScope\\n\\t\\tif r.Namespaced {\\n\\t\\t\\tscope = apidiscoveryv2.ScopeNamespace\\n\\t\\t} else {\\n\\t\\t\\tscope = apidiscoveryv2.ScopeCluster\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tparentidx, exists := parentResources[split[0]]\\n\\t\\tif !exists {\\n\\t\\t\\t// If a subresource exists without a parent, create a parent\\n\\t\\t\\tapiResourceList = append(apiResourceList, apidiscoveryv2.APIResourceDiscovery{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tResource: split[0],\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tScope:    scope,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t// avoid nil panics in v0.26.0-v0.26.3 client-go clients\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t// see https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/118361\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tResponseKind: &metav1.GroupVersionKind{},\\n\\t\\t\\t})\\n\\t\\t\\tparentidx = len(apiResourceList) - 1\\n\\t\\t\\tparentResources[split[0]] = parentidx\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tif apiResourceList[parentidx].Scope != scope {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"Error: Parent %s (scope: %s) and subresource %s (scope: %s) scope do not match\\\", split[0], apiResourceList[parentidx].Scope, split[1], scope)\\n\\t\\t\\t//\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tsubresource := apidiscoveryv2.APISubresourceDiscovery{\\n\\t\\t\\tSubresource: split[1],\\n\\t\\t\\tVerbs:       r.Verbs,\\n\\t\\t\\t// avoid nil panics in v0.26.0-v0.26.3 client-go clients\\n\\t\\t\\t// see https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/118361\\n\\t\\t\\tResponseKind: &metav1.GroupVersionKind{},\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif r.Kind != \\\"\\\" {\\n\\t\\t\\tsubresource.ResponseKind = &metav1.GroupVersionKind{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tGroup:   r.Group,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tVersion: r.Version,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tKind:    r.Kind,\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tapiResourceList[parentidx].Subresources = append(apiResourceList[parentidx].Subresources, subresource)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn apiResourceList, nil\\n}\\n\\n// An interface to see if one storage supports override its default verb for monitoring\\ntype StorageMetricsOverride interface {\\n\\t// OverrideMetricsVerb gives a storage object an opportunity to override the verb reported to the metrics endpoint\\n\\tOverrideMetricsVerb(oldVerb string) (newVerb string)\\n}\\n\\n// An interface to see if an object supports swagger documentation as a method\\ntype documentable interface {\\n\\tSwaggerDoc() map[string]string\\n}\\n\\n// toDiscoveryKubeVerb maps an action.Verb to the logical kube verb, used for discovery\\nvar toDiscoveryKubeVerb = map[string]string{\\n\\trequest.MethodConnect:          \\\"\\\", // do not list in discovery.\\n\\trequest.MethodDelete:           \\\"delete\\\",\\n\\trequest.MethodDeleteCollection: \\\"deletecollection\\\",\\n\\trequest.MethodGet:              \\\"get\\\",\\n\\trequest.MethodList:             \\\"list\\\",\\n\\trequest.MethodPatch:            \\\"patch\\\",\\n\\trequest.MethodPost:             \\\"create\\\",\\n\\trequest.MethodProxy:            \\\"proxy\\\",\\n\\trequest.MethodPut:              \\\"update\\\",\\n\\trequest.MethodWatch:            \\\"watch\\\",\\n\\trequest.MethodWatchList:        \\\"watch\\\",\\n}\\n\\n// Install handlers for API resources.\\nfunc (a *APIInstaller) Install() ([]metav1.APIResource, []*storageversion.ResourceInfo, *restful.WebService, []error) {\\n\\tvar apiResources []metav1.APIResource\\n\\tvar resourceInfos []*storageversion.ResourceInfo\\n\\tvar errors []error\\n\\tws := a.newWebService()\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"94dcc873-ae7b-4a88-9658-f082d5ce5ca0\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:37.881Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"afbc18cf-194e-434b-ae7f-d0bba66824c9\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"94dcc873-ae7b-4a88-9658-f082d5ce5ca0\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_012hm6ud7UZ8a2F72TQBdfaQ\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Let the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage handlers\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"math/rand\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/url\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta\\\"\\n\\tmetainternalversion \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/internalversion\\\"\\n\\tmetainternalversionscheme \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/internalversion/scheme\\\"\\n\\tmetainternalversionvalidation \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/internalversion/validation\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/fields\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/handlers/negotiation\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/metrics\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/request\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/rest\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/routine\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/tracing\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// getterFunc performs a get request with the given context and object name. The request\\n// may be used to deserialize an options object to pass to the getter.\\ntype getterFunc func(ctx context.Context, name string, req *http.Request) (runtime.Object, error)\\n\\n// getResourceHandler is an HTTP handler function for get requests. It delegates to the\\n// passed-in getterFunc to perform the actual get.\\nfunc getResourceHandler(scope *RequestScope, getter getterFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n\\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {\\n\\t\\tctx := req.Context()\\n\\t\\tctx, span := tracing.Start(ctx, \\\"Get\\\", traceFields(req)...)\\n\\t\\treq = req.WithContext(ctx)\\n\\t\\tdefer span.End(500 * time.Millisecond)\\n\\n\\t\\tnamespace, name, err := scope.Namer.Name(req)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tctx = request.WithNamespace(ctx, namespace)\\n\\n\\t\\toutputMediaType, _, err := negotiation.NegotiateOutputMediaType(req, scope.Serializer, scope)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tresult, err := getter(ctx, name, req)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tspan.AddEvent(\\\"About to write a response\\\")\\n\\t\\tdefer span.AddEvent(\\\"Writing http response done\\\")\\n\\t\\ttransformResponseObject(ctx, scope, req, w, http.StatusOK, outputMediaType, result)\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// GetResource returns a function that handles retrieving a single resource from a rest.Storage object.\\nfunc GetResource(r rest.Getter, scope *RequestScope) http.HandlerFunc {\\n\\treturn getResourceHandler(scope,\\n\\t\\tfunc(ctx context.Context, name string, req *http.Request) (runtime.Object, error) {\\n\\t\\t\\t// check for export\\n\\t\\t\\toptions := metav1.GetOptions{}\\n\\t\\t\\tif values := req.URL.Query(); len(values) > 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif len(values[\\\"export\\\"]) > 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\texportBool := true\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\texportStrings := values[\\\"export\\\"]\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\terr := runtime.Convert_Slice_string_To_bool(&exportStrings, &exportBool, nil)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, errors.NewBadRequest(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"the export parameter cannot be parsed: %v\\\", err))\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif exportBool {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, errors.NewBadRequest(\\\"the export parameter, deprecated since v1.14, is no longer supported\\\")\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif err := metainternalversionscheme.ParameterCodec.DecodeParameters(values, scope.MetaGroupVersion, &options); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\terr = errors.NewBadRequest(err.Error())\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\ttracing.SpanFromContext(ctx).AddEvent(\\\"About to Get from storage\\\")\\n\\t\\t\\treturn r.Get(ctx, name, &options)\\n\\t\\t})\\n}\\n\\n// GetResourceWithOptions returns a function that handles retrieving a single resource from a rest.Storage object.\\nfunc GetResourceWithOptions(r rest.GetterWithOptions, scope *RequestScope, isSubresource bool) http.HandlerFunc {\\n\\treturn getResourceHandler(scope,\\n\\t\\tfunc(ctx context.Context, name string, req *http.Request) (runtime.Object, error) {\\n\\t\\t\\topts, subpath, subpathKey := r.NewGetOptions()\\n\\t\\t\\tspan := tracing.SpanFromContext(ctx)\\n\\t\\t\\tspan.AddEvent(\\\"About to process Get options\\\")\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := getRequestOptions(req, scope, opts, subpath, subpathKey, isSubresource); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\terr = errors.NewBadRequest(err.Error())\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\tspan.AddEvent(\\\"About to Get from storage\\\")\\n\\t\\t\\treturn r.Get(ctx, name, opts)\\n\\t\\t})\\n}\\n\\n// getRequestOptions parses out options and can include path information.  The path information shouldn't include the subresource.\\nfunc getRequestOptions(req *http.Request, scope *RequestScope, into runtime.Object, subpath bool, subpathKey string, isSubresource bool) error {\\n\\tif into == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tquery := req.URL.Query()\\n\\tif subpath {\\n\\t\\tnewQuery := make(url.Values)\\n\\t\\tfor k, v := range query {\\n\\t\\t\\tnewQuery[k] = v\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tctx := req.Context()\\n\\t\\trequestInfo, _ := request.RequestInfoFrom(ctx)\\n\\t\\tstartingIndex := 2\\n\\t\\tif isSubresource {\\n\\t\\t\\tstartingIndex = 3\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"88864d24-1470-4a25-8fef-56b5223e59fa\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:39.070Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"57305bc9-086e-4852-9fc0-a9e66e6567c1\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"88864d24-1470-4a25-8fef-56b5223e59fa\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01GAjJZ8nv5TuRvrZnhavMua\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Let me read create and watch handlers:\"}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":0,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1892,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":66723,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1892},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2wy7RnrJmuNrUPkSjd\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"9c01b7d1-e6a8-45d1-ac3e-077ae6350715\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:40.445Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"9c01b7d1-e6a8-45d1-ac3e-077ae6350715\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01GAjJZ8nv5TuRvrZnhavMua\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01GwvQaYWEtwUPw6RRGdRZj4\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git -200\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":0,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1892,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":66723,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1892},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2wy7RnrJmuNrUPkSjd\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"8cf8f1e7-fb43-41c6-8285-f8924b465989\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:40.752Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"8cf8f1e7-fb43-41c6-8285-f8924b465989\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01GwvQaYWEtwUPw6RRGdRZj4\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2017 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage handlers\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"bytes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\t\\\"unicode\\\"\\n\\t\\\"unicode/utf8\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta\\\"\\n\\tmetainternalversionscheme \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/internalversion/scheme\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1/validation\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/handlers/fieldmanager\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/handlers/finisher\\\"\\n\\trequestmetrics \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/handlers/metrics\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/handlers/negotiation\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/request\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/rest\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/dryrun\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/tracing\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\nvar namespaceGVR = schema.GroupVersionResource{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\", Resource: \\\"namespaces\\\"}\\n\\nfunc createHandler(r rest.NamedCreater, scope *RequestScope, admit admission.Interface, includeName bool) http.HandlerFunc {\\n\\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {\\n\\t\\tctx := req.Context()\\n\\t\\t// For performance tracking purposes.\\n\\t\\tctx, span := tracing.Start(ctx, \\\"Create\\\", traceFields(req)...)\\n\\t\\treq = req.WithContext(ctx)\\n\\t\\tdefer span.End(500 * time.Millisecond)\\n\\n\\t\\tnamespace, name, err := scope.Namer.Name(req)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tif includeName {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t// name was required, return\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// otherwise attempt to look up the namespace\\n\\t\\t\\tnamespace, err = scope.Namer.Namespace(req)\\n\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t// enforce a timeout of at most requestTimeoutUpperBound (34s) or less if the user-provided\\n\\t\\t// timeout inside the parent context is lower than requestTimeoutUpperBound.\\n\\t\\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, requestTimeoutUpperBound)\\n\\t\\tdefer cancel()\\n\\t\\toutputMediaType, _, err := negotiation.NegotiateOutputMediaType(req, scope.Serializer, scope)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tgv := scope.Kind.GroupVersion()\\n\\t\\ts, err := negotiation.NegotiateInputSerializer(req, false, scope.Serializer)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tbody, err := limitedReadBodyWithRecordMetric(ctx, req, scope.MaxRequestBodyBytes, scope.Resource.GroupResource(), requestmetrics.Create)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tspan.AddEvent(\\\"limitedReadBody failed\\\", attribute.Int(\\\"len\\\", len(body)), attribute.String(\\\"err\\\", err.Error()))\\n\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tspan.AddEvent(\\\"limitedReadBody succeeded\\\", attribute.Int(\\\"len\\\", len(body)))\\n\\n\\t\\toptions := &metav1.CreateOptions{}\\n\\t\\tvalues := req.URL.Query()\\n\\t\\tif err := metainternalversionscheme.ParameterCodec.DecodeParameters(values, scope.MetaGroupVersion, options); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\terr = errors.NewBadRequest(err.Error())\\n\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif errs := validation.ValidateCreateOptions(options); len(errs) > 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\terr := errors.NewInvalid(schema.GroupKind{Group: metav1.GroupName, Kind: \\\"CreateOptions\\\"}, \\\"\\\", errs)\\n\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\toptions.TypeMeta.SetGroupVersionKind(metav1.SchemeGroupVersion.WithKind(\\\"CreateOptions\\\"))\\n\\n\\t\\tdefaultGVK := scope.Kind\\n\\t\\toriginal := r.New()\\n\\n\\t\\tvalidationDirective := fieldValidation(options.FieldValidation)\\n\\t\\tdecodeSerializer := s.Serializer\\n\\t\\tif validationDirective == metav1.FieldValidationWarn || validationDirective == metav1.FieldValidationStrict {\\n\\t\\t\\tdecodeSerializer = s.StrictSerializer\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tdecoder := scope.Serializer.DecoderToVersion(decodeSerializer, scope.HubGroupVersion)\\n\\t\\tspan.AddEvent(\\\"About to convert to expected version\\\")\\n\\t\\tobj, gvk, err := decoder.Decode(body, &defaultGVK, original)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tstrictError, isStrictError := runtime.AsStrictDecodingError(err)\\n\\t\\t\\tswitch {\\n\\t\\t\\tcase isStrictError && obj != nil && validationDirective == metav1.FieldValidationWarn:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\taddStrictDecodingWarnings(req.Context(), strictError.Errors())\\n\\t\\t\\tcase isStrictError && validationDirective == metav1.FieldValidationIgnore:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tklog.Warningf(\\\"unexpected strict error when field validation is set to ignore\\\")\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tfallthrough\\n\\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\terr = transformDecodeError(scope.Typer, err, original, gvk, body)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tobjGV := gvk.GroupVersion()\\n\\t\\tif !scope.AcceptsGroupVersion(objGV) {\\n\\t\\t\\terr = errors.NewBadRequest(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"the API version in the data (%s) does not match the expected API version (%v)\\\", objGV.String(), gv.String()))\\n\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tspan.AddEvent(\\\"Conversion done\\\")\\n\\n\\t\\t// On create, get name from new object if unset\\n\\t\\tif len(name) == 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t_, name, _ = scope.Namer.ObjectName(obj)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif len(namespace) == 0 && scope.Resource == namespaceGVR {\\n\\t\\t\\tnamespace = name\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tctx = request.WithNamespace(ctx, namespace)\\n\\n\\t\\tadmit = admission.WithAudit(admit)\\n\\t\\taudit.LogRequestObject(req.Context(), obj, objGV, scope.Resource, scope.Subresource, scope.Serializer)\\n\\n\\t\\tuserInfo, _ := request.UserFrom(ctx)\\n\\n\\t\\tif objectMeta, err := meta.Accessor(obj); err == nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tpreserveObjectMetaSystemFields := false\\n\\t\\t\\tif c, ok := r.(rest.SubresourceObjectMetaPreserver); ok && len(scope.Subresource) > 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tpreserveObjectMetaSystemFields = c.PreserveRequestObjectMetaSystemFieldsOnSubresourceCreate()\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\tif !preserveObjectMetaSystemFields {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\trest.WipeObjectMetaSystemFields(objectMeta)\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// ensure namespace on the object is correct, or error if a conflicting namespace was set in the object\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := rest.EnsureObjectNamespaceMatchesRequestNamespace(rest.ExpectedNamespaceForResource(namespace, scope.Resource), objectMeta); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tscope.err(err, w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tspan.AddEvent(\\\"About to store object in database\\\")\\n\\t\\tadmissionAttributes := admission.NewAttributesRecord(obj, nil, scope.Kind, namespace, name, scope.Resource, scope.Subresource, admission.Create, options, dryrun.IsDryRun(options.DryRun), userInfo)\\n\\t\\trequestFunc := func() (runtime.Object, error) {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn r.Create(\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tctx,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tname,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tobj,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\trest.AdmissionToValidateObjectFunc(admit, admissionAttributes, scope),\\n\\t\\t\\t\\toptions,\\n\\t\\t\\t)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t// Dedup owner references before updating managed fields\\n\\t\\tdedupOwnerReferencesAndAddWarning(obj, req.Context(), false)\\n\\t\\tresult, err := finisher.FinishRequest(ctx, func() (runtime.Object, error) {\\n\\t\\t\\tliveObj, err := scope.Creater.New(scope.Kind)\\n\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to create new object (Create for %v): %v\\\", scope.Kind, err)\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\tobj = scope.FieldManager.UpdateNoErrors(liveObj, obj, managerOrUserAgent(options.FieldManager, req.UserAgent()))\\n\\t\\t\\tadmit = fieldmanager.NewManagedFieldsValidatingAdmissionController(admit)\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"6ffbb6eb-bae0-4883-9f46-88fbecf6910d\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:40.769Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"8cf8f1e7-fb43-41c6-8285-f8924b465989\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"6ffbb6eb-bae0-4883-9f46-88fbecf6910d\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01CoNTYxErC84iqZk4zfXYsp\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage handlers\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"io\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync/atomic\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"golang.org/x/net/websocket\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/httpstream/wsstream\\\"\\n\\tutilruntime \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/handlers/negotiation\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/metrics\\\"\\n\\tapirequest \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/request\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/httplog\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\tcompbasemetrics \\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// timeoutFactory abstracts watch timeout logic for testing\\ntype TimeoutFactory interface {\\n\\tTimeoutCh() (<-chan time.Time, func() bool)\\n}\\n\\n// realTimeoutFactory implements timeoutFactory\\ntype realTimeoutFactory struct {\\n\\ttimeout time.Duration\\n}\\n\\n// TimeoutCh returns a channel which will receive something when the watch times out,\\n// and a cleanup function to call when this happens.\\nfunc (w *realTimeoutFactory) TimeoutCh() (<-chan time.Time, func() bool) {\\n\\tif w.timeout == 0 {\\n\\t\\t// nothing will ever be sent down this channel\\n\\t\\treturn nil, func() bool { return false }\\n\\t}\\n\\tt := time.NewTimer(w.timeout)\\n\\treturn t.C, t.Stop\\n}\\n\\n// serveWatchHandler returns a handle to serve a watch response.\\n// TODO: the functionality in this method and in WatchServer.Serve is not cleanly decoupled.\\nfunc serveWatchHandler(watcher watch.Interface, scope *RequestScope, mediaTypeOptions negotiation.MediaTypeOptions, req *http.Request, w http.ResponseWriter, timeout time.Duration, metricsScope string) (http.Handler, error) {\\n\\toptions, err := optionsForTransform(mediaTypeOptions, req)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// negotiate for the stream serializer from the scope's serializer\\n\\tserializer, err := negotiation.NegotiateOutputMediaTypeStream(req, scope.Serializer, scope)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tframer := serializer.StreamSerializer.Framer\\n\\tvar encoder runtime.Encoder\\n\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(features.CBORServingAndStorage) {\\n\\t\\tencoder = scope.Serializer.EncoderForVersion(runtime.UseNondeterministicEncoding(serializer.StreamSerializer.Serializer), scope.Kind.GroupVersion())\\n\\t} else {\\n\\t\\tencoder = scope.Serializer.EncoderForVersion(serializer.StreamSerializer.Serializer, scope.Kind.GroupVersion())\\n\\t}\\n\\tuseTextFraming := serializer.EncodesAsText\\n\\tif framer == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"no framer defined for %q available for embedded encoding\\\", serializer.MediaType)\\n\\t}\\n\\t// TODO: next step, get back mediaTypeOptions from negotiate and return the exact value here\\n\\tmediaType := serializer.MediaType\\n\\tswitch mediaType {\\n\\tcase runtime.ContentTypeJSON:\\n\\t\\t// as-is\\n\\tcase runtime.ContentTypeCBOR:\\n\\t\\t// If a client indicated it accepts application/cbor (exactly one data item) on a\\n\\t\\t// watch request, set the conformant application/cbor-seq media type the watch\\n\\t\\t// response. RFC 9110 allows an origin server to deviate from the indicated\\n\\t\\t// preference rather than send a 406 (Not Acceptable) response (see\\n\\t\\t// https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9110.html#section-12.1-5).\\n\\t\\tmediaType = runtime.ContentTypeCBORSequence\\n\\tdefault:\\n\\t\\tmediaType += \\\";stream=watch\\\"\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tctx := req.Context()\\n\\n\\t// locate the appropriate embedded encoder based on the transform\\n\\tvar negotiatedEncoder runtime.Encoder\\n\\tcontentKind, contentSerializer, transform := targetEncodingForTransform(scope, mediaTypeOptions, req)\\n\\tif transform {\\n\\t\\tinfo, ok := runtime.SerializerInfoForMediaType(contentSerializer.SupportedMediaTypes(), serializer.MediaType)\\n\\t\\tif !ok {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"no encoder for %q exists in the requested target %#v\\\", serializer.MediaType, contentSerializer)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(features.CBORServingAndStorage) {\\n\\t\\t\\tnegotiatedEncoder = contentSerializer.EncoderForVersion(runtime.UseNondeterministicEncoding(info.Serializer), contentKind.GroupVersion())\\n\\t\\t} else {\\n\\t\\t\\tnegotiatedEncoder = contentSerializer.EncoderForVersion(info.Serializer, contentKind.GroupVersion())\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t} else {\\n\\t\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(features.CBORServingAndStorage) {\\n\\t\\t\\tnegotiatedEncoder = scope.Serializer.EncoderForVersion(runtime.UseNondeterministicEncoding(serializer.Serializer), contentKind.GroupVersion())\\n\\t\\t} else {\\n\\t\\t\\tnegotiatedEncoder = scope.Serializer.EncoderForVersion(serializer.Serializer, contentKind.GroupVersion())\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar memoryAllocator runtime.MemoryAllocator\\n\\n\\tif encoderWithAllocator, supportsAllocator := negotiatedEncoder.(runtime.EncoderWithAllocator); supportsAllocator {\\n\\t\\t// don't put the allocator inside the embeddedEncodeFn as that would allocate memory on every call.\\n\\t\\t// instead, we allocate the buffer for the entire watch session and release it when we close the connection.\\n\\t\\tmemoryAllocator = runtime.AllocatorPool.Get().(*runtime.Allocator)\\n\\t\\tnegotiatedEncoder = runtime.NewEncoderWithAllocator(encoderWithAllocator, memoryAllocator)\\n\\t}\\n\\tvar tableOptions *metav1.TableOptions\\n\\tif options != nil {\\n\\t\\tif passedOptions, ok := options.(*metav1.TableOptions); ok {\\n\\t\\t\\ttableOptions = passedOptions\\n\\t\\t} else {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"unexpected options type: %T\\\", options)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\tembeddedEncoder := newWatchEmbeddedEncoder(ctx, negotiatedEncoder, mediaTypeOptions.Convert, tableOptions, scope)\\n\\n\\tif encoderWithAllocator, supportsAllocator := encoder.(runtime.EncoderWithAllocator); supportsAllocator {\\n\\t\\tif memoryAllocator == nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t// don't put the allocator inside the embeddedEncodeFn as that would allocate memory on every call.\\n\\t\\t\\t// instead, we allocate the buffer for the entire watch session and release it when we close the connection.\\n\\t\\t\\tmemoryAllocator = runtime.AllocatorPool.Get().(*runtime.Allocator)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tencoder = runtime.NewEncoderWithAllocator(encoderWithAllocator, memoryAllocator)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar serverShuttingDownCh <-chan struct{}\\n\\tif signals := apirequest.ServerShutdownSignalFrom(req.Context()); signals != nil {\\n\\t\\tserverShuttingDownCh = signals.ShuttingDown()\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tserver := &WatchServer{\\n\\t\\tWatching: watcher,\\n\\t\\tScope:    scope,\\n\\n\\t\\tUseTextFraming:  useTextFraming,\\n\\t\\tMediaType:       mediaType,\\n\\t\\tFramer:          framer,\\n\\t\\tEncoder:         encoder,\\n\\t\\tEmbeddedEncoder: embeddedEncoder,\\n\\n\\t\\tMemoryAllocator:      memoryAllocator,\\n\\t\\tTimeoutFactory:       &realTimeoutFactory{timeout},\\n\\t\\tServerShuttingDownCh: serverShuttingDownCh,\\n\\n\\t\\tmetricsScope: metricsScope,\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif wsstream.IsWebSocketRequest(req) {\\n\\t\\tw.Header().Set(\\\"Content-Type\\\", server.MediaType)\\n\\t\\treturn websocket.Handler(server.HandleWS), nil\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn http.HandlerFunc(server.HandleHTTP), nil\\n}\\n\\n// WatchServer serves a watch.Interface over a websocket or vanilla HTTP.\\ntype WatchServer struct {\\n\\tWatching watch.Interface\\n\\tScope    *RequestScope\\n\\n\\t// true if websocket messages should use text framing (as opposed to binary framing)\\n\\tUseTextFraming bool\\n\\t// the media type this watch is being served with\\n\\tMediaType string\\n\\t// used to frame the watch stream\\n\\tFramer runtime.Framer\\n\\t// used to encode the watch stream event itself\\n\\tEncoder runtime.Encoder\\n\\t// used to encode the nested object in the watch stream\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"732b0198-aef2-4e6a-88ea-376935595b6d\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:42.278Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"42934459-7ca6-4cfb-9265-9003f8cd6bd9\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"732b0198-aef2-4e6a-88ea-376935595b6d\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_012U9uX4t3eH9eVLm35JVJYg\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage filters\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\\\"\\n\\tapirequest \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/request\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// BasicLongRunningRequestCheck returns true if the given request has one of the specified verbs or one of the specified subresources, or is a profiler request.\\nfunc BasicLongRunningRequestCheck(longRunningVerbs, longRunningSubresources sets.String) apirequest.LongRunningRequestCheck {\\n\\treturn func(r *http.Request, requestInfo *apirequest.RequestInfo) bool {\\n\\t\\tif longRunningVerbs.Has(requestInfo.Verb) {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn true\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif requestInfo.IsResourceRequest && longRunningSubresources.Has(requestInfo.Subresource) {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn true\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif !requestInfo.IsResourceRequest && strings.HasPrefix(requestInfo.Path, \\\"/debug/pprof/\\\") {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn true\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"eacbbbf0-ef93-45b5-9171-b831deef42a1\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:43.771Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"1c3e94c7-2dda-4f01-89c4-dd071e289f06\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"eacbbbf0-ef93-45b5-9171-b831deef42a1\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ae8459c\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01NhTvz9H6B9uQDyte25dznz\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Let
