/tmp/watcher.go\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":0,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":4861,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":83337,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":4861},\"output_tokens\":2,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG316sawwiyA6UmMHFKu\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"1ddf0732-ee14-4992-9bec-2bb1d4271900\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:22.979Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"1ddf0732-ee14-4992-9bec-2bb1d4271900\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a09b299\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_014emnWMyhZRjEPSeBm9yZBD\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2016 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage etcd3\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"errors\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"os\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strconv\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync/atomic\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\tclientv3 \\\"go.etcd.io/etcd/client/v3\\\"\\n\\tgrpccodes \\\"google.golang.org/grpc/codes\\\"\\n\\tgrpcstatus \\\"google.golang.org/grpc/status\\\"\\n\\n\\tapierrors \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/watch\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/etcd3/metrics\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/value\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\tutilflowcontrol \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/flowcontrol\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\t// We have set a buffer in order to reduce times of context switches.\\n\\tincomingBufSize         = 100\\n\\toutgoingBufSize         = 100\\n\\tprocessEventConcurrency = 10\\n)\\n\\n// defaultWatcherMaxLimit is used to facilitate construction tests\\nvar defaultWatcherMaxLimit int64 = maxLimit\\n\\n// fatalOnDecodeError is used during testing to panic the server if watcher encounters a decoding error\\nvar fatalOnDecodeError atomic.Bool\\n\\nfunc init() {\\n\\t// check to see if we are running in a test environment\\n\\tb, _ := strconv.ParseBool(os.Getenv(\\\"KUBE_PANIC_WATCH_DECODE_ERROR\\\"))\\n\\tTestOnlySetFatalOnDecodeError(b)\\n}\\n\\n// TestOnlySetFatalOnDecodeError should only be used for cases where decode errors are expected and need to be tested. e.g. conversion webhooks.\\nfunc TestOnlySetFatalOnDecodeError(b bool) {\\n\\tfatalOnDecodeError.Store(b)\\n}\\n\\ntype watcher struct {\\n\\tclient                   *clientv3.Client\\n\\tcodec                    runtime.Codec\\n\\tnewFunc                  func() runtime.Object\\n\\tobjectType               string\\n\\tgroupResource            schema.GroupResource\\n\\tversioner                storage.Versioner\\n\\ttransformer              value.Transformer\\n\\tgetCurrentStorageRV      func(context.Context) (uint64, error)\\n\\tgetResourceSizeEstimator func() *resourceSizeEstimator\\n}\\n\\n// watchChan implements watch.Interface.\\ntype watchChan struct {\\n\\twatcher                  *watcher\\n\\tkey                      string\\n\\tinitialRev               int64\\n\\trecursive                bool\\n\\tprogressNotify           bool\\n\\tinternalPred             storage.SelectionPredicate\\n\\tctx                      context.Context\\n\\tcancel                   context.CancelFunc\\n\\tincomingEventChan        chan *event\\n\\tresultChan               chan watch.Event\\n\\tgetResourceSizeEstimator func() *resourceSizeEstimator\\n}\\n\\n// Watch watches on a key and returns a watch.Interface that transfers relevant notifications.\\n// If rev is zero, it will return the existing object(s) and then start watching from\\n// the maximum revision+1 from returned objects.\\n// If rev is non-zero, it will watch events happened after given revision.\\n// If opts.Recursive is false, it watches on given key.\\n// If opts.Recursive is true, it watches any children and directories under the key, excluding the root key itself.\\n// pred must be non-nil. Only if opts.Predicate matches the change, it will be returned.\\nfunc (w *watcher) Watch(ctx context.Context, key string, rev int64, opts storage.ListOptions) (watch.Interface, error) {\\n\\tif opts.Recursive && !strings.HasSuffix(key, \\\"/\\\") {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(`recursive key needs to end with \\\"/\\\"`)\\n\\t}\\n\\tif opts.ProgressNotify && w.newFunc == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, apierrors.NewInternalError(errors.New(\\\"progressNotify for watch is unsupported by the etcd storage because no newFunc was provided\\\"))\\n\\t}\\n\\tstartWatchRV, err := w.getStartWatchResourceVersion(ctx, rev, opts)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\twc := w.createWatchChan(ctx, key, startWatchRV, opts.Recursive, opts.ProgressNotify, opts.Predicate)\\n\\tgo wc.run(isInitialEventsEndBookmarkRequired(opts), areInitialEventsRequired(rev, opts))\\n\\n\\t// For etcd watch we don't have an easy way to answer whether the watch\\n\\t// has already caught up. So in the initial version (given that watchcache\\n\\t// is by default enabled for all resources but Events), we just deliver\\n\\t// the initialization signal immediately. Improving this will be explored\\n\\t// in the future.\\n\\tutilflowcontrol.WatchInitialized(ctx)\\n\\n\\treturn wc, nil\\n}\\n\\nfunc (w *watcher) createWatchChan(ctx context.Context, key string, rev int64, recursive, progressNotify bool, pred storage.SelectionPredicate) *watchChan {\\n\\twc := &watchChan{\\n\\t\\twatcher:                  w,\\n\\t\\tkey:                      key,\\n\\t\\tinitialRev:               rev,\\n\\t\\trecursive:                recursive,\\n\\t\\tprogressNotify:           progressNotify,\\n\\t\\tinternalPred:             pred,\\n\\t\\tincomingEventChan:        make(chan *event, incomingBufSize),\\n\\t\\tresultChan:               make(chan watch.Event, outgoingBufSize),\\n\\t\\tgetResourceSizeEstimator: w.getResourceSizeEstimator,\\n\\t}\\n\\tif pred.Empty() {\\n\\t\\t// The filter doesn't filter out any object.\\n\\t\\twc.internalPred = storage.Everything\\n\\t}\\n\\twc.ctx, wc.cancel = context.WithCancel(ctx)\\n\\treturn wc\\n}\\n\\n// getStartWatchResourceVersion returns a ResourceVersion\\n// the watch will be started from.\\n// Depending on the input parameters the semantics of the returned ResourceVersion are:\\n//   - start at Exact (return resourceVersion)\\n//   - start at Most Recent (return an RV from etcd)\\nfunc (w *watcher) getStartWatchResourceVersion(ctx context.Context, resourceVersion int64, opts storage.ListOptions) (int64, error) {\\n\\tif resourceVersion > 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn resourceVersion, nil\\n\\t}\\n\\tif !utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(features.WatchList) {\\n\\t\\treturn 0, nil\\n\\t}\\n\\tif opts.SendInitialEvents == nil || *opts.SendInitialEvents {\\n\\t\\t// note that when opts.SendInitialEvents=true\\n\\t\\t// we will be issuing a consistent LIST request\\n\\t\\t// against etcd followed by the special bookmark event\\n\\t\\treturn 0, nil\\n\\t}\\n\\t// at this point the clients is interested\\n\\t// only in getting a stream of events\\n\\t// starting at the MostRecent point in time (RV)\\n\\tcurrentStorageRV, err := w.getCurrentStorageRV(ctx)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn 0, err\\n\\t}\\n\\t// currentStorageRV is taken from resp.Header.Revision (int64)\\n\\t// and cast to uint64, so it is safe to do reverse\\n\\t// at some point we should unify the interface but that\\n\\t// would require changing  Versioner.UpdateList\\n\\treturn int64(currentStorageRV), nil\\n}\\n\\n// isInitialEventsEndBookmarkRequired since there is no way to directly set\\n// opts.ProgressNotify from the API and the etcd3 impl doesn't support\\n// notification for external clients we simply return initialEventsEndBookmarkRequired\\n// to only send the bookmark event after the initial list call.\\n//\\n// see: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/120348\\nfunc isInitialEventsEndBookmarkRequired(opts storage.ListOptions) bool {\\n\\tif !utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(features.WatchList) {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn opts.SendInitialEvents != nil && *opts.SendInitialEvents && opts.Predicate.AllowWatchBookmarks\\n}\\n\\n// areInitialEventsRequired returns true if all events from the etcd should be returned.\\nfunc areInitialEventsRequired(resourceVersion int64, opts storage.ListOptions) bool {\\n\\tif opts.SendInitialEvents == nil && resourceVersion == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn true // legacy case\\n\\t}\\n\\tif !utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(features.WatchList) {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn opts.SendInitialEvents != nil && *opts.SendInitialEvents\\n}\\n\\ntype etcdError interface {\\n\\tCode() grpccodes.Code\\n\\tError() string\\n}\\n\\ntype grpcError interface {\\n\\tGRPCStatus() *grpcstatus.Status\\n}\\n\\nfunc isCancelError(err error) bool {\\n\\tif err == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err == context.Canceled {\\n\\t\\treturn true\\n\\t}\\n\\tif etcdErr, ok := err.(etcdError); ok && etcdErr.Code() == grpccodes.Canceled {\\n\\t\\treturn true\\n\\t}\\n\\tif grpcErr, ok := err.(grpcError); ok && grpcErr.GRPCStatus().Code() == grpccodes.Canceled {\\n\\t\\treturn true\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn false\\n}\\n\\nfunc (wc *watchChan) run(initialEventsEndBookmarkRequired, forceInitialEvents bool) {\\n\\twatchClosedCh := make(chan struct{})\\n\\tvar resultChanWG sync.WaitGroup\\n\\n\\tresultChanWG.Add(1)\\n\\tgo func() {\\n\\t\\tdefer resultChanWG.Done()\\n\\t\\twc.startWatching(watchClosedCh, initialEventsEndBookmarkRequired, forceInitialEvents)\\n\\t}()\\n\\twc.processEvents(&resultChanWG)\\n\\n\\tselect {\\n\\tcase <-watchClosedCh:\\n\\tcase <-wc.ctx.Done(): // user cancel\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// We use wc.ctx to reap all goroutines. Under whatever condition, we should stop them all.\\n\\t// It's fine to double cancel.\\n\\twc.cancel()\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"e6ab2bdd-2f04-45b8-8e29-7aed85d61129\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:22.992Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"1ddf0732-ee14-4992-9bec-2bb1d4271900\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"e6ab2bdd-2f04-45b8-8e29-7aed85d61129\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a09b299\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_018Wht9fZ6PM6KHJH3tybDfv\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive summary document based on all these files. Let me read a few more key -n '200,400p' /tmp/rest.go\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":0,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":3009,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":88198,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":3009},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG31Cs1Dzhes3vunsaPJ\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"d0bd7e5c-be4e-43de-b435-e22876bd1a27\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:24.639Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"d0bd7e5c-be4e-43de-b435-e22876bd1a27\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a09b299\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01U7zqKeqN5Zt382iFRsvTMG\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"// Creater is an object that can create an instance of a RESTful object.\\ntype Creater interface {\\n\\t// New returns an empty object that can be used with Create after request data has been put into it.\\n\\t// This object must be a pointer type for use with Codec.DecodeInto([]byte, runtime.Object)\\n\\tNew() runtime.Object\\n\\n\\t// Create creates a new version of a resource.\\n\\tCreate(ctx context.Context, obj runtime.Object, createValidation ValidateObjectFunc, options *metav1.CreateOptions) (runtime.Object, error)\\n}\\n\\n// NamedCreater is an object that can create an instance of a RESTful object using a name parameter.\\ntype NamedCreater interface {\\n\\t// New returns an empty object that can be used with Create after request data has been put into it.\\n\\t// This object must be a pointer type for use with Codec.DecodeInto([]byte, runtime.Object)\\n\\tNew() runtime.Object\\n\\n\\t// Create creates a new version of a resource. It expects a name parameter from the path.\\n\\t// This is needed for create operations on subresources which include the name of the parent\\n\\t// resource in the path.\\n\\tCreate(ctx context.Context, name string, obj runtime.Object, createValidation ValidateObjectFunc, options *metav1.CreateOptions) (runtime.Object, error)\\n}\\n\\n// SubresourceObjectMetaPreserver adds configuration options to a Creater for subresources.\\ntype SubresourceObjectMetaPreserver interface {\\n\\t// PreserveRequestObjectMetaSystemFieldsOnSubresourceCreate indicates that a\\n\\t// handler should preserve fields of ObjectMeta that are managed by the system.\\n\\tPreserveRequestObjectMetaSystemFieldsOnSubresourceCreate() bool\\n}\\n\\n// UpdatedObjectInfo provides information about an updated object to an Updater.\\n// It requires access to the old object in order to return the newly updated object.\\ntype UpdatedObjectInfo interface {\\n\\t// Returns preconditions built from the updated object, if applicable.\\n\\t// May return nil, or a preconditions object containing nil fields,\\n\\t// if no preconditions can be determined from the updated object.\\n\\tPreconditions() *metav1.Preconditions\\n\\n\\t// UpdatedObject returns the updated object, given a context and old object.\\n\\t// The only time an empty oldObj should be passed in is if a \\\"create on update\\\" is occurring (there is no oldObj).\\n\\tUpdatedObject(ctx context.Context, oldObj runtime.Object) (newObj runtime.Object, err error)\\n}\\n\\n// ValidateObjectFunc is a function to act on a given object. An error may be returned\\n// if the hook cannot be completed. A ValidateObjectFunc may NOT transform the provided\\n// object.\\ntype ValidateObjectFunc func(ctx context.Context, obj runtime.Object) error\\n\\n// ValidateAllObjectFunc is a \\\"admit everything\\\" instance of ValidateObjectFunc.\\nfunc ValidateAllObjectFunc(ctx context.Context, obj runtime.Object) error {\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// ValidateObjectUpdateFunc is a function to act on a given object and its predecessor.\\n// An error may be returned if the hook cannot be completed. An UpdateObjectFunc\\n// may NOT transform the provided object.\\ntype ValidateObjectUpdateFunc func(ctx context.Context, obj, old runtime.Object) error\\n\\n// ValidateAllObjectUpdateFunc is a \\\"admit everything\\\" instance of ValidateObjectUpdateFunc.\\nfunc ValidateAllObjectUpdateFunc(ctx context.Context, obj, old runtime.Object) error {\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// Updater is an object that can update an instance of a RESTful object.\\ntype Updater interface {\\n\\t// New returns an empty object that can be used with Update after request data has been put into it.\\n\\t// This object must be a pointer type for use with Codec.DecodeInto([]byte, runtime.Object)\\n\\tNew() runtime.Object\\n\\n\\t// Update finds a resource in the storage and updates it. Some implementations\\n\\t// may allow updates creates the object - they should set the created boolean\\n\\t// to true.\\n\\tUpdate(ctx context.Context, name string, objInfo UpdatedObjectInfo, createValidation ValidateObjectFunc, updateValidation ValidateObjectUpdateFunc, forceAllowCreate bool, options *metav1.UpdateOptions) (runtime.Object, bool, error)\\n}\\n\\n// CreaterUpdater is a storage object that must support both create and update.\\n// Go prevents embedded interfaces that implement the same method.\\ntype CreaterUpdater interface {\\n\\tCreater\\n\\tUpdate(ctx context.Context, name string, objInfo UpdatedObjectInfo, createValidation ValidateObjectFunc, updateValidation ValidateObjectUpdateFunc, forceAllowCreate bool, options *metav1.UpdateOptions) (runtime.Object, bool, error)\\n}\\n\\n// CreaterUpdater must satisfy the Updater interface.\\nvar _ Updater = CreaterUpdater(nil)\\n\\n// Patcher is a storage object that supports both get and update.\\ntype Patcher interface {\\n\\tGetter\\n\\tUpdater\\n}\\n\\n// Watcher should be implemented by all Storage objects that\\n// want to offer the ability to watch for changes through the watch api.\\ntype Watcher interface {\\n\\t// 'label' selects on labels; 'field' selects on the object's fields. Not all fields\\n\\t// are supported; an error should be returned if 'field' tries to select on a field that\\n\\t// isn't supported. 'resourceVersion' allows for continuing/starting a watch at a\\n\\t// particular version.\\n\\tWatch(ctx context.Context, options *metainternalversion.ListOptions) (watch.Interface, error)\\n}\\n\\n// StandardStorage is an interface covering the common verbs. Provided for testing whether a\\n// resource satisfies the normal storage methods. Use Storage when passing opaque storage objects.\\ntype StandardStorage interface {\\n\\tGetter\\n\\tLister\\n\\tCreaterUpdater\\n\\tGracefulDeleter\\n\\tCollectionDeleter\\n\\tWatcher\\n\\n\\t// Destroy cleans up its resources on shutdown.\\n\\t// Destroy has to be implemented in thread-safe way and be prepared\\n\\t// for being called more than once.\\n\\tDestroy()\\n}\\n\\n// Redirector know how to return a remote resource's location.\\ntype Redirector interface {\\n\\t// ResourceLocation should return the remote location of the given resource, and an optional transport to use to request it, or an error.\\n\\tResourceLocation(ctx context.Context, id string) (remoteLocation *url.URL, transport http.RoundTripper, err error)\\n}\\n\\n// Responder abstracts the normal response behavior for a REST method and is passed to callers that\\n// may wish to handle the response directly in some cases, but delegate to the normal error or object\\n// behavior in other cases.\\ntype Responder interface {\\n\\t// Object writes the provided object to the response. Invoking this method multiple times is undefined.\\n\\tObject(statusCode int, obj runtime.Object)\\n\\t// Error writes the provided error to the response. This method may only be invoked once.\\n\\tError(err error)\\n}\\n\\n// Connecter is a storage object that responds to a connection request.\\ntype Connecter interface {\\n\\t// Connect returns an http.Handler that will handle the request/response for a given API invocation.\\n\\t// The provided responder may be used for common API responses. The responder will write both status\\n\\t// code and body, so the ServeHTTP method should exit after invoking the responder. The Handler will\\n\\t// be used for a single API request and then discarded. The Responder is guaranteed to write to the\\n\\t// same http.ResponseWriter passed to ServeHTTP.\\n\\tConnect(ctx context.Context, id string, options runtime.Object, r Responder) (http.Handler, error)\\n\\n\\t// NewConnectOptions returns an empty options object that will be used to pass\\n\\t// options to the Connect method. If nil, then a nil options object is passed to\\n\\t// Connect. It may return a bool and a string. If true, the value of the request\\n\\t// path below the object will be included as the named string in the serialization\\n\\t// of the runtime object.\\n\\tNewConnectOptions() (runtime.Object, bool, string)\\n\\n\\t// ConnectMethods returns the list of HTTP methods handled by Connect\\n\\tConnectMethods() []string\\n}\\n\\n// ResourceStreamer is an interface implemented by objects that prefer to be streamed from the server\\n// instead of decoded directly.\\ntype ResourceStreamer interface {\\n\\t// InputStream should return an io.ReadCloser if the provided object supports streaming. The desired\\n\\t// api version and an accept header (may be empty) are passed to the call. If no error occurs,\\n\\t// the caller may return a flag indicating whether the result should be flushed as writes occur\\n\\t// and a content type string that indicates the type of the stream.\\n\\t// If a null stream is returned, a StatusNoContent response wil be generated.\\n\\tInputStream(ctx context.Context, apiVersion, acceptHeader string) (stream io.ReadCloser, flush bool, mimeType string, err error)\\n}\\n\\n// StorageMetadata is an optional interface that callers can implement to provide additional\\n// information about their Storage objects.\\ntype StorageMetadata interface {\\n\\t// ProducesMIMETypes returns a list of the MIME types the specified HTTP verb (GET, POST, DELETE,\\n\\t// PATCH) can respond with.\\n\\tProducesMIMETypes(verb string) []string\\n\\n\\t// ProducesObject returns an object the specified HTTP verb respond with. It will overwrite storage object if\\n\\t// it is not nil. Only the type of the return object matters, the value will be ignored.\\n\\tProducesObject(verb string) interface{}\\n}\\n\\n// StorageVersionProvider is an optional interface that a storage object can\\n// implement if it wishes to disclose its storage version.\\ntype StorageVersionProvider interface {\\n\\t// StorageVersion returns a group versioner, which will outputs the gvk\\n\\t// an object will be converted to before persisted in etcd, given a\\n\\t// list of kinds the object might belong to.\\n\\tStorageVersion() runtime.GroupVersioner\\n}\\n\\n// ResetFieldsStrategy is an optional interface that a storage object can\\n// implement if it wishes to provide the fields reset by its strategies.\\ntype ResetFieldsStrategy interface {\\n\\tGetResetFields() map[fieldpath.APIVersion]*fieldpath.Set\\n}\\n\\n// ResetFieldsFilterStrategy is an optional interface that a storage object can\\n// implement if it wishes to provide a fields filter reset by its strategies.\\ntype ResetFieldsFilterStrategy interface {\\n\\tGetResetFieldsFilter() map[fieldpath.APIVersion]fieldpath.Filter\\n}\\n\\n// CreateUpdateResetFieldsStrategy is a union of RESTCreateUpdateStrategy\\n// and ResetFieldsStrategy.\\ntype CreateUpdateResetFieldsStrategy interface {\\n\\tRESTCreateUpdateStrategy\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"5c274569-e542-4595-9fa3-0e880f95dbf8\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:24.654Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"d0bd7e5c-be4e-43de-b435-e22876bd1a27\"}\n",

-100\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":4,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":406,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":51574,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":406},\"output_tokens\":5,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2xMJB3SBFdTjDSfpW3\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"3e27014a-3af7-4222-a02e-d3cf60d52d54\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:45.765Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"3e27014a-3af7-4222-a02e-d3cf60d52d54\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01SfSikCHSDnjPZvAUpv8PGK\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage admission\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"io\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\tauditinternal \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/user\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// Attributes is an interface used by AdmissionController to get information about a request\\n// that is used to make an admission decision.\\ntype Attributes interface {\\n\\t// GetName returns the name of the object as presented in the request.  On a CREATE operation, the client\\n\\t// may omit name and rely on the server to generate the name.  If that is the case, this method will return\\n\\t// the empty string\\n\\tGetName() string\\n\\t// GetNamespace is the namespace associated with the request (if any)\\n\\tGetNamespace() string\\n\\t// GetResource is the name of the resource being requested.  This is not the kind.  For example: pods\\n\\tGetResource() schema.GroupVersionResource\\n\\t// GetSubresource is the name of the subresource being requested.  This is a different resource, scoped to the parent resource, but it may have a different kind.\\n\\t// For instance, /pods has the resource \\\"pods\\\" and the kind \\\"Pod\\\", while /pods/foo/status has the resource \\\"pods\\\", the sub resource \\\"status\\\", and the kind \\\"Pod\\\"\\n\\t// (because status operates on pods). The binding resource for a pod though may be /pods/foo/binding, which has resource \\\"pods\\\", subresource \\\"binding\\\", and kind \\\"Binding\\\".\\n\\tGetSubresource() string\\n\\t// GetOperation is the operation being performed\\n\\tGetOperation() Operation\\n\\t// GetOperationOptions is the options for the operation being performed\\n\\tGetOperationOptions() runtime.Object\\n\\t// IsDryRun indicates that modifications will definitely not be persisted for this request. This is to prevent\\n\\t// admission controllers with side effects and a method of reconciliation from being overwhelmed.\\n\\t// However, a value of false for this does not mean that the modification will be persisted, because it\\n\\t// could still be rejected by a subsequent validation step.\\n\\tIsDryRun() bool\\n\\t// GetObject is the object from the incoming request prior to default values being applied\\n\\tGetObject() runtime.Object\\n\\t// GetOldObject is the existing object. Only populated for UPDATE and DELETE requests.\\n\\tGetOldObject() runtime.Object\\n\\t// GetKind is the type of object being manipulated.  For example: Pod\\n\\tGetKind() schema.GroupVersionKind\\n\\t// GetUserInfo is information about the requesting user\\n\\tGetUserInfo() user.Info\\n\\n\\t// AddAnnotation sets annotation according to key-value pair. The key should be qualified, e.g., podsecuritypolicy.admission.k8s.io/admit-policy, where\\n\\t// \\\"podsecuritypolicy\\\" is the name of the plugin, \\\"admission.k8s.io\\\" is the name of the organization, \\\"admit-policy\\\" is the key name.\\n\\t// An error is returned if the format of key is invalid. When trying to overwrite annotation with a new value, an error is returned.\\n\\t// Both ValidationInterface and MutationInterface are allowed to add Annotations.\\n\\t// By default, an annotation gets logged into audit event if the request's audit level is greater or\\n\\t// equal to Metadata.\\n\\tAddAnnotation(key, value string) error\\n\\n\\t// AddAnnotationWithLevel sets annotation according to key-value pair with additional intended audit level.\\n\\t// An Annotation gets logged into audit event if the request's audit level is greater or equal to the\\n\\t// intended audit level.\\n\\tAddAnnotationWithLevel(key, value string, level auditinternal.Level) error\\n\\n\\t// GetReinvocationContext tracks the admission request information relevant to the re-invocation policy.\\n\\tGetReinvocationContext() ReinvocationContext\\n}\\n\\n// ObjectInterfaces is an interface used by AdmissionController to get object interfaces\\n// such as Converter or Defaulter. These interfaces are normally coming from Request Scope\\n// to handle special cases like CRDs.\\ntype ObjectInterfaces interface {\\n\\t// GetObjectCreater is the ObjectCreator appropriate for the requested object.\\n\\tGetObjectCreater() runtime.ObjectCreater\\n\\t// GetObjectTyper is the ObjectTyper appropriate for the requested object.\\n\\tGetObjectTyper() runtime.ObjectTyper\\n\\t// GetObjectDefaulter is the ObjectDefaulter appropriate for the requested object.\\n\\tGetObjectDefaulter() runtime.ObjectDefaulter\\n\\t// GetObjectConvertor is the ObjectConvertor appropriate for the requested object.\\n\\tGetObjectConvertor() runtime.ObjectConvertor\\n\\t// GetEquivalentResourceMapper is the EquivalentResourceMapper appropriate for finding equivalent resources and expected kind for the requested object.\\n\\tGetEquivalentResourceMapper() runtime.EquivalentResourceMapper\\n}\\n\\n// privateAnnotationsGetter is a private interface which allows users to get annotations from Attributes.\\ntype privateAnnotationsGetter interface {\\n\\tgetAnnotations(maxLevel auditinternal.Level) map[string]string\\n}\\n\\n// AnnotationsGetter allows users to get annotations from Attributes. An alternate Attribute should implement\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"4b695ba0-8d20-4615-9e91-2fef6de1de22\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:45.781Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"3e27014a-3af7-4222-a02e-d3cf60d52d54\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"4b695ba0-8d20-4615-9e91-2fef6de1de22\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_015qWqzWBSSVJR4AD4CbDV4o\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Good! HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/interfaces.go\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":3,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1502,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":51980,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1502},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2xTitBX7p2YFYhzC87\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"a3dbc101-7f22-4f56-a77f-3eb31345c33d\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:47.178Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"a3dbc101-7f22-4f56-a77f-3eb31345c33d\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01Ktnxp5k1JEhj1sYvu1e6hq\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage admission\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"io\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\tauditinternal \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/user\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// Attributes is an interface used by AdmissionController to get information about a request\\n// that is used to make an admission decision.\\ntype Attributes interface {\\n\\t// GetName returns the name of the object as presented in the request.  On a CREATE operation, the client\\n\\t// may omit name and rely on the server to generate the name.  If that is the case, this method will return\\n\\t// the empty string\\n\\tGetName() string\\n\\t// GetNamespace is the namespace associated with the request (if any)\\n\\tGetNamespace() string\\n\\t// GetResource is the name of the resource being requested.  This is not the kind.  For example: pods\\n\\tGetResource() schema.GroupVersionResource\\n\\t// GetSubresource is the name of the subresource being requested.  This is a different resource, scoped to the parent resource, but it may have a different kind.\\n\\t// For instance, /pods has the resource \\\"pods\\\" and the kind \\\"Pod\\\", while /pods/foo/status has the resource \\\"pods\\\", the sub resource \\\"status\\\", and the kind \\\"Pod\\\"\\n\\t// (because status operates on pods). The binding resource for a pod though may be /pods/foo/binding, which has resource \\\"pods\\\", subresource \\\"binding\\\", and kind \\\"Binding\\\".\\n\\tGetSubresource() string\\n\\t// GetOperation is the operation being performed\\n\\tGetOperation() Operation\\n\\t// GetOperationOptions is the options for the operation being performed\\n\\tGetOperationOptions() runtime.Object\\n\\t// IsDryRun indicates that modifications will definitely not be persisted for this request. This is to prevent\\n\\t// admission controllers with side effects and a method of reconciliation from being overwhelmed.\\n\\t// However, a value of false for this does not mean that the modification will be persisted, because it\\n\\t// could still be rejected by a subsequent validation step.\\n\\tIsDryRun() bool\\n\\t// GetObject is the object from the incoming request prior to default values being applied\\n\\tGetObject() runtime.Object\\n\\t// GetOldObject is the existing object. Only populated for UPDATE and DELETE requests.\\n\\tGetOldObject() runtime.Object\\n\\t// GetKind is the type of object being manipulated.  For example: Pod\\n\\tGetKind() schema.GroupVersionKind\\n\\t// GetUserInfo is information about the requesting user\\n\\tGetUserInfo() user.Info\\n\\n\\t// AddAnnotation sets annotation according to key-value pair. The key should be qualified, e.g., podsecuritypolicy.admission.k8s.io/admit-policy, where\\n\\t// \\\"podsecuritypolicy\\\" is the name of the plugin, \\\"admission.k8s.io\\\" is the name of the organization, \\\"admit-policy\\\" is the key name.\\n\\t// An error is returned if the format of key is invalid. When trying to overwrite annotation with a new value, an error is returned.\\n\\t// Both ValidationInterface and MutationInterface are allowed to add Annotations.\\n\\t// By default, an annotation gets logged into audit event if the request's audit level is greater or\\n\\t// equal to Metadata.\\n\\tAddAnnotation(key, value string) error\\n\\n\\t// AddAnnotationWithLevel sets annotation according to key-value pair with additional intended audit level.\\n\\t// An Annotation gets logged into audit event if the request's audit level is greater or equal to the\\n\\t// intended audit level.\\n\\tAddAnnotationWithLevel(key, value string, level auditinternal.Level) error\\n\\n\\t// GetReinvocationContext tracks the admission request information relevant to the re-invocation policy.\\n\\tGetReinvocationContext() ReinvocationContext\\n}\\n\\n// ObjectInterfaces is an interface used by AdmissionController to get object interfaces\\n// such as Converter or Defaulter. These interfaces are normally coming from Request Scope\\n// to handle special cases like CRDs.\\ntype ObjectInterfaces interface {\\n\\t// GetObjectCreater is the ObjectCreator appropriate for the requested object.\\n\\tGetObjectCreater() runtime.ObjectCreater\\n\\t// GetObjectTyper is the ObjectTyper appropriate for the requested object.\\n\\tGetObjectTyper() runtime.ObjectTyper\\n\\t// GetObjectDefaulter is the ObjectDefaulter appropriate for the requested object.\\n\\tGetObjectDefaulter() runtime.ObjectDefaulter\\n\\t// GetObjectConvertor is the ObjectConvertor appropriate for the requested object.\\n\\tGetObjectConvertor() runtime.ObjectConvertor\\n\\t// GetEquivalentResourceMapper is the EquivalentResourceMapper appropriate for finding equivalent resources and expected kind for the requested object.\\n\\tGetEquivalentResourceMapper() runtime.EquivalentResourceMapper\\n}\\n\\n// privateAnnotationsGetter is a private interface which allows users to get annotations from Attributes.\\ntype privateAnnotationsGetter interface {\\n\\tgetAnnotations(maxLevel auditinternal.Level) map[string]string\\n}\\n\\n// AnnotationsGetter allows users to get annotations from Attributes. An alternate Attribute should implement\\n// this interface.\\ntype AnnotationsGetter interface {\\n\\tGetAnnotations(maxLevel auditinternal.Level) map[string]string\\n}\\n\\n// ReinvocationContext provides access to the admission related state required to implement the re-invocation policy.\\ntype ReinvocationContext interface {\\n\\t// IsReinvoke returns true if the current admission check is a re-invocation.\\n\\tIsReinvoke() bool\\n\\t// SetIsReinvoke sets the current admission check as a re-invocation.\\n\\tSetIsReinvoke()\\n\\t// ShouldReinvoke returns true if any plugin has requested a re-invocation.\\n\\tShouldReinvoke() bool\\n\\t// SetShouldReinvoke signals that a re-invocation is desired.\\n\\tSetShouldReinvoke()\\n\\t// AddValue set a value for a plugin name, possibly overriding a previous value.\\n\\tSetValue(plugin string, v interface{})\\n\\t// Value reads a value for a webhook.\\n\\tValue(plugin string) interface{}\\n}\\n\\n// Interface is an abstract, pluggable interface for Admission Control decisions.\\ntype Interface interface {\\n\\t// Handles returns true if this admission controller can handle the given operation\\n\\t// where operation can be one of CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, or CONNECT\\n\\tHandles(operation Operation) bool\\n}\\n\\ntype MutationInterface interface {\\n\\tInterface\\n\\n\\t// Admit makes an admission decision based on the request attributes.\\n\\t// Context is used only for timeout/deadline/cancellation and tracing information.\\n\\tAdmit(ctx context.Context, a Attributes, o ObjectInterfaces) (err error)\\n}\\n\\n// ValidationInterface is an abstract, pluggable interface for Admission Control decisions.\\ntype ValidationInterface interface {\\n\\tInterface\\n\\n\\t// Validate makes an admission decision based on the request attributes.  It is NOT allowed to mutate\\n\\t// Context is used only for timeout/deadline/cancellation and tracing information.\\n\\tValidate(ctx context.Context, a Attributes, o ObjectInterfaces) (err error)\\n}\\n\\n// Operation is the type of resource operation being checked for admission control\\ntype Operation string\\n\\n// Operation constants\\nconst (\\n\\tCreate  Operation = \\\"CREATE\\\"\\n\\tUpdate  Operation = \\\"UPDATE\\\"\\n\\tDelete  Operation = \\\"DELETE\\\"\\n\\tConnect Operation = \\\"CONNECT\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// PluginInitializer is used for initialization of shareable resources between admission plugins.\\n// After initialization the resources have to be set separately\\ntype PluginInitializer interface {\\n\\tInitialize(plugin Interface)\\n}\\n\\n// InitializationValidator holds ValidateInitialization functions, which are responsible for validation of initialized\\n// shared resources and should be implemented on admission plugins\\ntype InitializationValidator interface {\\n\\tValidateInitialization() error\\n}\\n\\n// ConfigProvider provides a way to get configuration for an admission plugin based on its name\\ntype ConfigProvider interface {\\n\\tConfigFor(pluginName string) (io.Reader, error)\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"c965ede1-bdab-4e96-8e26-10c33c04d27a\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:47.192Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"a3dbc101-7f22-4f56-a77f-3eb31345c33d\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"c965ede1-bdab-4e96-8e26-10c33c04d27a\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_015qWqzWBSSVJR4AD4CbDV4o\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01Pd2eRieUFPxHUj3wYhffqh\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/chain.go\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":3,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1502,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":51980,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1502},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2xTitBX7p2YFYhzC87\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"c35a87b1-64b5-4498-a412-0a7552b4555c\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:47.437Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"c35a87b1-64b5-4498-a412-0a7552b4555c\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01Pd2eRieUFPxHUj3wYhffqh\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage admission\\n\\nimport \\\"context\\\"\\n\\n// chainAdmissionHandler is an instance of admission.NamedHandler that performs admission control using\\n// a chain of admission handlers\\ntype chainAdmissionHandler []Interface\\n\\n// NewChainHandler creates a new chain handler from an array of handlers. Used for testing.\\nfunc NewChainHandler(handlers ...Interface) chainAdmissionHandler {\\n\\treturn chainAdmissionHandler(handlers)\\n}\\n\\n// Admit performs an admission control check using a chain of handlers, and returns immediately on first error\\nfunc (admissionHandler chainAdmissionHandler) Admit(ctx context.Context, a Attributes, o ObjectInterfaces) error {\\n\\tfor _, handler := range admissionHandler {\\n\\t\\tif !handler.Handles(a.GetOperation()) {\\n\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif mutator, ok := handler.(MutationInterface); ok {\\n\\t\\t\\terr := mutator.Admit(ctx, a, o)\\n\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// Validate performs an admission control check using a chain of handlers, and returns immediately on first error\\nfunc (admissionHandler chainAdmissionHandler) Validate(ctx context.Context, a Attributes, o ObjectInterfaces) error {\\n\\tfor _, handler := range admissionHandler {\\n\\t\\tif !handler.Handles(a.GetOperation()) {\\n\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif validator, ok := handler.(ValidationInterface); ok {\\n\\t\\t\\terr := validator.Validate(ctx, a, o)\\n\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// Handles will return true if any of the handlers handles the given operation\\nfunc (admissionHandler chainAdmissionHandler) Handles(operation Operation) bool {\\n\\tfor _, handler := range admissionHandler {\\n\\t\\tif handler.Handles(operation) {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn true\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn false\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"f7851f9f-75a7-4d63-935b-bcff781e748d\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:47.456Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"c35a87b1-64b5-4498-a412-0a7552b4555c\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"f7851f9f-75a7-4d63-935b-bcff781e748d\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_015qWqzWBSSVJR4AD4CbDV4o\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_019cN8vg6v5iHQdpJzKJ8X4R\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/handler.go\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":3,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1502,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":51980,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1502},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2xTitBX7p2YFYhzC87\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"3c54ef7b-d9ca-4b63-8628-5897dd1ffef5\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:47.601Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"3c54ef7b-d9ca-4b63-8628-5897dd1ffef5\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_019cN8vg6v5iHQdpJzKJ8X4R\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2015 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage admission\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\t// timeToWaitForReady is the amount of time to wait to let an admission controller to be ready to satisfy a request.\\n\\t// this is useful when admission controllers need to warm their caches before letting requests through.\\n\\ttimeToWaitForReady = 10 * time.Second\\n)\\n\\n// ReadyFunc is a function that returns true if the admission controller is ready to handle requests.\\ntype ReadyFunc func() bool\\n\\n// Handler is a base for admission control handlers that\\n// support a predefined set of operations\\ntype Handler struct {\\n\\toperations sets.String\\n\\treadyFunc  ReadyFunc\\n}\\n\\n// Handles returns true for methods that this handler supports\\nfunc (h *Handler) Handles(operation Operation) bool {\\n\\treturn h.operations.Has(string(operation))\\n}\\n\\n// NewHandler creates a new base handler that handles the passed\\n// in operations\\nfunc NewHandler(ops ...Operation) *Handler {\\n\\toperations := sets.NewString()\\n\\tfor _, op := range ops {\\n\\t\\toperations.Insert(string(op))\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn &Handler{\\n\\t\\toperations: operations,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// SetReadyFunc allows late registration of a ReadyFunc to know if the handler is ready to process requests.\\nfunc (h *Handler) SetReadyFunc(readyFunc ReadyFunc) {\\n\\th.readyFunc = readyFunc\\n}\\n\\n// WaitForReady will wait for the readyFunc (if registered) to return ready, and in case of timeout, will return false.\\nfunc (h *Handler) WaitForReady() bool {\\n\\t// there is no ready func configured, so we return immediately\\n\\tif h.readyFunc == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn true\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ttimeout := time.After(timeToWaitForReady)\\n\\tfor !h.readyFunc() {\\n\\t\\tselect {\\n\\t\\tcase <-time.After(100 * time.Millisecond):\\n\\t\\tcase <-timeout:\\n\\t\\t\\treturn h.readyFunc()\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn true\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"24515806-efaf-4fe5-bef9-f38aa134f374\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:47.614Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"3c54ef7b-d9ca-4b63-8628-5897dd1ffef5\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"24515806-efaf-4fe5-bef9-f38aa134f374\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_014LxPTRaNcMf7RcEUj98gDM\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Excellent! show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/authenticator/interfaces.go\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":4,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":3595,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":53482,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":3595},\"output_tokens\":4,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2xbkaVMSpeRKFtLzFm\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"093406c7-0b64-476a-9df8-3881872f381f\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:49.285Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"093406c7-0b64-476a-9df8-3881872f381f\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01UFtGmguJL3FZpSJhbZW5dg\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage authenticator\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/user\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// Token checks a string value against a backing authentication store and\\n// returns a Response or an error if the token could not be checked.\\ntype Token interface {\\n\\tAuthenticateToken(ctx context.Context, token string) (*Response, bool, error)\\n}\\n\\n// Request attempts to extract authentication information from a request and\\n// returns a Response or an error if the request could not be checked.\\ntype Request interface {\\n\\tAuthenticateRequest(req *http.Request) (*Response, bool, error)\\n}\\n\\n// TokenFunc is a function that implements the Token interface.\\ntype TokenFunc func(ctx context.Context, token string) (*Response, bool, error)\\n\\n// AuthenticateToken implements authenticator.Token.\\nfunc (f TokenFunc) AuthenticateToken(ctx context.Context, token string) (*Response, bool, error) {\\n\\treturn f(ctx, token)\\n}\\n\\n// RequestFunc is a function that implements the Request interface.\\ntype RequestFunc func(req *http.Request) (*Response, bool, error)\\n\\n// AuthenticateRequest implements authenticator.Request.\\nfunc (f RequestFunc) AuthenticateRequest(req *http.Request) (*Response, bool, error) {\\n\\treturn f(req)\\n}\\n\\n// Response is the struct returned by authenticator interfaces upon successful\\n// authentication. It contains information about whether the authenticator\\n// authenticated the request, information about the context of the\\n// authentication, and information about the authenticated user.\\ntype Response struct {\\n\\t// Audiences is the set of audiences the authenticator was able to validate\\n\\t// the token against. If the authenticator is not audience aware, this field\\n\\t// will be empty.\\n\\tAudiences Audiences\\n\\t// User is the UserInfo associated with the authentication context.\\n\\tUser user.Info\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"23c08d21-20ee-4b46-ae7d-1fc9d12ebda9\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:49.299Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"093406c7-0b64-476a-9df8-3881872f381f\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"23c08d21-20ee-4b46-ae7d-1fc9d12ebda9\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_014LxPTRaNcMf7RcEUj98gDM\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_0165DtdWzcg3AmSBk5eqDeXE\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authorization/authorizer/interfaces.go\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":4,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":3595,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":53482,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":3595},\"output_tokens\":4,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2xbkaVMSpeRKFtLzFm\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"3e1373c1-989e-4a56-88c9-6d5d84a38e27\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:49.485Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"3e1373c1-989e-4a56-88c9-6d5d84a38e27\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_0165DtdWzcg3AmSBk5eqDeXE\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage authorizer\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/fields\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/labels\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/user\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// Attributes is an interface used by an Authorizer to get information about a request\\n// that is used to make an authorization decision.\\ntype Attributes interface {\\n\\t// GetUser returns the user.Info object to authorize\\n\\tGetUser() user.Info\\n\\n\\t// GetVerb returns the kube verb associated with API requests (this includes get, list, watch, create, update, patch, delete, deletecollection, and proxy),\\n\\t// or the lowercased HTTP verb associated with non-API requests (this includes get, put, post, patch, and delete)\\n\\tGetVerb() string\\n\\n\\t// When IsReadOnly() == true, the request has no side effects, other than\\n\\t// caching, logging, and other incidentals.\\n\\tIsReadOnly() bool\\n\\n\\t// The namespace of the object, if a request is for a REST object.\\n\\tGetNamespace() string\\n\\n\\t// The kind of object, if a request is for a REST object.\\n\\tGetResource() string\\n\\n\\t// GetSubresource returns the subresource being requested, if present\\n\\tGetSubresource() string\\n\\n\\t// GetName returns the name of the object as parsed off the request.  This will not be present for all request types, but\\n\\t// will be present for: get, update, delete\\n\\tGetName() string\\n\\n\\t// The group of the resource, if a request is for a REST object.\\n\\tGetAPIGroup() string\\n\\n\\t// GetAPIVersion returns the version of the group requested, if a request is for a REST object.\\n\\tGetAPIVersion() string\\n\\n\\t// IsResourceRequest returns true for requests to API resources, like /api/v1/nodes,\\n\\t// and false for non-resource endpoints like /api, /healthz\\n\\tIsResourceRequest() bool\\n\\n\\t// GetPath returns the path of the request\\n\\tGetPath() string\\n\\n\\t// ParseFieldSelector is lazy, thread-safe, and stores the parsed result and error.\\n\\t// It returns an error if the field selector cannot be parsed.\\n\\t// The returned requirements must be treated as readonly and not modified.\\n\\tGetFieldSelector() (fields.Requirements, error)\\n\\n\\t// ParseLabelSelector is lazy, thread-safe, and stores the parsed result and error.\\n\\t// It returns an error if the label selector cannot be parsed.\\n\\t// The returned requirements must be treated as readonly and not modified.\\n\\tGetLabelSelector() (labels.Requirements, error)\\n}\\n\\n// Authorizer makes an authorization decision based on information gained by making\\n// zero or more calls to methods of the Attributes interface.  It returns nil when an action is\\n// authorized, otherwise it returns an error.\\ntype Authorizer interface {\\n\\tAuthorize(ctx context.Context, a Attributes) (authorized Decision, reason string, err error)\\n}\\n\\ntype AuthorizerFunc func(ctx context.Context, a Attributes) (Decision, string, error)\\n\\nfunc (f AuthorizerFunc) Authorize(ctx context.Context, a Attributes) (Decision, string, error) {\\n\\treturn f(ctx, a)\\n}\\n\\n// RuleResolver provides a mechanism for resolving the list of rules that apply to a given user within a namespace.\\ntype RuleResolver interface {\\n\\t// RulesFor get the list of cluster wide rules, the list of rules in the specific namespace, incomplete status and errors.\\n\\tRulesFor(ctx context.Context, user user.Info, namespace string) ([]ResourceRuleInfo, []NonResourceRuleInfo, bool, error)\\n}\\n\\n// RequestAttributesGetter provides a function that extracts Attributes from an http.Request\\ntype RequestAttributesGetter interface {\\n\\tGetRequestAttributes(user.Info, *http.Request) Attributes\\n}\\n\\n// AttributesRecord implements Attributes interface.\\ntype AttributesRecord struct {\\n\\tUser            user.Info\\n\\tVerb            string\\n\\tNamespace       string\\n\\tAPIGroup        string\\n\\tAPIVersion      string\\n\\tResource        string\\n\\tSubresource     string\\n\\tName            string\\n\\tResourceRequest bool\\n\\tPath            string\\n\\n\\tFieldSelectorRequirements fields.Requirements\\n\\tFieldSelectorParsingErr   error\\n\\tLabelSelectorRequirements labels.Requirements\\n\\tLabelSelectorParsingErr   error\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetUser() user.Info {\\n\\treturn a.User\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetVerb() string {\\n\\treturn a.Verb\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) IsReadOnly() bool {\\n\\treturn a.Verb == \\\"get\\\" || a.Verb == \\\"list\\\" || a.Verb == \\\"watch\\\"\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetNamespace() string {\\n\\treturn a.Namespace\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetResource() string {\\n\\treturn a.Resource\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetSubresource() string {\\n\\treturn a.Subresource\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetName() string {\\n\\treturn a.Name\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetAPIGroup() string {\\n\\treturn a.APIGroup\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetAPIVersion() string {\\n\\treturn a.APIVersion\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) IsResourceRequest() bool {\\n\\treturn a.ResourceRequest\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetPath() string {\\n\\treturn a.Path\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetFieldSelector() (fields.Requirements, error) {\\n\\treturn a.FieldSelectorRequirements, a.FieldSelectorParsingErr\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a AttributesRecord) GetLabelSelector() (labels.Requirements, error) {\\n\\treturn a.LabelSelectorRequirements, a.LabelSelectorParsingErr\\n}\\n\\ntype Decision int\\n\\nconst (\\n\\t// DecisionDeny means that an authorizer decided to deny the action.\\n\\tDecisionDeny Decision = iota\\n\\t// DecisionAllow means that an authorizer decided to allow the action.\\n\\tDecisionAllow\\n\\t// DecisionNoOpinion means that an authorizer has no opinion on whether\\n\\t// to allow or deny an action.\\n\\tDecisionNoOpinion\\n)\\n\\nfunc (d Decision) String() string {\\n\\tswitch d {\\n\\tcase DecisionDeny:\\n\\t\\treturn \\\"Deny\\\"\\n\\tcase DecisionAllow:\\n\\t\\treturn \\\"Allow\\\"\\n\\tcase DecisionNoOpinion:\\n\\t\\treturn \\\"NoOpinion\\\"\\n\\tdefault:\\n\\t\\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\\\"Unknown (%d)\\\", int(d))\\n\\t}\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"aa68e70a-b23b-4f16-ac1a-3875009f55c4\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:49.498Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"3e1373c1-989e-4a56-88c9-6d5d84a38e27\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"aa68e70a-b23b-4f16-ac1a-3875009f55c4\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01BGuwZ3fTm6R8J1AHAdCNQL\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage bearertoken\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"errors\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/authenticator\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/warning\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\tinvalidTokenWithSpaceWarning = \\\"the provided Authorization header contains extra space before the bearer token, and is ignored\\\"\\n)\\n\\ntype Authenticator struct {\\n\\tauth authenticator.Token\\n}\\n\\nfunc New(auth authenticator.Token) *Authenticator {\\n\\treturn &Authenticator{auth}\\n}\\n\\nvar invalidToken = errors.New(\\\"invalid bearer token\\\")\\n\\nfunc (a *Authenticator) AuthenticateRequest(req *http.Request) (*authenticator.Response, bool, error) {\\n\\tauth := strings.TrimSpace(req.Header.Get(\\\"Authorization\\\"))\\n\\tif auth == \\\"\\\" {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, false, nil\\n\\t}\\n\\tparts := strings.SplitN(auth, \\\" \\\", 3)\\n\\tif len(parts) < 2 || strings.ToLower(parts[0]) != \\\"bearer\\\" {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, false, nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ttoken := parts[1]\\n\\n\\t// Empty bearer tokens aren't valid\\n\\tif len(token) == 0 {\\n\\t\\t// The space before the token case\\n\\t\\tif len(parts) == 3 {\\n\\t\\t\\twarning.AddWarning(req.Context(), \\\"\\\", invalidTokenWithSpaceWarning)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\treturn nil, false, nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tresp, ok, err := a.auth.AuthenticateToken(req.Context(), token)\\n\\t// if we authenticated successfully, go ahead and remove the bearer token so that no one\\n\\t// is ever tempted to use it inside of the API server\\n\\tif ok {\\n\\t\\treq.Header.Del(\\\"Authorization\\\")\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// If the token authenticator didn't error, provide a default error\\n\\tif !ok && err == nil {\\n\\t\\terr = invalidToken\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn resp, ok, err\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"5408d504-e46d-4b16-8098-68f04af7bd8c\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:51.088Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"07baa51c-d92c-4291-9178-9137d2d53caf\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"5408d504-e46d-4b16-8098-68f04af7bd8c\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01BGuwZ3fTm6R8J1AHAdCNQL\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01Hyjx7q2PCdZtAVrhsmTuUq\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git 2016 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage anonymous\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/apiserver\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/authenticator\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/user\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\tanonymousUser        = user.Anonymous\\n\\tunauthenticatedGroup = user.AllUnauthenticated\\n)\\n\\ntype Authenticator struct {\\n\\tallowedPaths map[string]bool\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a *Authenticator) AuthenticateRequest(req *http.Request) (*authenticator.Response, bool, error) {\\n\\tif len(a.allowedPaths) > 0 && !a.allowedPaths[req.URL.Path] {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, false, nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tauds, _ := authenticator.AudiencesFrom(req.Context())\\n\\treturn &authenticator.Response{\\n\\t\\tUser: &user.DefaultInfo{\\n\\t\\t\\tName:   anonymousUser,\\n\\t\\t\\tGroups: []string{unauthenticatedGroup},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\tAudiences: auds,\\n\\t}, true, nil\\n}\\n\\n// NewAuthenticator returns a new anonymous authenticator.\\n// When conditions is empty all requests are authenticated as anonymous.\\n// When conditions are non-empty only those requests that match the at-least one\\n// condition are authenticated as anonymous.\\nfunc NewAuthenticator(conditions []apiserver.AnonymousAuthCondition) authenticator.Request {\\n\\tallowedPaths := make(map[string]bool)\\n\\tfor _, c := range conditions {\\n\\t\\tallowedPaths[c.Path] = true\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn &Authenticator{allowedPaths: allowedPaths}\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"9663920a-96a1-4fd9-974c-e5520bcd66d4\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:51.374Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"fa6f0afb-1a49-430a-9b80-3f95f210e121\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"9663920a-96a1-4fd9-974c-e5520bcd66d4\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01BGuwZ3fTm6R8J1AHAdCNQL\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_014jCdLYwcvKgcNQfYNMmP4L\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage union\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\n\\tutilerrors \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/errors\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authentication/authenticator\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// unionAuthRequestHandler authenticates requests using a chain of authenticator.Requests\\ntype unionAuthRequestHandler struct {\\n\\t// Handlers is a chain of request authenticators to delegate to\\n\\tHandlers []authenticator.Request\\n\\t// FailOnError determines whether an error returns short-circuits the chain\\n\\tFailOnError bool\\n}\\n\\n// New returns a request authenticator that validates credentials using a chain of authenticator.Request objects.\\n// The entire chain is tried until one succeeds. If all fail, an aggregate error is returned.\\nfunc New(authRequestHandlers ...authenticator.Request) authenticator.Request {\\n\\tif len(authRequestHandlers) == 1 {\\n\\t\\treturn authRequestHandlers[0]\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn &unionAuthRequestHandler{Handlers: authRequestHandlers, FailOnError: false}\\n}\\n\\n// NewFailOnError returns a request authenticator that validates credentials using a chain of authenticator.Request objects.\\n// The first error short-circuits the chain.\\nfunc NewFailOnError(authRequestHandlers ...authenticator.Request) authenticator.Request {\\n\\tif len(authRequestHandlers) == 1 {\\n\\t\\treturn authRequestHandlers[0]\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn &unionAuthRequestHandler{Handlers: authRequestHandlers, FailOnError: true}\\n}\\n\\n// AuthenticateRequest authenticates the request using a chain of authenticator.Request objects.\\nfunc (authHandler *unionAuthRequestHandler) AuthenticateRequest(req *http.Request) (*authenticator.Response, bool, error) {\\n\\tvar errlist []error\\n\\tfor _, currAuthRequestHandler := range authHandler.Handlers {\\n\\t\\tresp, ok, err := currAuthRequestHandler.AuthenticateRequest(req)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tif authHandler.FailOnError {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn resp, ok, err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\terrlist = append(errlist, err)\\n\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tif ok {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn resp, ok, err\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn nil, false, utilerrors.NewAggregate(errlist)\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"fdb1d0a2-636c-44d5-b7bf-3c10238472ef\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:51.756Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"1ce7a489-599b-4fb4-9f81-3902c12647c5\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"fdb1d0a2-636c-44d5-b7bf-3c10238472ef\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_012z5TQ62nSNpMRYda1FRYdo\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now
