show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/handler.go | head -150\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":4,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1577,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":62567,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1577},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2yFfsA6YqHik1GVT3u\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"bb364038-4604-4012-827c-7462200bf164\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:58.641Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"bb364038-4604-4012-827c-7462200bf164\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_019CrvbEqXzBBFQEaLsmVLho\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2017 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage server\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"bytes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\trt \\\"runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sort\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n\\n\\tapierrors \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/handlers/responsewriters\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/mux\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// APIServerHandlers holds the different http.Handlers used by the API server.\\n// This includes the full handler chain, the director (which chooses between gorestful and nonGoRestful,\\n// the gorestful handler (used for the API) which falls through to the nonGoRestful handler on unregistered paths,\\n// and the nonGoRestful handler (which can contain a fallthrough of its own)\\n// FullHandlerChain -> Director -> {GoRestfulContainer,NonGoRestfulMux} based on inspection of registered web services\\ntype APIServerHandler struct {\\n\\t// FullHandlerChain is the one that is eventually served with.  It should include the full filter\\n\\t// chain and then call the Director.\\n\\tFullHandlerChain http.Handler\\n\\t// The registered APIs.  InstallAPIs uses this.  Other servers probably shouldn't access this directly.\\n\\tGoRestfulContainer *restful.Container\\n\\t// NonGoRestfulMux is the final HTTP handler in the chain.\\n\\t// It comes after all filters and the API handling\\n\\t// This is where other servers can attach handler to various parts of the chain.\\n\\tNonGoRestfulMux *mux.PathRecorderMux\\n\\n\\t// Director is here so that we can properly handle fall through and proxy cases.\\n\\t// This looks a bit bonkers, but here's what's happening.  We need to have /apis handling registered in gorestful in order to have\\n\\t// swagger generated for compatibility.  Doing that with `/apis` as a webservice, means that it forcibly 404s (no defaulting allowed)\\n\\t// all requests which are not /apis or /apis/.  We need those calls to fall through behind gorestful for proper delegation.  Trying to\\n\\t// register for a pattern which includes everything behind it doesn't work because gorestful negotiates for verbs and content encoding\\n\\t// and all those things go crazy when gorestful really just needs to pass through.  In addition, openapi enforces unique verb constraints\\n\\t// which we don't fit into and it still muddies up swagger.  Trying to switch the webservices into a route doesn't work because the\\n\\t//  containing webservice faces all the same problems listed above.\\n\\t// This leads to the crazy thing done here.  Our mux does what we need, so we'll place it in front of gorestful.  It will introspect to\\n\\t// decide if the route is likely to be handled by gorestful and route there if needed.  Otherwise, it goes to NonGoRestfulMux mux in\\n\\t// order to handle \\\"normal\\\" paths and delegation. Hopefully no API consumers will ever have to deal with this level of detail.  I think\\n\\t// we should consider completely removing gorestful.\\n\\t// Other servers should only use this opaquely to delegate to an API server.\\n\\tDirector http.Handler\\n}\\n\\n// HandlerChainBuilderFn is used to wrap the GoRestfulContainer handler using the provided handler chain.\\n// It is normally used to apply filtering like authentication and authorization\\ntype HandlerChainBuilderFn func(apiHandler http.Handler) http.Handler\\n\\nfunc NewAPIServerHandler(name string, s runtime.NegotiatedSerializer, handlerChainBuilder HandlerChainBuilderFn, notFoundHandler http.Handler) *APIServerHandler {\\n\\tnonGoRestfulMux := mux.NewPathRecorderMux(name)\\n\\tif notFoundHandler != nil {\\n\\t\\tnonGoRestfulMux.NotFoundHandler(notFoundHandler)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tgorestfulContainer := restful.NewContainer()\\n\\tgorestfulContainer.Router(restful.CurlyRouter{}) // e.g. for proxy/{kind}/{name}/{*}\\n\\tgorestfulContainer.RecoverHandler(func(panicReason interface{}, httpWriter http.ResponseWriter) {\\n\\t\\tlogStackOnRecover(s, panicReason, httpWriter)\\n\\t})\\n\\tgorestfulContainer.ServiceErrorHandler(func(serviceErr restful.ServiceError, request *restful.Request, response *restful.Response) {\\n\\t\\tserviceErrorHandler(s, serviceErr, request, response)\\n\\t})\\n\\n\\tdirector := director{\\n\\t\\tname:               name,\\n\\t\\tgoRestfulContainer: gorestfulContainer,\\n\\t\\tnonGoRestfulMux:    nonGoRestfulMux,\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn &APIServerHandler{\\n\\t\\tFullHandlerChain:   handlerChainBuilder(director),\\n\\t\\tGoRestfulContainer: gorestfulContainer,\\n\\t\\tNonGoRestfulMux:    nonGoRestfulMux,\\n\\t\\tDirector:           director,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// ListedPaths returns the paths that should be shown under /\\nfunc (a *APIServerHandler) ListedPaths() []string {\\n\\tvar handledPaths []string\\n\\t// Extract the paths handled using restful.WebService\\n\\tfor _, ws := range a.GoRestfulContainer.RegisteredWebServices() {\\n\\t\\thandledPaths = append(handledPaths, ws.RootPath())\\n\\t}\\n\\thandledPaths = append(handledPaths, a.NonGoRestfulMux.ListedPaths()...)\\n\\tsort.Strings(handledPaths)\\n\\n\\treturn handledPaths\\n}\\n\\ntype director struct {\\n\\tname               string\\n\\tgoRestfulContainer *restful.Container\\n\\tnonGoRestfulMux    *mux.PathRecorderMux\\n}\\n\\nfunc (d director) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {\\n\\tpath := req.URL.Path\\n\\n\\t// check to see if our webservices want to claim this path\\n\\tfor _, ws := range d.goRestfulContainer.RegisteredWebServices() {\\n\\t\\tswitch {\\n\\t\\tcase ws.RootPath() == \\\"/apis\\\":\\n\\t\\t\\t// if we are exactly /apis or /apis/, then we need special handling in loop.\\n\\t\\t\\t// normally these are passed to the nonGoRestfulMux, but if discovery is enabled, it will go directly.\\n\\t\\t\\t// We can't rely on a prefix match since /apis matches everything (see the big comment on Director above)\\n\\t\\t\\tif path == \\\"/apis\\\" || path == \\\"/apis/\\\" {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tklog.V(5).Infof(\\\"%v: %v %q satisfied by gorestful with webservice %v\\\", d.name, req.Method, path, ws.RootPath())\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t// don't use servemux here because gorestful servemuxes get messed up when removing webservices\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t// TODO fix gorestful, remove TPRs, or stop using gorestful\\n\\t\\t\\t\\td.goRestfulContainer.Dispatch(w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tcase strings.HasPrefix(path, ws.RootPath()):\\n\\t\\t\\t// ensure an exact match or a path boundary match\\n\\t\\t\\tif len(path) == len(ws.RootPath()) || path[len(ws.RootPath())] == '/' {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tklog.V(5).Infof(\\\"%v: %v %q satisfied by gorestful with webservice %v\\\", d.name, req.Method, path, ws.RootPath())\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t// don't use servemux here because gorestful servemuxes get messed up when removing webservices\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t// TODO fix gorestful, remove TPRs, or stop using gorestful\\n\\t\\t\\t\\td.goRestfulContainer.Dispatch(w, req)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"454ded33-16cd-44b8-a914-2e85c0ca1e89\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:58.656Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"bb364038-4604-4012-827c-7462200bf164\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"454ded33-16cd-44b8-a914-2e85c0ca1e89\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Aafymyjxj4itCUYrTQuuzg\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_016vxzbN1uBdqy2p7L5dpX2N\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git 2016 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage filters\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/metrics\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/request\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/httplog\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// WithPanicRecovery wraps an http Handler to recover and log panics (except in the special case of http.ErrAbortHandler panics, which suppress logging).\\nfunc WithPanicRecovery(handler http.Handler, resolver request.RequestInfoResolver) http.Handler {\\n\\treturn withPanicRecovery(handler, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, err interface{}) {\\n\\t\\tif err == http.ErrAbortHandler {\\n\\t\\t\\t// Honor the http.ErrAbortHandler sentinel panic value\\n\\t\\t\\t//\\n\\t\\t\\t// If ServeHTTP panics, the server (the caller of ServeHTTP) assumes\\n\\t\\t\\t// that the effect of the panic was isolated to the active request.\\n\\t\\t\\t// It recovers the panic, logs a stack trace to the server error log,\\n\\t\\t\\t// and either closes the network connection or sends an HTTP/2\\n\\t\\t\\t// RST_STREAM, depending on the HTTP protocol. To abort a handler so\\n\\t\\t\\t// the client sees an interrupted response but the server doesn't log\\n\\t\\t\\t// an error, panic with the value ErrAbortHandler.\\n\\t\\t\\t//\\n\\t\\t\\t// Note that HandleCrash function is actually crashing, after calling the handlers\\n\\t\\t\\tif info, err := resolver.NewRequestInfo(req); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics.RecordRequestAbort(req, nil)\\n\\t\\t\\t} else {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tmetrics.RecordRequestAbort(req, info)\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// This call can have different handlers, but the default chain rate limits. Call it after the metrics are updated\\n\\t\\t\\t// in case the rate limit delays it.  If you outrun the rate for this one timed out requests, something has gone\\n\\t\\t\\t// seriously wrong with your server, but generally having a logging signal for timeouts is useful.\\n\\t\\t\\truntime.HandleErrorWithContext(req.Context(), nil, \\\"Timeout or abort while handling\\\", \\\"method\\\", req.Method, \\\"URI\\\", req.RequestURI, \\\"auditID\\\", audit.GetAuditIDTruncated(req.Context()))\\n\\t\\t\\treturn\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\thttp.Error(w, \\\"This request caused apiserver to panic. Look in the logs for details.\\\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n\\t\\tklog.ErrorS(nil, \\\"apiserver panic'd\\\", \\\"method\\\", req.Method, \\\"URI\\\", req.RequestURI, \\\"auditID\\\", audit.GetAuditIDTruncated(req.Context()))\\n\\t})\\n}\\n\\n// WithHTTPLogging enables logging of incoming requests.\\nfunc WithHTTPLogging(handler http.Handler) http.Handler {\\n\\treturn httplog.WithLogging(handler, httplog.DefaultStacktracePred)\\n}\\n\\nfunc withPanicRecovery(handler http.Handler, crashHandler func(http.ResponseWriter, *http.Request, interface{})) http.Handler {\\n\\treturn http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {\\n\\t\\tdefer runtime.HandleCrash(func(err interface{}) {\\n\\t\\t\\tcrashHandler(w, req, err)\\n\\t\\t})\\n\\n\\t\\t// Dispatch to the internal handler\\n\\t\\thandler.ServeHTTP(w, req)\\n\\t})\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"946a9b83-f5b4-488e-9c45-0abcea761ddb\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:58.897Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"f4846249-0b62-4e48-bbac-a4a73f9f24bb\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"946a9b83-f5b4-488e-9c45-0abcea761ddb\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01RpZH3LMUBUtdfgXxvw5BiS\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\n// Package app does all of the work necessary to create a Kubernetes\\n// APIServer by binding together the API, master and APIServer infrastructure.\\n// It can be configured and called directly or via the hyperkube framework.\\npackage app\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/url\\\"\\n\\t\\\"os\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"github.com/spf13/cobra\\\"\\n\\n\\tapiextensionsv1 \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1\\\"\\n\\tutilerrors \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/errors\\\"\\n\\tutilruntime \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission\\\"\\n\\tgenericapifilters \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters\\\"\\n\\tgenericapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/egressselector\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/flagz\\\"\\n\\tserverstorage \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/storage\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/notfoundhandler\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/proxy\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook\\\"\\n\\tclientgoinformers \\\"k8s.io/client-go/informers\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/rest\\\"\\n\\tcliflag \\\"k8s.io/component-base/cli/flag\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/cli/globalflag\\\"\\n\\tbasecompatibility \\\"k8s.io/component-base/compatibility\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/featuregate\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/logs\\\"\\n\\tlogsapi \\\"k8s.io/component-base/logs/api/v1\\\"\\n\\t_ \\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/prometheus/workqueue\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/term\\\"\\n\\tutilversion \\\"k8s.io/component-base/version\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/version/verflag\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n\\taggregatorapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/cmd/kube-apiserver/app/options\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/capabilities\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane\\\"\\n\\tcontrolplaneapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/apiserver\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/reconcilers\\\"\\n\\tkubeapiserveradmission \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubeapiserver/admission\\\"\\n)\\n\\nfunc init() {\\n\\tutilruntime.Must(logsapi.AddFeatureGates(utilfeature.DefaultMutableFeatureGate))\\n}\\n\\n// NewAPIServerCommand creates a *cobra.Command object with default parameters\\nfunc NewAPIServerCommand() *cobra.Command {\\n\\ts := options.NewServerRunOptions()\\n\\tctx := genericapiserver.SetupSignalContext()\\n\\tfeatureGate := s.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.FeatureGateFor(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent)\\n\\n\\tcmd := &cobra.Command{\\n\\t\\tUse: \\\"kube-apiserver\\\",\\n\\t\\tLong: `The Kubernetes API server validates and configures data\\nfor the api objects which include pods, services, replicationcontrollers, and\\nothers. The API Server services REST operations and provides the frontend to the\\ncluster's shared state through which all other components interact.`,\\n\\n\\t\\t// stop printing usage when the command errors\\n\\t\\tSilenceUsage: true,\\n\\t\\tPersistentPreRunE: func(*cobra.Command, []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := s.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.Set(); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// silence client-go warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\t// kube-apiserver loopback clients should not log self-issued warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\trest.SetDefaultWarningHandler(rest.NoWarnings{})\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\tRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tverflag.PrintAndExitIfRequested()\\n\\t\\t\\tfs := cmd.Flags()\\n\\t\\t\\t// Activate logging as soon as possible, after that\\n\\t\\t\\t// show flags with the final logging configuration.\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := logsapi.ValidateAndApply(s.Logs, featureGate); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\tcliflag.PrintFlags(fs)\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// set default options\\n\\t\\t\\tcompletedOptions, err := s.Complete(ctx)\\n\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// validate options\\n\\t\\t\\tif errs := completedOptions.Validate(); len(errs) != 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn utilerrors.NewAggregate(errs)\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// add feature enablement metrics\\n\\t\\t\\tfeatureGate.(featuregate.MutableFeatureGate).AddMetrics()\\n\\t\\t\\t// add component version metrics\\n\\t\\t\\ts.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.AddMetrics()\\n\\t\\t\\treturn Run(ctx, completedOptions)\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\tArgs: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tfor _, arg := range args {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif len(arg) > 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"%q does not take any arguments, got %q\\\", cmd.CommandPath(), args)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t}\\n\\tcmd.SetContext(ctx)\\n\\n\\tfs := cmd.Flags()\\n\\tnamedFlagSets := s.Flags()\\n\\ts.Flagz = flagz.NamedFlagSetsReader{\\n\\t\\tFlagSets: namedFlagSets,\\n\\t}\\n\\tverflag.AddFlags(namedFlagSets.FlagSet(\\\"global\\\"))\\n\\tglobalflag.AddGlobalFlags(namedFlagSets.FlagSet(\\\"global\\\"), cmd.Name(), logs.SkipLoggingConfigurationFlags())\\n\\tfor _, f := range namedFlagSets.FlagSets {\\n\\t\\tfs.AddFlagSet(f)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tcols, _, _ := term.TerminalSize(cmd.OutOrStdout())\\n\\tcliflag.SetUsageAndHelpFunc(cmd, namedFlagSets, cols)\\n\\n\\treturn cmd\\n}\\n\\n// Run runs the specified APIServer.  This should never exit.\\nfunc Run(ctx context.Context, opts options.CompletedOptions) error {\\n\\t// To help debugging, immediately log version\\n\\tklog.Infof(\\\"Version: %+v\\\", utilversion.Get())\\n\\n\\tklog.InfoS(\\\"Golang settings\\\", \\\"GOGC\\\", os.Getenv(\\\"GOGC\\\"), \\\"GOMAXPROCS\\\", os.Getenv(\\\"GOMAXPROCS\\\"), \\\"GOTRACEBACK\\\", os.Getenv(\\\"GOTRACEBACK\\\"))\\n\\n\\tconfig, err := NewConfig(opts)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tcompleted, err := config.Complete()\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tserver, err := CreateServerChain(completed)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tprepared, err := server.PrepareRun()\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn prepared.Run(ctx)\\n}\\n\\n// CreateServerChain creates the apiservers connected via delegation.\\nfunc CreateServerChain(config CompletedConfig) (*aggregatorapiserver.APIAggregator, error) {\\n\\tnotFoundHandler := notfoundhandler.New(config.KubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic.Serializer, genericapifilters.NoMuxAndDiscoveryIncompleteKey)\\n\\tapiExtensionsServer, err := config.ApiExtensions.New(genericapiserver.NewEmptyDelegateWithCustomHandler(notFoundHandler))\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tcrdAPIEnabled := config.ApiExtensions.GenericConfig.MergedResourceConfig.ResourceEnabled(apiextensionsv1.SchemeGroupVersion.WithResource(\\\"customresourcedefinitions\\\"))\\n\\n\\tkubeAPIServer, err := config.KubeAPIs.New(apiExtensionsServer.GenericAPIServer)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// aggregator comes last in the chain\\n\\taggregatorServer, err := controlplaneapiserver.CreateAggregatorServer(config.Aggregator, kubeAPIServer.ControlPlane.GenericAPIServer, apiExtensionsServer.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), crdAPIEnabled, apiVersionPriorities)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t// we don't need special handling for innerStopCh because the aggregator server doesn't create any go routines\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn aggregatorServer, nil\\n}\\n\\n// CreateKubeAPIServerConfig creates all the resources for running the API server, but runs none of them\\nfunc CreateKubeAPIServerConfig(\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"24909dd7-3f0a-4023-b8f3-3e6625726ef0\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:02.558Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"fe8d07b8-7312-43a1-8916-7381760fb90a\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"24909dd7-3f0a-4023-b8f3-3e6625726ef0\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"acf064a\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01B6d7ooHmZ7ebptWoH2Y6cR\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01NqxWSH9KRGpmBGz2tND58Z\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"find Output

  "retrieval_status": "not_ready",
  "task": {
    "description": "Explore aggregation and kube-apiserver",
    "output": "{\"parentUuid\":null,\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":\"I need to understand how the kube-apiserver binary uses the apiserver library and how API aggregation works. Explore these areas in /workspace:\\n\\n1. `cmd/kube-apiserver/app/server.go` - How the kube-apiserver is set up (read the file)\\n2. `cmd/kube-apiserver/app/aggregator.go` - How the aggregator layer is configured\\n3. `cmd/kube-apiserver/app/config.go` - Configuration setup\\n4. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/genericapiserver.go` - Focus on the delegation chain (DelegationTarget, preparedGenericAPIServer)\\n5. `staging/src/k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go` - The aggregator API server\\n6. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go` - CRD API server\\n7. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/healthz/` - Health check subsystem\\n8. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/` - List all option files to understand configuration surface\\n\\nRead actual file contents and provide line numbers and key type/function signatures. License.\\n*/\\n\\n// Package app does all of the work necessary to create a Kubernetes\\n// APIServer by binding together the API, master and APIServer infrastructure.\\n// It can be configured and called directly or via the hyperkube framework.\\npackage app\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/url\\\"\\n\\t\\\"os\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"github.com/spf13/cobra\\\"\\n\\n\\tapiextensionsv1 \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1\\\"\\n\\tutilerrors \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/errors\\\"\\n\\tutilruntime \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission\\\"\\n\\tgenericapifilters \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters\\\"\\n\\tgenericapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/egressselector\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/flagz\\\"\\n\\tserverstorage \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/storage\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/notfoundhandler\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/proxy\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook\\\"\\n\\tclientgoinformers \\\"k8s.io/client-go/informers\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/rest\\\"\\n\\tcliflag \\\"k8s.io/component-base/cli/flag\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/cli/globalflag\\\"\\n\\tbasecompatibility \\\"k8s.io/component-base/compatibility\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/featuregate\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/logs\\\"\\n\\tlogsapi \\\"k8s.io/component-base/logs/api/v1\\\"\\n\\t_ \\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/prometheus/workqueue\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/term\\\"\\n\\tutilversion \\\"k8s.io/component-base/version\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/version/verflag\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n\\taggregatorapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/cmd/kube-apiserver/app/options\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/capabilities\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane\\\"\\n\\tcontrolplaneapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/apiserver\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/reconcilers\\\"\\n\\tkubeapiserveradmission \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubeapiserver/admission\\\"\\n)\\n\\nfunc init() {\\n\\tutilruntime.Must(logsapi.AddFeatureGates(utilfeature.DefaultMutableFeatureGate))\\n}\\n\\n// NewAPIServerCommand creates a *cobra.Command object with default parameters\\nfunc NewAPIServerCommand() *cobra.Command {\\n\\ts := options.NewServerRunOptions()\\n\\tctx := genericapiserver.SetupSignalContext()\\n\\tfeatureGate := s.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.FeatureGateFor(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent)\\n\\n\\tcmd := &cobra.Command{\\n\\t\\tUse: \\\"kube-apiserver\\\",\\n\\t\\tLong: `The Kubernetes API server validates and configures data\\nfor the api objects which include pods, services, replicationcontrollers, and\\nothers. The API Server services REST operations and provides the frontend to the\\ncluster's shared state through which all other components interact.`,\\n\\n\\t\\t// stop printing usage when the command errors\\n\\t\\tSilenceUsage: true,\\n\\t\\tPersistentPreRunE: func(*cobra.Command, []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := s.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.Set(); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// silence client-go warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\t// kube-apiserver loopback clients should not log self-issued warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\trest.SetDefaultWarningHandler(rest.NoWarnings{})\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\tRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tverflag.PrintAndExitIfRequested()\\n\\t\\t\\tfs := cmd.Flags()\\n\\t\\t\\t// Activate logging as soon as possible, after that\\n\\t\\t\\t// show flags with the final logging configuration.\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := logsapi.ValidateAndApply(s.Logs, featureGate); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"29cd9c91-e352-42f2-827f-d1ef71fd1b06\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:45.207Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"d6a6206b-c959-409a-b8b9-a52c09be630f\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"29cd9c91-e352-42f2-827f-d1ef71fd1b06\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01R99eknz8vkJWwUPj7nm7RB\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Good! IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\n// Package app does all of the work necessary to create a Kubernetes\\n// APIServer by binding together the API, master and APIServer infrastructure.\\n// It can be configured and called directly or via the hyperkube framework.\\npackage app\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/url\\\"\\n\\t\\\"os\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"github.com/spf13/cobra\\\"\\n\\n\\tapiextensionsv1 \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1\\\"\\n\\tutilerrors \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/errors\\\"\\n\\tutilruntime \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission\\\"\\n\\tgenericapifilters \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters\\\"\\n\\tgenericapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/egressselector\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/flagz\\\"\\n\\tserverstorage \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/storage\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/notfoundhandler\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/proxy\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook\\\"\\n\\tclientgoinformers \\\"k8s.io/client-go/informers\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/rest\\\"\\n\\tcliflag \\\"k8s.io/component-base/cli/flag\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/cli/globalflag\\\"\\n\\tbasecompatibility \\\"k8s.io/component-base/compatibility\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/featuregate\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/logs\\\"\\n\\tlogsapi \\\"k8s.io/component-base/logs/api/v1\\\"\\n\\t_ \\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/prometheus/workqueue\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/term\\\"\\n\\tutilversion \\\"k8s.io/component-base/version\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/version/verflag\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n\\taggregatorapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/cmd/kube-apiserver/app/options\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/capabilities\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane\\\"\\n\\tcontrolplaneapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/apiserver\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/reconcilers\\\"\\n\\tkubeapiserveradmission \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubeapiserver/admission\\\"\\n)\\n\\nfunc init() {\\n\\tutilruntime.Must(logsapi.AddFeatureGates(utilfeature.DefaultMutableFeatureGate))\\n}\\n\\n// NewAPIServerCommand creates a *cobra.Command object with default parameters\\nfunc NewAPIServerCommand() *cobra.Command {\\n\\ts := options.NewServerRunOptions()\\n\\tctx := genericapiserver.SetupSignalContext()\\n\\tfeatureGate := s.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.FeatureGateFor(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent)\\n\\n\\tcmd := &cobra.Command{\\n\\t\\tUse: \\\"kube-apiserver\\\",\\n\\t\\tLong: `The Kubernetes API server validates and configures data\\nfor the api objects which include pods, services, replicationcontrollers, and\\nothers. The API Server services REST operations and provides the frontend to the\\ncluster's shared state through which all other components interact.`,\\n\\n\\t\\t// stop printing usage when the command errors\\n\\t\\tSilenceUsage: true,\\n\\t\\tPersistentPreRunE: func(*cobra.Command, []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := s.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.Set(); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// silence client-go warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\t// kube-apiserver loopback clients should not log self-issued warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\trest.SetDefaultWarningHandler(rest.NoWarnings{})\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\tRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tverflag.PrintAndExitIfRequested()\\n\\t\\t\\tfs := cmd.Flags()\\n\\t\\t\\t// Activate logging as soon as possible, after that\\n\\t\\t\\t// show flags with the final logging configuration.\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := logsapi.ValidateAndApply(s.Logs, featureGate); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\tcliflag.PrintFlags(fs)\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// set default options\\n\\t\\t\\tcompletedOptions, err := s.Complete(ctx)\\n\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// validate options\\n\\t\\t\\tif errs := completedOptions.Validate(); len(errs) != 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn utilerrors.NewAggregate(errs)\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// add feature enablement metrics\\n\\t\\t\\tfeatureGate.(featuregate.MutableFeatureGate).AddMetrics()\\n\\t\\t\\t// add component version metrics\\n\\t\\t\\ts.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.AddMetrics()\\n\\t\\t\\treturn Run(ctx, completedOptions)\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\tArgs: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tfor _, arg := range args {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif len(arg) > 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"%q does not take any arguments, got %q\\\", cmd.CommandPath(), args)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t}\\n\\tcmd.SetContext(ctx)\\n\\n\\tfs := cmd.Flags()\\n\\tnamedFlagSets := s.Flags()\\n\\ts.Flagz = flagz.NamedFlagSetsReader{\\n\\t\\tFlagSets: namedFlagSets,\\n\\t}\\n\\tverflag.AddFlags(namedFlagSets.FlagSet(\\\"global\\\"))\\n\\tglobalflag.AddGlobalFlags(namedFlagSets.FlagSet(\\\"global\\\"), cmd.Name(), logs.SkipLoggingConfigurationFlags())\\n\\tfor _, f := range namedFlagSets.FlagSets {\\n\\t\\tfs.AddFlagSet(f)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tcols, _, _ := term.TerminalSize(cmd.OutOrStdout())\\n\\tcliflag.SetUsageAndHelpFunc(cmd, namedFlagSets, cols)\\n\\n\\treturn cmd\\n}\\n\\n// Run runs the specified APIServer.  This should never exit.\\nfunc Run(ctx context.Context, opts options.CompletedOptions) error {\\n\\t// To help debugging, immediately log version\\n\\tklog.Infof(\\\"Version: %+v\\\", utilversion.Get())\\n\\n\\tklog.InfoS(\\\"Golang settings\\\", \\\"GOGC\\\", os.Getenv(\\\"GOGC\\\"), \\\"GOMAXPROCS\\\", os.Getenv(\\\"GOMAXPROCS\\\"), \\\"GOTRACEBACK\\\", os.Getenv(\\\"GOTRACEBACK\\\"))\\n\\n\\tconfig, err := NewConfig(opts)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tcompleted, err := config.Complete()\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tserver, err := CreateServerChain(completed)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tprepared, err := server.PrepareRun()\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn prepared.Run(ctx)\\n}\\n\\n// CreateServerChain creates the apiservers connected via delegation.\\nfunc CreateServerChain(config CompletedConfig) (*aggregatorapiserver.APIAggregator, error) {\\n\\tnotFoundHandler := notfoundhandler.New(config.KubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic.Serializer, genericapifilters.NoMuxAndDiscoveryIncompleteKey)\\n\\tapiExtensionsServer, err := config.ApiExtensions.New(genericapiserver.NewEmptyDelegateWithCustomHandler(notFoundHandler))\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tcrdAPIEnabled := config.ApiExtensions.GenericConfig.MergedResourceConfig.ResourceEnabled(apiextensionsv1.SchemeGroupVersion.WithResource(\\\"customresourcedefinitions\\\"))\\n\\n\\tkubeAPIServer, err := config.KubeAPIs.New(apiExtensionsServer.GenericAPIServer)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// aggregator comes last in the chain\\n\\taggregatorServer, err := controlplaneapiserver.CreateAggregatorServer(config.Aggregator, kubeAPIServer.ControlPlane.GenericAPIServer, apiExtensionsServer.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), crdAPIEnabled, apiVersionPriorities)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t// we don't need special handling for innerStopCh because the aggregator server doesn't create any go routines\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn aggregatorServer, nil\\n}\\n\\n// CreateKubeAPIServerConfig creates all the resources for running the API server, but runs none of them\\nfunc CreateKubeAPIServerConfig(\\n\\topts options.CompletedOptions,\\n\\tgenericConfig *genericapiserver.Config,\\n\\tversionedInformers clientgoinformers.SharedInformerFactory,\\n\\tstorageFactory *serverstorage.DefaultStorageFactory,\\n) (\\n\\t*controlplane.Config,\\n\\taggregatorapiserver.ServiceResolver,\\n\\t[]admission.PluginInitializer,\\n\\terror,\\n) {\\n\\t// global stuff\\n\\tcapabilities.Setup(opts.AllowPrivileged, opts.MaxConnectionBytesPerSec)\\n\\n\\t// additional admission initializers\\n\\tkubeAdmissionConfig := &kubeapiserveradmission.Config{}\\n\\tkubeInitializers, err := kubeAdmissionConfig.New()\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to create admission plugin initializer: %w\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tserviceResolver, err := buildServiceResolver(opts.EnableAggregatorRouting, genericConfig.LoopbackClientConfig.Host, versionedInformers)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error building service resolver: %w\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\tcontrolplaneConfig, admissionInitializers, err := controlplaneapiserver.CreateConfig(opts.CompletedOptions, genericConfig, versionedInformers, storageFactory, serviceResolver, kubeInitializers)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, nil, nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tconfig := &controlplane.Config{\\n\\t\\tControlPlane: *controlplaneConfig,\\n\\t\\tExtra: controlplane.Extra{\\n\\t\\t\\tKubeletClientConfig: opts.KubeletConfig,\\n\\n\\t\\t\\tServiceIPRange:          opts.PrimaryServiceClusterIPRange,\\n\\t\\t\\tAPIServerServiceIP:      opts.APIServerServiceIP,\\n\\t\\t\\tSecondaryServiceIPRange: opts.SecondaryServiceClusterIPRange,\\n\\n\\t\\t\\tAPIServerServicePort: 443,\\n\\n\\t\\t\\tServiceNodePortRange:      opts.ServiceNodePortRange,\\n\\t\\t\\tKubernetesServiceNodePort: opts.KubernetesServiceNodePort,\\n\\n\\t\\t\\tEndpointReconcilerType: reconcilers.Type(opts.EndpointReconcilerType),\\n\\t\\t\\tMasterCount:            opts.MasterCount,\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector != nil {\\n\\t\\t// Use the config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector lookup to find the dialer to connect to the kubelet\\n\\t\\tconfig.Extra.KubeletClientConfig.Lookup = config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector.Lookup\\n\\n\\t\\t// Use the config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector lookup as the transport used by the \\\"proxy\\\" subresources.\\n\\t\\tnetworkContext := egressselector.Cluster.AsNetworkContext()\\n\\t\\tdialer, err := config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector.Lookup(networkContext)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil, nil, nil, err\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tc := config.ControlPlane.Extra.ProxyTransport.Clone()\\n\\t\\tc.DialContext = dialer\\n\\t\\tconfig.ControlPlane.ProxyTransport = c\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn config, serviceResolver, admissionInitializers, nil\\n}\\n\\nvar testServiceResolver webhook.ServiceResolver\\n\\n// SetServiceResolverForTests allows the service resolver to be overridden during tests.\\n// Tests using this function must run serially as this function is not safe to call concurrently with server start.\\nfunc SetServiceResolverForTests(resolver webhook.ServiceResolver) func() {\\n\\tif testServiceResolver != nil {\\n\\t\\tpanic(\\\"test service resolver is set: tests are either running concurrently or clean up was skipped\\\")\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ttestServiceResolver = resolver\\n\\n\\treturn func() {\\n\\t\\ttestServiceResolver = nil\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\nfunc buildServiceResolver(enabledAggregatorRouting bool, hostname string, informer clientgoinformers.SharedInformerFactory) (webhook.ServiceResolver, error) {\\n\\tif testServiceResolver != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn testServiceResolver, nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tendpointSliceGetter, err := proxy.NewEndpointSliceIndexerGetter(informer.Discovery().V1().EndpointSlices())\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar serviceResolver webhook.ServiceResolver\\n\\tif enabledAggregatorRouting {\\n\\t\\tserviceResolver = aggregatorapiserver.NewEndpointServiceResolver(\\n\\t\\t\\tinformer.Core().V1().Services().Lister(),\\n\\t\\t\\tendpointSliceGetter,\\n\\t\\t)\\n\\t} else {\\n\\t\\tserviceResolver = aggregatorapiserver.NewClusterIPServiceResolver(\\n\\t\\t\\tinformer.Core().V1().Services().Lister(),\\n\\t\\t)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// resolve kubernetes.default.svc locally\\n\\tif localHost, err := url.Parse(hostname); err == nil {\\n\\t\\tserviceResolver = aggregatorapiserver.NewLoopbackServiceResolver(serviceResolver, localHost)\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn serviceResolver, nil\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"1fec8c65-662d-4957-af69-9db44023e4f4\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:48.991Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"4f6bf9f6-727f-43fa-8543-3d977b9bdfee\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"1fec8c65-662d-4957-af69-9db44023e4f4\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01KucyNP517ASGit1Hv8Jq3h\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01AhiZskMunTPpTv6KDwGBxT\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\n// Package app does all of the work necessary to create a Kubernetes\\n// APIServer by binding together the API, master and APIServer infrastructure.\\n// It can be configured and called directly or via the hyperkube framework.\\npackage app\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\tcontrolplaneapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/apiserver\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// The proper way to resolve this letting the aggregator know the desired group and version-within-group order of the underlying servers\\n// is to refactor the genericapiserver.DelegationTarget to include a list of priorities based on which APIs were installed.\\n// This requires the APIGroupInfo struct to evolve and include the concept of priorities and to avoid mistakes, the core storage map there needs to be updated.\\n// That ripples out every bit as far as you'd expect, so for 1.7 we'll include the list here instead of being built up during storage.\\nvar apiVersionPriorities = merge(controlplaneapiserver.DefaultGenericAPIServicePriorities(), map[schema.GroupVersion]controlplaneapiserver.APIServicePriority{\\n\\t{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}: {Group: 18000, Version: 1},\\n\\t// to my knowledge, nothing below here collides\\n\\t{Group: \\\"apps\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:                    {Group: 17800, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"autoscaling\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:             {Group: 17500, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"autoscaling\\\", Version: \\\"v2\\\"}:             {Group: 17500, Version: 30},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"autoscaling\\\", Version: \\\"v2beta1\\\"}:        {Group: 17500, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"autoscaling\\\", Version: \\\"v2beta2\\\"}:        {Group: 17500, Version: 1},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"batch\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:                   {Group: 17400, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"batch\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:              {Group: 17400, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"batch\\\", Version: \\\"v2alpha1\\\"}:             {Group: 17400, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"networking.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:       {Group: 17200, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"networking.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:  {Group: 17200, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"policy\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:                  {Group: 17100, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"policy\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:             {Group: 17100, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"storage.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:          {Group: 16800, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"storage.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:     {Group: 16800, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"storage.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1alpha1\\\"}:    {Group: 16800, Version: 1},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"scheduling.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:       {Group: 16600, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"scheduling.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1alpha1\\\"}: {Group: 16600, Version: 1},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"node.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:             {Group: 16300, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"node.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1alpha1\\\"}:       {Group: 16300, Version: 1},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"node.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:        {Group: 16300, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"resource.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:         {Group: 16200, Version: 21},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"resource.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta2\\\"}:    {Group: 16200, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"resource.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:    {Group: 16200, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"resource.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1alpha3\\\"}:   {Group: 16200, Version: 1},\\n\\t// Append a new group to the end of the list if unsure.\\n\\t// You can use min(existing group)-100 as the initial value for a group.\\n\\t// Version can be set to 9 (to have space around) for a new group.\\n})\\n\\nfunc merge(a, b map[schema.GroupVersion]controlplaneapiserver.APIServicePriority) map[schema.GroupVersion]controlplaneapiserver.APIServicePriority {\\n\\tfor k, v := range b {\\n\\t\\ta[k] = v\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn a\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"9357adf8-23db-48d5-958e-005ce35c3552\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:49.149Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"e8c8179a-9339-41f4-993f-6a7fd8ef9809\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"9357adf8-23db-48d5-958e-005ce35c3552\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01KucyNP517ASGit1Hv8Jq3h\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01Rt4RUjVsfYCvzqc8m7pk2f\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage app\\n\\nimport (\\n\\tapiextensionsapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook\\\"\\n\\taggregatorapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver/scheme\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/cmd/kube-apiserver/app/options\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/api/legacyscheme\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane\\\"\\n\\tcontrolplaneapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/apiserver\\\"\\n\\tgeneratedopenapi \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/generated/openapi\\\"\\n)\\n\\ntype Config struct {\\n\\tOptions options.CompletedOptions\\n\\n\\tAggregator    *aggregatorapiserver.Config\\n\\tKubeAPIs      *controlplane.Config\\n\\tApiExtensions *apiextensionsapiserver.Config\\n\\n\\tExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype ExtraConfig struct {\\n}\\n\\ntype completedConfig struct {\\n\\tOptions options.CompletedOptions\\n\\n\\tAggregator    aggregatorapiserver.CompletedConfig\\n\\tKubeAPIs      controlplane.CompletedConfig\\n\\tApiExtensions apiextensionsapiserver.CompletedConfig\\n\\n\\tExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype CompletedConfig struct {\\n\\t// Embed a private pointer that cannot be instantiated outside of this package.\\n\\t*completedConfig\\n}\\n\\nfunc (c *Config) Complete() (CompletedConfig, error) {\\n\\treturn CompletedConfig{&completedConfig{\\n\\t\\tOptions: c.Options,\\n\\n\\t\\tAggregator:    c.Aggregator.Complete(),\\n\\t\\tKubeAPIs:      c.KubeAPIs.Complete(),\\n\\t\\tApiExtensions: c.ApiExtensions.Complete(),\\n\\n\\t\\tExtraConfig: c.ExtraConfig,\\n\\t}}, nil\\n}\\n\\n// NewConfig creates all the resources for running kube-apiserver, but runs none of them.\\nfunc NewConfig(opts options.CompletedOptions) (*Config, error) {\\n\\tc := &Config{\\n\\t\\tOptions: opts,\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tgenericConfig, versionedInformers, storageFactory, err := controlplaneapiserver.BuildGenericConfig(\\n\\t\\topts.CompletedOptions,\\n\\t\\t[]*runtime.Scheme{legacyscheme.Scheme, apiextensionsapiserver.Scheme, aggregatorscheme.Scheme},\\n\\t\\tcontrolplane.DefaultAPIResourceConfigSource(),\\n\\t\\tgeneratedopenapi.GetOpenAPIDefinitions,\\n\\t)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tkubeAPIs, serviceResolver, pluginInitializer, err := CreateKubeAPIServerConfig(opts, genericConfig, versionedInformers, storageFactory)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tc.KubeAPIs = kubeAPIs\\n\\n\\tapiExtensions, err := controlplaneapiserver.CreateAPIExtensionsConfig(*kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.VersionedInformers, pluginInitializer, opts.CompletedOptions, opts.MasterCount,\\n\\t\\tserviceResolver, webhook.NewDefaultAuthenticationInfoResolverWrapper(kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.ProxyTransport, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic.LoopbackClientConfig, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic.TracerProvider))\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tc.ApiExtensions = apiExtensions\\n\\n\\taggregator, err := controlplaneapiserver.CreateAggregatorConfig(*kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic, opts.CompletedOptions, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.VersionedInformers, serviceResolver, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.ProxyTransport, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Extra.PeerProxy, pluginInitializer)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tc.Aggregator = aggregator\\n\\n\\treturn c, nil\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"94f8cc62-d9da-4f51-a797-8ebbfff53a80\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:49.319Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"b769cb4a-7343-4071-a4cd-53b046430672\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"94f8cc62-d9da-4f51-a797-8ebbfff53a80\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01JZFLE19LX2FKWU678XEiTK\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Excellent! License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage server\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"errors\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\tgpath \\\"path\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\tsystemd \\\"github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22/daemon\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"golang.org/x/time/rate\\\"\\n\\tapidiscoveryv2 \\\"k8s.io/api/apidiscovery/v2\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer/cbor\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/managedfields\\\"\\n\\tutilruntime \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait\\\"\\n\\tutilwaitgroup \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/waitgroup\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authorization/authorizer\\\"\\n\\tgenericapi \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery\\\"\\n\\tdiscoveryendpoint \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery/aggregated\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/rest\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/healthz\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/routes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/statusz\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storageversion\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\trestclient \\\"k8s.io/client-go/rest\\\"\\n\\tbasecompatibility \\\"k8s.io/component-base/compatibility\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/featuregate\\\"\\n\\tzpagesfeatures \\\"k8s.io/component-base/zpages/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n\\topenapibuilder3 \\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/builder3\\\"\\n\\topenapicommon \\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/common\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/handler\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/handler3\\\"\\n\\topenapiutil \\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/util\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/validation/spec\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// Info about an API group.\\ntype APIGroupInfo struct {\\n\\tPrioritizedVersions []schema.GroupVersion\\n\\t// Info about the resources in this group. It's a map from version to resource to the storage.\\n\\tVersionedResourcesStorageMap map[string]map[string]rest.Storage\\n\\t// OptionsExternalVersion controls the APIVersion used for common objects in the\\n\\t// schema like api.Status, api.DeleteOptions, and metav1.ListOptions. Other implementors may\\n\\t// define a version \\\"v1beta1\\\" but want to use the Kubernetes \\\"v1\\\" internal objects.\\n\\t// If nil, defaults to groupMeta.GroupVersion.\\n\\t// TODO: Remove this when https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/19018 is fixed.\\n\\tOptionsExternalVersion *schema.GroupVersion\\n\\t// MetaGroupVersion defaults to \\\"meta.k8s.io/v1\\\" and is the scheme group version used to decode\\n\\t// common API implementations like ListOptions. Future changes will allow this to vary by group\\n\\t// version (for when the inevitable meta/v2 group emerges).\\n\\tMetaGroupVersion *schema.GroupVersion\\n\\n\\t// Scheme includes all of the types used by this group and how to convert between them (or\\n\\t// to convert objects from outside of this group that are accepted in this API).\\n\\t// TODO: replace with interfaces\\n\\tScheme *runtime.Scheme\\n\\t// NegotiatedSerializer controls how this group encodes and decodes data\\n\\tNegotiatedSerializer runtime.NegotiatedSerializer\\n\\t// ParameterCodec performs conversions for query parameters passed to API calls\\n\\tParameterCodec runtime.ParameterCodec\\n\\n\\t// StaticOpenAPISpec is the spec derived from the definitions of all resources installed together.\\n\\t// It is set during InstallAPIGroups, InstallAPIGroup, and InstallLegacyAPIGroup.\\n\\tStaticOpenAPISpec map[string]*spec.Schema\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a *APIGroupInfo) destroyStorage() {\\n\\tfor _, stores := range a.VersionedResourcesStorageMap {\\n\\t\\tfor _, store := range stores {\\n\\t\\t\\tstore.Destroy()\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// GenericAPIServer contains state for a Kubernetes cluster api server.\\ntype GenericAPIServer struct {\\n\\t// discoveryAddresses is used to build cluster IPs for discovery.\\n\\tdiscoveryAddresses discovery.Addresses\\n\\n\\t// LoopbackClientConfig is a config for a privileged loopback connection to the API server\\n\\tLoopbackClientConfig *restclient.Config\\n\\n\\t// minRequestTimeout is how short the request timeout can be.  This is used to build the RESTHandler\\n\\tminRequestTimeout time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownTimeout is the timeout used for server shutdown. This specifies the timeout before server\\n\\t// gracefully shutdown returns.\\n\\tShutdownTimeout time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// legacyAPIGroupPrefixes is used to set up URL parsing for authorization and for validating requests\\n\\t// to InstallLegacyAPIGroup\\n\\tlegacyAPIGroupPrefixes sets.String\\n\\n\\t// admissionControl is used to build the RESTStorage that backs an API Group.\\n\\tadmissionControl admission.Interface\\n\\n\\t// SecureServingInfo holds configuration of the TLS server.\\n\\tSecureServingInfo *SecureServingInfo\\n\\n\\t// ExternalAddress is the address (hostname or IP and port) that should be used in\\n\\t// external (public internet) URLs for this GenericAPIServer.\\n\\tExternalAddress string\\n\\n\\t// Serializer controls how common API objects not in a group/version prefix are serialized for this server.\\n\\t// Individual APIGroups may define their own serializers.\\n\\tSerializer runtime.NegotiatedSerializer\\n\\n\\t// \\\"Outputs\\\"\\n\\t// Handler holds the handlers being used by this API server\\n\\tHandler *APIServerHandler\\n\\n\\t// UnprotectedDebugSocket is used to serve pprof information in a unix-domain socket. This socket is\\n\\t// not protected by authentication/authorization.\\n\\tUnprotectedDebugSocket *routes.DebugSocket\\n\\n\\t// listedPathProvider is a lister which provides the set of paths to show at /\\n\\tlistedPathProvider routes.ListedPathProvider\\n\\n\\t// DiscoveryGroupManager serves /apis in an unaggregated form.\\n\\tDiscoveryGroupManager discovery.GroupManager\\n\\n\\t// AggregatedDiscoveryGroupManager serves /apis in an aggregated form.\\n\\tAggregatedDiscoveryGroupManager discoveryendpoint.ResourceManager\\n\\n\\t// PeerAggregatedDiscoveryManager serves /apis aggregated from all peer apiservers.\\n\\tPeerAggregatedDiscoveryManager discoveryendpoint.PeerAggregatedResourceManager\\n\\n\\t// AggregatedLegacyDiscoveryGroupManager serves /api in an aggregated form.\\n\\tAggregatedLegacyDiscoveryGroupManager discoveryendpoint.ResourceManager\\n\\n\\t// Enable swagger and/or OpenAPI if these configs are non-nil.\\n\\topenAPIConfig *openapicommon.Config\\n\\n\\t// Enable swagger and/or OpenAPI V3 if these configs are non-nil.\\n\\topenAPIV3Config *openapicommon.OpenAPIV3Config\\n\\n\\t// SkipOpenAPIInstallation indicates not to install the OpenAPI handler\\n\\t// during PrepareRun.\\n\\t// Set this to true when the specific API Server has its own OpenAPI handler\\n\\t// (e.g. kube-aggregator)\\n\\tskipOpenAPIInstallation bool\\n\\n\\t// OpenAPIVersionedService controls the /openapi/v2 endpoint, and can be used to update the served spec.\\n\\t// It is set during PrepareRun if `openAPIConfig` is non-nil unless `skipOpenAPIInstallation` is true.\\n\\tOpenAPIVersionedService *handler.OpenAPIService\\n\\n\\t// OpenAPIV3VersionedService controls the /openapi/v3 endpoint and can be used to update the served spec.\\n\\t// It is set during PrepareRun if `openAPIConfig` is non-nil unless `skipOpenAPIInstallation` is true.\\n\\tOpenAPIV3VersionedService *handler3.OpenAPIService\\n\\n\\t// StaticOpenAPISpec is the spec derived from the restful container endpoints.\\n\\t// It is set during PrepareRun.\\n\\tStaticOpenAPISpec *spec.Swagger\\n\\n\\t// PostStartHooks are each called after the server has started listening, in a separate go func for each\\n\\t// with no guarantee of ordering between them.  The map key is a name used for error reporting.\\n\\t// It may kill the process with a panic if it wishes to by returning an error.\\n\\tpostStartHookLock      sync.Mutex\\n\\tpostStartHooks         map[string]postStartHookEntry\\n\\tpostStartHooksCalled   bool\\n\\tdisabledPostStartHooks sets.String\\n\\n\\tpreShutdownHookLock    sync.Mutex\\n\\tpreShutdownHooks       map[string]preShutdownHookEntry\\n\\tpreShutdownHooksCalled bool\\n\\n\\t// healthz checks\\n\\thealthzRegistry healthCheckRegistry\\n\\treadyzRegistry  healthCheckRegistry\\n\\tlivezRegistry   healthCheckRegistry\\n\\n\\tlivezGracePeriod time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// auditing. The backend is started before the server starts listening.\\n\\tAuditBackend audit.Backend\\n\\n\\t// Authorizer determines whether a user is allowed to make a certain request. The Handler does a preliminary\\n\\t// authorization check using the request URI but it may be necessary to make additional checks, such as in\\n\\t// the create-on-update case\\n\\tAuthorizer authorizer.Authorizer\\n\\n\\t// EquivalentResourceRegistry provides information about resources equivalent to a given resource,\\n\\t// and the kind associated with a given resource. As resources are installed, they are registered here.\\n\\tEquivalentResourceRegistry runtime.EquivalentResourceRegistry\\n\\n\\t// delegationTarget is the next delegate in the chain. This is never nil.\\n\\tdelegationTarget DelegationTarget\\n\\n\\t// NonLongRunningRequestWaitGroup allows you to wait for all chain\\n\\t// handlers associated with non long-running requests\\n\\t// to complete while the server is shuting down.\\n\\tNonLongRunningRequestWaitGroup *utilwaitgroup.SafeWaitGroup\\n\\t// WatchRequestWaitGroup allows us to wait for all chain\\n\\t// handlers associated with active watch requests to\\n\\t// complete while the server is shuting down.\\n\\tWatchRequestWaitGroup *utilwaitgroup.RateLimitedSafeWaitGroup\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownDelayDuration allows to block shutdown for some time, e.g. until endpoints pointing to this API server\\n\\t// have converged on all node. During this time, the API server keeps serving, /healthz will return 200,\\n\\t// but /readyz will return failure.\\n\\tShutdownDelayDuration time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// The limit on the request body size that would be accepted and decoded in a write request.\\n\\t// 0 means no limit.\\n\\tmaxRequestBodyBytes int64\\n\\n\\t// APIServerID is the ID of this API server\\n\\tAPIServerID string\\n\\n\\t// StorageReadinessHook implements post-start-hook functionality for checking readiness\\n\\t// of underlying storage for registered resources.\\n\\tStorageReadinessHook *StorageReadinessHook\\n\\n\\t// StorageVersionManager holds the storage versions of the API resources installed by this server.\\n\\tStorageVersionManager storageversion.Manager\\n\\n\\t// EffectiveVersion determines which apis and features are available\\n\\t// based on when the api/feature lifecyle.\\n\\tEffectiveVersion basecompatibility.EffectiveVersion\\n\\t// EmulationForwardCompatible is an option to implicitly enable all APIs which are introduced after the emulation version and\\n\\t// have higher priority than APIs of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version.\\n\\t// If true, all APIs that have higher priority than the APIs(beta+) of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version will be installed.\\n\\t// This is needed when a controller implementation migrates to newer API versions, for the binary version, and also uses the newer API versions even when emulation version is set.\\n\\t// Not applicable to alpha APIs.\\n\\tEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n\\t// RuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible is an option to explicitly enable specific APIs introduced after the emulation version through the runtime-config.\\n\\t// If true, APIs identified by group/version that are enabled in the --runtime-config flag will be installed even if it is introduced after the emulation version. --runtime-config flag values that identify multiple APIs, such as api/all,api/ga,api/beta, are not influenced by this flag and will only enable APIs available at the current emulation version.\\n\\t// If false, error would be thrown if any GroupVersion or GroupVersionResource explicitly enabled in the --runtime-config flag is introduced after the emulation version.\\n\\tRuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n\\n\\t// FeatureGate is a way to plumb feature gate through if you have them.\\n\\tFeatureGate featuregate.FeatureGate\\n\\n\\t// lifecycleSignals provides access to the various signals that happen during the life cycle of the apiserver.\\n\\tlifecycleSignals lifecycleSignals\\n\\n\\t// destroyFns contains a list of functions that should be called on shutdown to clean up resources.\\n\\tdestroyFns []func()\\n\\n\\t// muxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignals holds signals that indicate all known HTTP paths have been registered.\\n\\t// it exists primarily to avoid returning a 404 response when a resource actually exists but we haven't installed the path to a handler.\\n\\t// it is exposed for easier composition of the individual servers.\\n\\t// the primary users of this field are the WithMuxCompleteProtection filter and the NotFoundHandler\\n\\tmuxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignals map[string]<-chan struct{}\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownSendRetryAfter dictates when to initiate shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server during the graceful termination of the apiserver. If true, we wait\\n\\t// for non longrunning requests in flight to be drained and then initiate a\\n\\t// shutdown of the HTTP Server. If false, we initiate a shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server as soon as ShutdownDelayDuration has elapsed.\\n\\t// If enabled, after ShutdownDelayDuration elapses, any incoming request is\\n\\t// rejected with a 429 status code and a 'Retry-After' response.\\n\\tShutdownSendRetryAfter bool\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod, if set to a positive value,\\n\\t// is the maximum duration the apiserver will wait for all active\\n\\t// watch request(s) to drain.\\n\\t// Once this grace period elapses, the apiserver will no longer\\n\\t// wait for any active watch request(s) in flight to drain, it will\\n\\t// proceed to the next step in the graceful server shutdown process.\\n\\t// If set to a positive value, the apiserver will keep track of the\\n\\t// number of active watch request(s) in flight and during shutdown\\n\\t// it will wait, at most, for the specified duration and allow these\\n\\t// active watch requests to drain with some rate limiting in effect.\\n\\t// The default is zero, which implies the apiserver will not keep\\n\\t// track of active watch request(s) in flight and will not wait\\n\\t// for them to drain, this maintains backward compatibility.\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"3019abab-fd68-4bfa-9dd0-f7c018e292f7\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:52.399Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"33dc71de-4b5a-4c92-9103-6f9d1c9a8902\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"3019abab-fd68-4bfa-9dd0-f7c018e292f7\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_015PeXCuPrwiZnZ5E8qRry3U\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01QaYQQVm8vSKVRj1jQCcLnx\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/genericapiserver.go | grep -A 30 \\\"type DelegationTarget\\\"\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":4,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":4242,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":50029,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":4242},\"output_tokens\":26,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2xx2xy9zigqXuDweSp\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"948da0a7-b137-4dd0-968e-6d1a0b732739\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:54.045Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"948da0a7-b137-4dd0-968e-6d1a0b732739\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01QaYQQVm8vSKVRj1jQCcLnx\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"type DelegationTarget interface {\\n\\t// UnprotectedHandler returns a handler that is NOT protected by a normal chain\\n\\tUnprotectedHandler() http.Handler\\n\\n\\t// PostStartHooks returns the post-start hooks that need to be combined\\n\\tPostStartHooks() map[string]postStartHookEntry\\n\\n\\t// PreShutdownHooks returns the pre-stop hooks that need to be combined\\n\\tPreShutdownHooks() map[string]preShutdownHookEntry\\n\\n\\t// HealthzChecks returns the healthz checks that need to be combined\\n\\tHealthzChecks() []healthz.HealthChecker\\n\\n\\t// ListedPaths returns the paths for supporting an index\\n\\tListedPaths() []string\\n\\n\\t// NextDelegate returns the next delegationTarget in the chain of delegations\\n\\tNextDelegate() DelegationTarget\\n\\n\\t// PrepareRun does post API installation setup steps. It calls recursively the same function of the delegates.\\n\\tPrepareRun() preparedGenericAPIServer\\n\\n\\t// MuxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignals exposes registered signals that indicate if all known HTTP paths have been installed.\\n\\tMuxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignals() map[string]<-chan struct{}\\n\\n\\t// Destroy cleans up its resources on shutdown.\\n\\t// Destroy has to be implemented in thread-safe way and be prepared\\n\\t// for being called more than once.\\n\\tDestroy()\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"681b5d51-5294-4b48-8572-93c799e7c483\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:54.061Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"948da0a7-b137-4dd0-968e-6d1a0b732739\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"681b5d51-5294-4b48-8572-93c799e7c483\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_015PeXCuPrwiZnZ5E8qRry3U\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01XnAnN9qypa4DehND5PCaHz\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git preparedGenericAPIServer struct {\\n\\t*GenericAPIServer\\n}\\n\\n// PrepareRun does post API installation setup steps. It calls recursively the same function of the delegates.\\nfunc (s *GenericAPIServer) PrepareRun() preparedGenericAPIServer {\\n\\ts.delegationTarget.PrepareRun()\\n\\n\\tif s.openAPIConfig != nil && !s.skipOpenAPIInstallation {\\n\\t\\ts.OpenAPIVersionedService, s.StaticOpenAPISpec = routes.OpenAPI{\\n\\t\\t\\tConfig: s.openAPIConfig,\\n\\t\\t}.InstallV2(s.Handler.GoRestfulContainer, s.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif s.openAPIV3Config != nil && !s.skipOpenAPIInstallation {\\n\\t\\ts.OpenAPIV3VersionedService = routes.OpenAPI{\\n\\t\\t\\tV3Config: s.openAPIV3Config,\\n\\t\\t}.InstallV3(s.Handler.GoRestfulContainer, s.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ts.installHealthz()\\n\\ts.installLivez()\\n\\n\\t// as soon as shutdown is initiated, readiness should start failing\\n\\treadinessStopCh := s.lifecycleSignals.ShutdownInitiated.Signaled()\\n\\terr := s.addReadyzShutdownCheck(readinessStopCh)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\tklog.Errorf(\\\"Failed to install readyz shutdown check %s\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\ts.installReadyz()\\n\\n\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(zpagesfeatures.ComponentStatusz) {\\n\\t\\tstatusz.Install(s.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux, \\\"apiserver\\\", statusz.NewRegistry(s.EffectiveVersion, statusz.WithListedPaths(s.ListedPaths())))\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn preparedGenericAPIServer{s}\\n}\\n\\n// Run spawns the secure http server. It only returns if stopCh is closed\\n// or the secure port cannot be listened on initially.\\n//\\n// Deprecated: use RunWithContext instead. Run will not get removed to avoid\\n// breaking consumers, but should not be used in new code.\\nfunc (s preparedGenericAPIServer) Run(stopCh <-chan struct{}) error {\\n\\tctx := wait.ContextForChannel(stopCh)\\n\\treturn s.RunWithContext(ctx)\\n}\\n\\n// RunWithContext spawns the secure http server. It only returns if ctx is canceled\\n// or the secure port cannot be listened on initially.\\n// This is the diagram of what contexts/channels/signals are dependent on each other:\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"58c01950-133f-45d0-8c9c-18a369ae623e\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:54.384Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"288669e1-24eb-45d2-8871-e5801273d988\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"58c01950-133f-45d0-8c9c-18a369ae623e\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0116pSbHyXUDQRoLBjaXfAxK\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now
