2016 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage apiserver\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\tapierrors \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery/aggregated\\\"\\n\\tgenericfeatures \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/features\\\"\\n\\tpeerreconcilers \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/reconcilers\\\"\\n\\tgenericapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/dynamiccertificates\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/egressselector\\\"\\n\\tserverstorage \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/storage\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\tutilpeerproxy \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/peerproxy\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/transport\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/legacyregistry\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/tracing\\\"\\n\\tv1 \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apis/apiregistration/v1\\\"\\n\\tv1helper \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apis/apiregistration/v1/helper\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apis/apiregistration/v1beta1\\\"\\n\\taggregatorscheme \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver/scheme\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/client/clientset_generated/clientset\\\"\\n\\tinformers \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/client/informers/externalversions\\\"\\n\\tlisters \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/client/listers/apiregistration/v1\\\"\\n\\topenapicontroller \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/openapi\\\"\\n\\topenapiaggregator \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/openapi/aggregator\\\"\\n\\topenapiv3controller \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/openapiv3\\\"\\n\\topenapiv3aggregator \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/openapiv3/aggregator\\\"\\n\\tlocalavailability \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/status/local\\\"\\n\\tavailabilitymetrics \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/status/metrics\\\"\\n\\tremoteavailability \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/status/remote\\\"\\n\\tapiservicerest \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/registry/apiservice/rest\\\"\\n\\topenapicommon \\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/common\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// making sure we only register metrics once into legacy registry\\nvar registerIntoLegacyRegistryOnce sync.Once\\n\\nfunc init() {\\n\\t// we need to add the options (like ListOptions) to empty v1\\n\\tmetav1.AddToGroupVersion(aggregatorscheme.Scheme, schema.GroupVersion{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"})\\n\\n\\tunversioned := schema.GroupVersion{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}\\n\\taggregatorscheme.Scheme.AddUnversionedTypes(unversioned,\\n\\t\\t&metav1.Status{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIVersions{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIGroupList{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIGroup{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIResourceList{},\\n\\t)\\n}\\n\\nconst (\\n\\t// legacyAPIServiceName is the fixed name of the only non-groupified API version\\n\\tlegacyAPIServiceName = \\\"v1.\\\"\\n\\t// StorageVersionPostStartHookName is the name of the storage version updater post start hook.\\n\\tStorageVersionPostStartHookName = \\\"built-in-resources-storage-version-updater\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// ExtraConfig represents APIServices-specific configuration\\ntype ExtraConfig struct {\\n\\t// PeerAdvertiseAddress is the IP for this kube-apiserver which is used by peer apiservers to route a request\\n\\t// to this apiserver. This happens in cases where the peer is not able to serve the request due to\\n\\t// version skew. If unset, AdvertiseAddress/BindAddress will be used.\\n\\tPeerAdvertiseAddress peerreconcilers.PeerAdvertiseAddress\\n\\n\\t// ProxyClientCert/Key are the client cert used to identify this proxy. Backing APIServices use\\n\\t// this to confirm the proxy's identity\\n\\tProxyClientCertFile string\\n\\tProxyClientKeyFile  string\\n\\n\\t// If present, the Dial method will be used for dialing out to delegate\\n\\t// apiservers.\\n\\tProxyTransport *http.Transport\\n\\n\\t// Mechanism by which the Aggregator will resolve services. Required.\\n\\tServiceResolver ServiceResolver\\n\\n\\tRejectForwardingRedirects bool\\n\\n\\t// DisableRemoteAvailableConditionController disables the controller that updates the Available conditions for\\n\\t// remote APIServices via querying endpoints of the referenced services. In generic controlplane use-cases,\\n\\t// the concept of services and endpoints might differ, and might require another implementation of this\\n\\t// controller. Local APIService are reconciled nevertheless.\\n\\tDisableRemoteAvailableConditionController bool\\n\\n\\t// PeerProxy, if not nil, sets proxy transport between kube-apiserver peers for requests\\n\\t// that can not be served locally\\n\\tPeerProxy utilpeerproxy.Interface\\n}\\n\\n// Config represents the configuration needed to create an APIAggregator.\\ntype Config struct {\\n\\tGenericConfig *genericapiserver.RecommendedConfig\\n\\tExtraConfig   ExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype completedConfig struct {\\n\\tGenericConfig genericapiserver.CompletedConfig\\n\\tExtraConfig   *ExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\n// CompletedConfig same as Config, just to swap private object.\\ntype CompletedConfig struct {\\n\\t// Embed a private pointer that cannot be instantiated outside of this package.\\n\\t*completedConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype runnable interface {\\n\\tRunWithContext(ctx context.Context) error\\n}\\n\\n// preparedGenericAPIServer is a private wrapper that enforces a call of PrepareRun() before Run can be invoked.\\ntype preparedAPIAggregator struct {\\n\\t*APIAggregator\\n\\trunnable runnable\\n}\\n\\n// APIAggregator contains state for a Kubernetes cluster master/api server.\\ntype APIAggregator struct {\\n\\tGenericAPIServer *genericapiserver.GenericAPIServer\\n\\n\\t// provided for easier embedding\\n\\tAPIRegistrationInformers informers.SharedInformerFactory\\n\\n\\tdelegateHandler http.Handler\\n\\n\\t// proxyCurrentCertKeyContent holds he client cert used to identify this proxy. Backing APIServices use this to confirm the proxy's identity\\n\\tproxyCurrentCertKeyContent certKeyFunc\\n\\tproxyTransportDial         *transport.DialHolder\\n\\n\\t// proxyHandlers are the proxy handlers that are currently registered, keyed by apiservice.name\\n\\tproxyHandlers map[string]*proxyHandler\\n\\t// handledGroupVersions contain the groups that already have routes. The key is the name of the group and the value\\n\\t// is the versions for the group.\\n\\thandledGroupVersions map[string]sets.Set[string]\\n\\n\\t// lister is used to add group handling for /apis/<group> aggregator lookups based on\\n\\t// controller state\\n\\tlister listers.APIServiceLister\\n\\n\\t// Information needed to determine routing for the aggregator\\n\\tserviceResolver ServiceResolver\\n\\n\\t// Enable swagger and/or OpenAPI if these configs are non-nil.\\n\\topenAPIConfig *openapicommon.Config\\n\\n\\t// Enable OpenAPI V3 if these configs are non-nil\\n\\topenAPIV3Config *openapicommon.OpenAPIV3Config\\n\\n\\t// openAPIAggregationController downloads and merges OpenAPI v2 specs.\\n\\topenAPIAggregationController *openapicontroller.AggregationController\\n\\n\\t// openAPIV3AggregationController downloads and caches OpenAPI v3 specs.\\n\\topenAPIV3AggregationController *openapiv3controller.AggregationController\\n\\n\\t// discoveryAggregationController downloads and caches discovery documents\\n\\t// from all aggregated apiservices so they are available from /apis endpoint\\n\\t// when discovery with resources are requested\\n\\tdiscoveryAggregationController DiscoveryAggregationController\\n\\n\\t// rejectForwardingRedirects is whether to allow to forward redirect response\\n\\trejectForwardingRedirects bool\\n\\n\\t// tracerProvider is used to wrap the proxy transport and handler with tracing\\n\\ttracerProvider tracing.TracerProvider\\n}\\n\\n// Complete fills in any fields not set that are required to have valid data. It's mutating the receiver.\\nfunc (cfg *Config) Complete() CompletedConfig {\\n\\tc := completedConfig{\\n\\t\\tcfg.GenericConfig.Complete(),\\n\\t\\t&cfg.ExtraConfig,\\n\\t}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"014ee058-710e-4c77-822f-7351a227d8e8\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:55.751Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"0a8c3ede-62ca-40f4-85d9-4e7215b0fa19\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"014ee058-710e-4c77-822f-7351a227d8e8\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0116pSbHyXUDQRoLBjaXfAxK\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01RSBwqhLhtqGmgGYY3UkzWY\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/install\\\"\\n\\tv1 \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/client/informers/externalversions\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/apiapproval\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/establish\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/finalizer\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/nonstructuralschema\\\"\\n\\topenapicontroller \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi\\\"\\n\\topenapiv3controller \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/status\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/registry/customresourcedefinition\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery/aggregated\\\"\\n\\tgenericregistry \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/generic\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/rest\\\"\\n\\tgenericapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\tserverstorage \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/storage\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\nvar (\\n\\tScheme = runtime.NewScheme()\\n\\tCodecs = serializer.NewCodecFactory(Scheme)\\n\\n\\t// if you modify this, make sure you update the crEncoder\\n\\tunversionedVersion = schema.GroupVersion{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}\\n\\tunversionedTypes   = []runtime.Object{\\n\\t\\t&metav1.Status{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.WatchEvent{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIVersions{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIGroupList{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIGroup{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIResourceList{},\\n\\t}\\n)\\n\\nfunc init() {\\n\\tinstall.Install(Scheme)\\n\\n\\t// we need to add the options to empty v1\\n\\tmetav1.AddToGroupVersion(Scheme, schema.GroupVersion{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"})\\n\\n\\tScheme.AddUnversionedTypes(unversionedVersion, unversionedTypes...)\\n}\\n\\ntype ExtraConfig struct {\\n\\tCRDRESTOptionsGetter genericregistry.RESTOptionsGetter\\n\\n\\t// MasterCount is used to detect whether cluster is HA, and if it is\\n\\t// the CRD Establishing will be hold by 5 seconds.\\n\\tMasterCount int\\n\\n\\t// ServiceResolver is used in CR webhook converters to resolve webhook's service names\\n\\tServiceResolver webhook.ServiceResolver\\n\\t// AuthResolverWrapper is used in CR webhook converters\\n\\tAuthResolverWrapper webhook.AuthenticationInfoResolverWrapper\\n}\\n\\ntype Config struct {\\n\\tGenericConfig *genericapiserver.RecommendedConfig\\n\\tExtraConfig   ExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype completedConfig struct {\\n\\tGenericConfig genericapiserver.CompletedConfig\\n\\tExtraConfig   *ExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype CompletedConfig struct {\\n\\t// Embed a private pointer that cannot be instantiated outside of this package.\\n\\t*completedConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype CustomResourceDefinitions struct {\\n\\tGenericAPIServer *genericapiserver.GenericAPIServer\\n\\n\\t// provided for easier embedding\\n\\tInformers externalinformers.SharedInformerFactory\\n}\\n\\n// Complete fills in any fields not set that are required to have valid data. It's mutating the receiver.\\nfunc (cfg *Config) Complete() CompletedConfig {\\n\\tc := completedConfig{\\n\\t\\tcfg.GenericConfig.Complete(),\\n\\t\\t&cfg.ExtraConfig,\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tc.GenericConfig.EnableDiscovery = false\\n\\n\\treturn CompletedConfig{&c}\\n}\\n\\n// New returns a new instance of CustomResourceDefinitions from the given config.\\nfunc (c completedConfig) New(delegationTarget genericapiserver.DelegationTarget) (*CustomResourceDefinitions, error) {\\n\\tgenericServer, err := c.GenericConfig.New(\\\"apiextensions-apiserver\\\", delegationTarget)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// hasCRDInformerSyncedSignal is closed when the CRD informer this server uses has been fully synchronized.\\n\\t// It ensures that requests to potential custom resource endpoints while the server hasn't installed all known HTTP paths get a 503 error instead of a 404\\n\\thasCRDInformerSyncedSignal := make(chan struct{})\\n\\tif err := genericServer.RegisterMuxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignal(\\\"CRDInformerHasNotSynced\\\", hasCRDInformerSyncedSignal); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ts := &CustomResourceDefinitions{\\n\\t\\tGenericAPIServer: genericServer,\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tapiResourceConfig := c.GenericConfig.MergedResourceConfig\\n\\tapiGroupInfo := genericapiserver.NewDefaultAPIGroupInfo(apiextensions.GroupName, Scheme, metav1.ParameterCodec, Codecs)\\n\\tstorage := map[string]rest.Storage{}\\n\\t// customresourcedefinitions\\n\\tif resource := \\\"customresourcedefinitions\\\"; apiResourceConfig.ResourceEnabled(v1.SchemeGroupVersion.WithResource(resource)) {\\n\\t\\tcustomResourceDefinitionStorage, err := customresourcedefinition.NewREST(Scheme, c.GenericConfig.RESTOptionsGetter)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tstorage[resource] = customResourceDefinitionStorage\\n\\t\\tstorage[resource+\\\"/status\\\"] = customresourcedefinition.NewStatusREST(Scheme, customResourceDefinitionStorage)\\n\\t}\\n\\tif len(storage) > 0 {\\n\\t\\tapiGroupInfo.VersionedResourcesStorageMap[v1.SchemeGroupVersion.Version] = storage\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif err := s.GenericAPIServer.InstallAPIGroup(&apiGroupInfo); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tcrdClient, err := clientset.NewForConfig(s.GenericAPIServer.LoopbackClientConfig)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t// it's really bad that this is leaking here, but until we can fix the test (which I'm pretty sure isn't even testing what it wants to test),\\n\\t\\t// we need to be able to move forward\\n\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to create clientset: %v\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\ts.Informers = externalinformers.NewSharedInformerFactory(crdClient, 5*time.Minute)\\n\\n\\tdelegateHandler := delegationTarget.UnprotectedHandler()\\n\\tif delegateHandler == nil {\\n\\t\\tdelegateHandler = http.NotFoundHandler()\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tversionDiscoveryHandler := &versionDiscoveryHandler{\\n\\t\\tdiscovery: map[schema.GroupVersion]*discovery.APIVersionHandler{},\\n\\t\\tdelegate:  delegateHandler,\\n\\t}\\n\\tgroupDiscoveryHandler := &groupDiscoveryHandler{\\n\\t\\tdiscovery: map[string]*discovery.APIGroupHandler{},\\n\\t\\tdelegate:  delegateHandler,\\n\\t}\\n\\testablishingController := establish.NewEstablishingController(s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), crdClient.ApiextensionsV1())\\n\\tcrdHandler, err := NewCustomResourceDefinitionHandler(\\n\\t\\tversionDiscoveryHandler,\\n\\t\\tgroupDiscoveryHandler,\\n\\t\\ts.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(),\\n\\t\\tdelegateHandler,\\n\\t\\tc.ExtraConfig.CRDRESTOptionsGetter,\\n\\t\\tc.GenericConfig.AdmissionControl,\\n\\t\\testablishingController,\\n\\t\\tc.ExtraConfig.ServiceResolver,\\n\\t\\tc.ExtraConfig.AuthResolverWrapper,\\n\\t\\tc.ExtraConfig.MasterCount,\\n\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.Authorizer,\\n\\t\\tc.GenericConfig.RequestTimeout,\\n\\t\\ttime.Duration(c.GenericConfig.MinRequestTimeout)*time.Second,\\n\\t\\tapiGroupInfo.StaticOpenAPISpec,\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"b93606cd-2e77-4367-9a95-befda7e0dbb5\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:55.997Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"2d580809-2833-4276-9a4a-5dadc4e2f2ea\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"b93606cd-2e77-4367-9a95-befda7e0dbb5\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01GBdPnTPtbxLDWHxJH5roKM\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage healthz\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"bytes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"reflect\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync/atomic\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/metrics\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/httplog\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/prometheus/slis\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst DefaultHealthzPath = \\\"/healthz\\\"\\n\\n// HealthChecker is a named healthz checker.\\ntype HealthChecker interface {\\n\\tName() string\\n\\tCheck(req *http.Request) error\\n}\\n\\ntype GroupedHealthChecker interface {\\n\\tHealthChecker\\n\\tGroupName() string\\n}\\n\\n// PingHealthz returns true automatically when checked\\nvar PingHealthz HealthChecker = ping{}\\n\\n// ping implements the simplest possible healthz checker.\\ntype ping struct{}\\n\\nfunc (ping) Name() string {\\n\\treturn \\\"ping\\\"\\n}\\n\\n// PingHealthz is a health check that returns true.\\nfunc (ping) Check(_ *http.Request) error {\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// LogHealthz returns true if logging is not blocked\\nvar LogHealthz HealthChecker = &log{}\\n\\ntype log struct {\\n\\tstartOnce    sync.Once\\n\\tlastVerified atomic.Value\\n}\\n\\nfunc (l *log) Name() string {\\n\\treturn \\\"log\\\"\\n}\\n\\nfunc (l *log) Check(_ *http.Request) error {\\n\\tl.startOnce.Do(func() {\\n\\t\\tl.lastVerified.Store(time.Now())\\n\\t\\tgo wait.Forever(func() {\\n\\t\\t\\tklog.Flush()\\n\\t\\t\\tl.lastVerified.Store(time.Now())\\n\\t\\t}, time.Minute)\\n\\t})\\n\\n\\tlastVerified := l.lastVerified.Load().(time.Time)\\n\\tif time.Since(lastVerified) < (2 * time.Minute) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"logging blocked\\\")\\n}\\n\\ntype cacheSyncWaiter interface {\\n\\tWaitForCacheSync(stopCh <-chan struct{}) map[reflect.Type]bool\\n}\\n\\ntype informerSync struct {\\n\\tcacheSyncWaiter cacheSyncWaiter\\n}\\n\\nvar _ HealthChecker = &informerSync{}\\n\\n// NewInformerSyncHealthz returns a new HealthChecker that will pass only if all informers in the given cacheSyncWaiter sync.\\nfunc NewInformerSyncHealthz(cacheSyncWaiter cacheSyncWaiter) HealthChecker {\\n\\treturn &informerSync{\\n\\t\\tcacheSyncWaiter: cacheSyncWaiter,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\nfunc (i *informerSync) Name() string {\\n\\treturn \\\"informer-sync\\\"\\n}\\n\\ntype shutdown struct {\\n\\tstopCh <-chan struct{}\\n}\\n\\n// NewShutdownHealthz returns a new HealthChecker that will fail if the embedded channel is closed.\\n// This is intended to allow for graceful shutdown sequences.\\nfunc NewShutdownHealthz(stopCh <-chan struct{}) HealthChecker {\\n\\treturn &shutdown{stopCh}\\n}\\n\\nfunc (s *shutdown) Name() string {\\n\\treturn \\\"shutdown\\\"\\n}\\n\\nfunc (s *shutdown) Check(req *http.Request) error {\\n\\tselect {\\n\\tcase <-s.stopCh:\\n\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"process is shutting down\\\")\\n\\tdefault:\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\nfunc (i *informerSync) Check(_ *http.Request) error {\\n\\tstopCh := make(chan struct{})\\n\\t// Close stopCh to force checking if informers are synced now.\\n\\tclose(stopCh)\\n\\n\\tinformersByStarted := make(map[bool][]string)\\n\\tfor informerType, started := range i.cacheSyncWaiter.WaitForCacheSync(stopCh) {\\n\\t\\tinformersByStarted[started] = append(informersByStarted[started], informerType.String())\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif notStarted := informersByStarted[false]; len(notStarted) > 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"%d informers not started yet: %v\\\", len(notStarted), notStarted)\\n\\t}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"7c3ef828-1f1c-4241-9b75-dcbaaeacf281\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:58.006Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"48d75728-4e96-4e65-867c-b8c7408c0a84\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"7c3ef828-1f1c-4241-9b75-dcbaaeacf281\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01GBdPnTPtbxLDWHxJH5roKM\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_015nTbpNKxVAmHRPudVXxB1k\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"ls 2016 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage options\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net\\\"\\n\\t\\\"regexp\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/errors\\\"\\n\\tutilruntime \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/compatibility\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\tbasecompatibility \\\"k8s.io/component-base/compatibility\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"github.com/spf13/pflag\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\tcorsAllowedOriginsHelpText = \\\"List of allowed origins for CORS, comma separated. \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"An allowed origin can be a regular expression to support subdomain matching. \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"If this list is empty CORS will not be enabled. \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"Please ensure each expression matches the entire hostname by anchoring \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"to the start with '^' or including the '//' prefix, and by anchoring to the \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"end with '$' or including the ':' port separator suffix. \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"Examples of valid expressions are '//example\\\\\\\\.com(:|$)' and '^https://example\\\\\\\\.com(:|$)'\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// ServerRunOptions contains the options while running a generic api server.\\ntype ServerRunOptions struct {\\n\\tAdvertiseAddress net.IP\\n\\n\\tCorsAllowedOriginList        []string\\n\\tHSTSDirectives               []string\\n\\tExternalHost                 string\\n\\tMaxRequestsInFlight          int\\n\\tMaxMutatingRequestsInFlight  int\\n\\tRequestTimeout               time.Duration\\n\\tGoawayChance                 float64\\n\\tLivezGracePeriod             time.Duration\\n\\tMinRequestTimeout            int\\n\\tStorageInitializationTimeout time.Duration\\n\\tShutdownDelayDuration        time.Duration\\n\\t// We intentionally did not add a flag for this option. Users of the\\n\\t// apiserver library can wire it to a flag.\\n\\tJSONPatchMaxCopyBytes int64\\n\\t// The limit on the request body size that would be accepted and\\n\\t// decoded in a write request. 0 means no limit.\\n\\t// We intentionally did not add a flag for this option. Users of the\\n\\t// apiserver library can wire it to a flag.\\n\\tMaxRequestBodyBytes int64\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownSendRetryAfter dictates when to initiate shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server during the graceful termination of the apiserver. If true, we wait\\n\\t// for non longrunning requests in flight to be drained and then initiate a\\n\\t// shutdown of the HTTP Server. If false, we initiate a shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server as soon as ShutdownDelayDuration has elapsed.\\n\\t// If enabled, after ShutdownDelayDuration elapses, any incoming request is\\n\\t// rejected with a 429 status code and a 'Retry-After' response.\\n\\tShutdownSendRetryAfter bool\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod, if set to a positive value,\\n\\t// is the maximum duration the apiserver will wait for all active\\n\\t// watch request(s) to drain.\\n\\t// Once this grace period elapses, the apiserver will no longer\\n\\t// wait for any active watch request(s) in flight to drain, it will\\n\\t// proceed to the next step in the graceful server shutdown process.\\n\\t// If set to a positive value, the apiserver will keep track of the\\n\\t// number of active watch request(s) in flight and during shutdown\\n\\t// it will wait, at most, for the specified duration and allow these\\n\\t// active watch requests to drain with some rate limiting in effect.\\n\\t// The default is zero, which implies the apiserver will not keep\\n\\t// track of active watch request(s) in flight and will not wait\\n\\t// for them to drain, this maintains backward compatibility.\\n\\t// This grace period is orthogonal to other grace periods, and\\n\\t// it is not overridden by any other grace period.\\n\\tShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// ComponentGlobalsRegistry is the registry where the effective versions and feature gates for all components are stored.\\n\\tComponentGlobalsRegistry basecompatibility.ComponentGlobalsRegistry\\n\\t// ComponentName is name under which the server's global variabled are registered in the ComponentGlobalsRegistry.\\n\\tComponentName string\\n\\t// EmulationForwardCompatible is an option to implicitly enable all APIs which are introduced after the emulation version and\\n\\t// have higher priority than APIs of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version.\\n\\t// If true, all APIs that have higher priority than the APIs(beta+) of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version will be installed.\\n\\t// This is needed when a controller implementation migrates to newer API versions, for the binary version, and also uses the newer API versions even when emulation version is set.\\n\\t// Not applicable to alpha APIs.\\n\\tEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n\\t// RuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible is an option to explicitly enable specific APIs introduced after the emulation version through the runtime-config.\\n\\t// If true, APIs identified by group/version that are enabled in the --runtime-config flag will be installed even if it is introduced after the emulation version. --runtime-config flag values that identify multiple APIs, such as api/all,api/ga,api/beta, are not influenced by this flag and will only enable APIs available at the current emulation version.\\n\\t// If false, error would be thrown if any GroupVersion or GroupVersionResource explicitly enabled in the --runtime-config flag is introduced after the emulation version.\\n\\tRuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n}\\n\\nfunc NewServerRunOptions() *ServerRunOptions {\\n\\tif compatibility.DefaultComponentGlobalsRegistry.EffectiveVersionFor(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent) == nil {\\n\\t\\tfeatureGate := utilfeature.DefaultMutableFeatureGate\\n\\t\\teffectiveVersion := compatibility.DefaultBuildEffectiveVersion()\\n\\t\\tutilruntime.Must(compatibility.DefaultComponentGlobalsRegistry.Register(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent, effectiveVersion, featureGate))\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn NewServerRunOptionsForComponent(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent, compatibility.DefaultComponentGlobalsRegistry)\\n}\\n\\nfunc NewServerRunOptionsForComponent(componentName string, componentGlobalsRegistry basecompatibility.ComponentGlobalsRegistry) *ServerRunOptions {\\n\\tdefaults := server.NewConfig(serializer.CodecFactory{})\\n\\treturn &ServerRunOptions{\\n\\t\\tMaxRequestsInFlight:                 defaults.MaxRequestsInFlight,\\n\\t\\tMaxMutatingRequestsInFlight:         defaults.MaxMutatingRequestsInFlight,\\n\\t\\tRequestTimeout:                      defaults.RequestTimeout,\\n\\t\\tLivezGracePeriod:                    defaults.LivezGracePeriod,\\n\\t\\tMinRequestTimeout:                   defaults.MinRequestTimeout,\\n\\t\\tStorageInitializationTimeout:        defaults.StorageInitializationTimeout,\\n\\t\\tShutdownDelayDuration:               defaults.ShutdownDelayDuration,\\n\\t\\tShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod: defaults.ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod,\\n\\t\\tJSONPatchMaxCopyBytes:               defaults.JSONPatchMaxCopyBytes,\\n\\t\\tMaxRequestBodyBytes:                 defaults.MaxRequestBodyBytes,\\n\\t\\tShutdownSendRetryAfter:              false,\\n\\t\\tComponentName:                       componentName,\\n\\t\\tComponentGlobalsRegistry:            componentGlobalsRegistry,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// ApplyTo applies the run options to the method receiver and returns self\\nfunc (s *ServerRunOptions) ApplyTo(c *server.Config) error {\\n\\tif err := s.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.SetFallback(); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tc.CorsAllowedOriginList = s.CorsAllowedOriginList\\n\\tc.HSTSDirectives = s.HSTSDirectives\\n\\tc.ExternalAddress = s.ExternalHost\\n\\tc.MaxRequestsInFlight = s.MaxRequestsInFlight\\n\\tc.MaxMutatingRequestsInFlight = s.MaxMutatingRequestsInFlight\\n\\tc.LivezGracePeriod = s.LivezGracePeriod\\n\\tc.RequestTimeout = s.RequestTimeout\\n\\tc.GoawayChance = s.GoawayChance\\n\\tc.MinRequestTimeout = s.MinRequestTimeout\\n\\tc.StorageInitializationTimeout = s.StorageInitializationTimeout\\n\\tc.ShutdownDelayDuration = s.ShutdownDelayDuration\\n\\tc.JSONPatchMaxCopyBytes = s.JSONPatchMaxCopyBytes\\n\\tc.MaxRequestBodyBytes = s.MaxRequestBodyBytes\\n\\tc.PublicAddress = s.AdvertiseAddress\\n\\tc.ShutdownSendRetryAfter = s.ShutdownSendRetryAfter\\n\\tc.ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod = s.ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod\\n\\tc.EffectiveVersion = s.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.EffectiveVersionFor(s.ComponentName)\\n\\tc.FeatureGate = s.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.FeatureGateFor(s.ComponentName)\\n\\tc.EmulationForwardCompatible = s.EmulationForwardCompatible\\n\\tc.RuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible = s.RuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible\\n\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// DefaultAdvertiseAddress sets the field AdvertiseAddress if unset. The field will be set based on the SecureServingOptions.\\nfunc (s *ServerRunOptions) DefaultAdvertiseAddress(secure *SecureServingOptions) error {\\n\\tif secure == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif s.AdvertiseAddress == nil || s.AdvertiseAddress.IsUnspecified() {\\n\\t\\thostIP, err := secure.DefaultExternalAddress()\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"Unable to find suitable network address.error='%v'. \\\"+\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"Try to set the AdvertiseAddress directly or provide a valid BindAddress to fix this.\\\", err)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\ts.AdvertiseAddress = hostIP\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// Validate checks validation of ServerRunOptions\\nfunc (s *ServerRunOptions) Validate() []error {\\n\\terrors := []error{}\\n\\n\\tif s.LivezGracePeriod < 0 {\\n\\t\\terrors = append(errors, fmt.Errorf(\\\"--livez-grace-period can not be a negative value\\\"))\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif s.MaxRequestsInFlight < 0 {\\n\\t\\terrors = append(errors, fmt.Errorf(\\\"--max-requests-inflight can not be negative value\\\"))\\n\\t}\\n\\tif s.MaxMutatingRequestsInFlight < 0 {\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"a0c79598-fa90-41e8-871e-cb3230efec9e\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:00.486Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"afc5b564-a8c6-41c3-8514-086531d8011f\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"a0c79598-fa90-41e8-871e-cb3230efec9e\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0166qEKAxzSDJTpYEPAfp27g\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_015mi7TGzvDPL2PXzrZkKr9D\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git -150\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":5,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1598,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":60690,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1598},\"output_tokens\":2,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2yPQhS9PiZHLHcFfF9\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"98fd3e63-4441-4a4e-8c81-a9762fe1e7d2\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:00.719Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"98fd3e63-4441-4a4e-8c81-a9762fe1e7d2\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_015mi7TGzvDPL2PXzrZkKr9D\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2016 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage options\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"github.com/spf13/pflag\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/storagebackend\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/dynamic\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/featuregate\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// RecommendedOptions contains the recommended options for running an API server.\\n// If you add something to this list, it should be in a logical grouping.\\n// Each of them can be nil to leave the feature unconfigured on ApplyTo.\\ntype RecommendedOptions struct {\\n\\tEtcd           *EtcdOptions\\n\\tSecureServing  *SecureServingOptionsWithLoopback\\n\\tAuthentication *DelegatingAuthenticationOptions\\n\\tAuthorization  *DelegatingAuthorizationOptions\\n\\tAudit          *AuditOptions\\n\\tFeatures       *FeatureOptions\\n\\tCoreAPI        *CoreAPIOptions\\n\\n\\t// FeatureGate is a way to plumb feature gate through if you have them.\\n\\tFeatureGate featuregate.FeatureGate\\n\\t// ExtraAdmissionInitializers is called once after all ApplyTo from the options above, to pass the returned\\n\\t// admission plugin initializers to Admission.ApplyTo.\\n\\tExtraAdmissionInitializers func(c *server.RecommendedConfig) ([]admission.PluginInitializer, error)\\n\\tAdmission                  *AdmissionOptions\\n\\t// API Server Egress Selector is used to control outbound traffic from the API Server\\n\\tEgressSelector *EgressSelectorOptions\\n\\t// Traces contains options to control distributed request tracing.\\n\\tTraces *TracingOptions\\n}\\n\\nfunc NewRecommendedOptions(prefix string, codec runtime.Codec) *RecommendedOptions {\\n\\tsso := NewSecureServingOptions()\\n\\n\\t// We are composing recommended options for an aggregated api-server,\\n\\t// whose client is typically a proxy multiplexing many operations ---\\n\\t// notably including long-running ones --- into one HTTP/2 connection\\n\\t// into this server.  So allow many concurrent operations.\\n\\tsso.HTTP2MaxStreamsPerConnection = 1000\\n\\n\\treturn &RecommendedOptions{\\n\\t\\tEtcd:           NewEtcdOptions(storagebackend.NewDefaultConfig(prefix, codec)),\\n\\t\\tSecureServing:  sso.WithLoopback(),\\n\\t\\tAuthentication: NewDelegatingAuthenticationOptions(),\\n\\t\\tAuthorization:  NewDelegatingAuthorizationOptions(),\\n\\t\\tAudit:          NewAuditOptions(),\\n\\t\\tFeatures:       NewFeatureOptions(),\\n\\t\\tCoreAPI:        NewCoreAPIOptions(),\\n\\t\\t// Wired a global by default that sadly people will abuse to have different meanings in different repos.\\n\\t\\t// Please consider creating your own FeatureGate so you can have a consistent meaning for what a variable contains\\n\\t\\t// across different repos.  Future you will thank you.\\n\\t\\tFeatureGate:                feature.DefaultFeatureGate,\\n\\t\\tExtraAdmissionInitializers: func(c *server.RecommendedConfig) ([]admission.PluginInitializer, error) { return nil, nil },\\n\\t\\tAdmission:                  NewAdmissionOptions(),\\n\\t\\tEgressSelector:             NewEgressSelectorOptions(),\\n\\t\\tTraces:                     NewTracingOptions(),\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\nfunc (o *RecommendedOptions) AddFlags(fs *pflag.FlagSet) {\\n\\to.Etcd.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.SecureServing.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Authentication.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Authorization.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Audit.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Features.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.CoreAPI.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Admission.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.EgressSelector.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Traces.AddFlags(fs)\\n}\\n\\n// ApplyTo adds RecommendedOptions to the server configuration.\\n// pluginInitializers can be empty, it is only need for additional initializers.\\nfunc (o *RecommendedOptions) ApplyTo(config *server.RecommendedConfig) error {\\n\\tif err := o.Etcd.ApplyTo(&config.Config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.EgressSelector.ApplyTo(&config.Config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Traces.ApplyTo(config.Config.EgressSelector, &config.Config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.SecureServing.ApplyTo(&config.Config.SecureServing, &config.Config.LoopbackClientConfig); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Authentication.ApplyTo(&config.Config.Authentication, config.SecureServing, config.OpenAPIConfig); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Authorization.ApplyTo(&config.Config.Authorization); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Audit.ApplyTo(&config.Config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.CoreAPI.ApplyTo(config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tvar kubeClient kubernetes.Interface\\n\\tvar dynamicClient dynamic.Interface\\n\\tif config.ClientConfig != nil {\\n\\t\\tvar err error\\n\\t\\tkubeClient, err = kubernetes.NewForConfig(config.ClientConfig)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tdynamicClient, err = dynamic.NewForConfig(config.ClientConfig)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Features.ApplyTo(&config.Config, kubeClient, config.SharedInformerFactory); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tinitializers, err := o.ExtraAdmissionInitializers(config)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Admission.ApplyTo(&config.Config, config.SharedInformerFactory, kubeClient, dynamicClient, o.FeatureGate,\\n\\t\\tconfig.EffectiveVersion,\\n\\t\\tinitializers...); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"ffb1a0f2-7ec5-483d-a2d8-20457874ddca\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:00.734Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"98fd3e63-4441-4a4e-8c81-a9762fe1e7d2\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"ffb1a0f2-7ec5-483d-a2d8-20457874ddca\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01FeD5N7oRysph8eMjpKdV4X\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now 2023 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage apiserver\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"os\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\tcoordinationapiv1 \\\"k8s.io/api/coordination/v1\\\"\\n\\tapiv1 \\\"k8s.io/api/core/v1\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/uuid\\\"\\n\\tapiserverfeatures \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/features\\\"\\n\\tpeerreconcilers \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/reconcilers\\\"\\n\\tgenericregistry \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/generic\\\"\\n\\tgenericapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/dynamiccertificates\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/flagz\\\"\\n\\tserverstorage \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/storage\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\tclientgoinformers \\\"k8s.io/client-go/informers\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes\\\"\\n\\tzpagesfeatures \\\"k8s.io/component-base/zpages/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-helpers/apimachinery/lease\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/utils/clock\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/controller/apiserverleasegc\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/controller/clusterauthenticationtrust\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/controller/leaderelection\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/controller/legacytokentracking\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/controller/systemnamespaces\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/routes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/serviceaccount\\\"\\n)\\n\\nvar (\\n\\t// IdentityLeaseGCPeriod is the interval which the lease GC controller checks for expired leases\\n\\t// IdentityLeaseGCPeriod is exposed so integration tests can tune this value.\\n\\tIdentityLeaseGCPeriod = 3600 * time.Second\\n\\t// IdentityLeaseDurationSeconds is the duration of kube-apiserver lease in seconds\\n\\t// IdentityLeaseDurationSeconds is exposed so integration tests can tune this value.\\n\\tIdentityLeaseDurationSeconds = 3600\\n\\t// IdentityLeaseRenewIntervalPeriod is the interval of kube-apiserver renewing its lease in seconds\\n\\t// IdentityLeaseRenewIntervalPeriod is exposed so integration tests can tune this value.\\n\\tIdentityLeaseRenewIntervalPeriod = 10 * time.Second\\n\\n\\t// LeaseCandidateGCPeriod is the interval which the leasecandidate GC controller checks for expired leases\\n\\t// This is exposed so integration tests can tune this value.\\n\\tLeaseCandidateGCPeriod = 30 * time.Minute\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\t// IdentityLeaseComponentLabelKey is used to apply a component label to identity lease objects, indicating:\\n\\t//   1. the lease is an identity lease (different from leader election leases)\\n\\t//   2. which component owns this lease\\n\\tIdentityLeaseComponentLabelKey = \\\"apiserver.kubernetes.io/identity\\\"\\n\\t// KubeAPIServer defines variable used internally when referring to kube-apiserver component\\n\\tKubeAPIServer = \\\"kube-apiserver\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// Server is a struct that contains a generic control plane apiserver instance\\n// that can be run to start serving the APIs.\\ntype Server struct {\\n\\tGenericAPIServer *genericapiserver.GenericAPIServer\\n\\n\\tAPIResourceConfigSource   serverstorage.APIResourceConfigSource\\n\\tRESTOptionsGetter         genericregistry.RESTOptionsGetter\\n\\tClusterAuthenticationInfo clusterauthenticationtrust.ClusterAuthenticationInfo\\n\\tVersionedInformers        clientgoinformers.SharedInformerFactory\\n}\\n\\n// New returns a new instance of Master from the given config.\\n// Certain config fields will be set to a default value if unset.\\n// Certain config fields must be specified, including:\\n// KubeletClientConfig\\nfunc (c completedConfig) New(name string, delegationTarget genericapiserver.DelegationTarget) (*Server, error) {\\n\\tgeneric, err := c.Generic.New(name, delegationTarget)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif c.EnableLogsSupport {\\n\\t\\troutes.Logs{}.Install(generic.Handler.GoRestfulContainer)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tmd, err := serviceaccount.NewOpenIDMetadataProvider(\\n\\t\\tc.ServiceAccountIssuerURL,\\n\\t\\tc.ServiceAccountJWKSURI,\\n\\t\\tc.Generic.ExternalAddress,\\n\\t\\tc.ServiceAccountPublicKeysGetter,\\n\\t)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t// If there was an error, skip installing the endpoints and log the\\n\\t\\t// error, but continue on. We don't return the error because the\\n\\t\\t// metadata responses require additional, backwards incompatible\\n\\t\\t// validation of command-line options.\\n\\t\\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"Could not construct pre-rendered responses for\\\"+\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\" ServiceAccountIssuerDiscovery endpoints. Endpoints will not be\\\"+\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\" enabled. Error: %v\\\", err)\\n\\t\\tif c.ServiceAccountIssuerURL != \\\"\\\" {\\n\\t\\t\\t// The user likely expects this feature to be enabled if issuer URL is\\n\\t\\t\\t// set and the feature gate is enabled. In the future, if there is no\\n\\t\\t\\t// longer a feature gate and issuer URL is not set, the user may not\\n\\t\\t\\t// expect this feature to be enabled. We log the former case as an Error\\n\\t\\t\\t// and the latter case as an Info.\\n\\t\\t\\tklog.Error(msg)\\n\\t\\t} else {\\n\\t\\t\\tklog.Info(msg)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t} else {\\n\\t\\troutes.NewOpenIDMetadataServer(md).Install(generic.Handler.GoRestfulContainer)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ts := &Server{\\n\\t\\tGenericAPIServer: generic,\\n\\n\\t\\tAPIResourceConfigSource:   c.APIResourceConfigSource,\\n\\t\\tRESTOptionsGetter:         c.Generic.RESTOptionsGetter,\\n\\t\\tClusterAuthenticationInfo: c.ClusterAuthenticationInfo,\\n\\t\\tVersionedInformers:        c.VersionedInformers,\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tclient, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(s.GenericAPIServer.LoopbackClientConfig)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif len(c.SystemNamespaces) > 0 {\\n\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"start-system-namespaces-controller\\\", func(hookContext genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tgo systemnamespaces.NewController(c.SystemNamespaces, client, s.VersionedInformers.Core().V1().Namespaces()).Run(hookContext.Done())\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t})\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t_, publicServicePort, err := c.Generic.SecureServing.HostPort()\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to get listener address: %w\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(zpagesfeatures.ComponentFlagz) {\\n\\t\\tif c.Generic.Flagz != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tflagz.Install(s.GenericAPIServer.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux, name, c.Generic.Flagz)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(apiserverfeatures.CoordinatedLeaderElection) {\\n\\t\\tleaseInformer := s.VersionedInformers.Coordination().V1().Leases()\\n\\t\\tlcInformer := s.VersionedInformers.Coordination().V1beta1().LeaseCandidates()\\n\\t\\t// Ensure that informers are registered before starting. Coordinated Leader Election leader-elected\\n\\t\\t// and may register informer handlers after they are started.\\n\\t\\t_ = leaseInformer.Informer()\\n\\t\\t_ = lcInformer.Informer()\\n\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"start-kube-apiserver-coordinated-leader-election-controller\\\", func(hookContext genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tgo leaderelection.RunWithLeaderElection(hookContext, s.GenericAPIServer.LoopbackClientConfig, func() (func(ctx context.Context, workers int), error) {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tcontroller, err := leaderelection.NewController(\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tleaseInformer,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tlcInformer,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tclient.CoordinationV1(),\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tclient.CoordinationV1beta1(),\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tgccontroller := leaderelection.NewLeaseCandidateGC(\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tclient,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLeaseCandidateGCPeriod,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tlcInformer,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn func(ctx context.Context, workers int) {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tgo controller.Run(ctx, workers)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tgo gccontroller.Run(ctx)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}, err\\n\\t\\t\\t}, leaderelection.LeaderElectionTimers{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tLeaseDuration: c.CoordinatedLeadershipLeaseDuration,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tRenewDeadline: c.CoordinatedLeadershipRenewDeadline,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tRetryPeriod:   c.CoordinatedLeadershipRetryPeriod,\\n\\t\\t\\t})\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t})\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(apiserverfeatures.UnknownVersionInteroperabilityProxy) {\\n\\t\\tpeeraddress := getPeerAddress(c.Extra.PeerAdvertiseAddress, c.Generic.PublicAddress, publicServicePort)\\n\\t\\tpeerEndpointCtrl := peerreconcilers.New(\\n\\t\\t\\tc.Generic.APIServerID,\\n\\t\\t\\tpeeraddress,\\n\\t\\t\\tc.Extra.PeerEndpointLeaseReconciler,\\n\\t\\t\\tc.Extra.PeerEndpointReconcileInterval,\\n\\t\\t\\tclient)\\n\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"peer-endpoint-reconciler-controller\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tfunc(hookContext genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tpeerEndpointCtrl.Start(hookContext.Done())\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t\\t})\\n\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPreShutdownHookOrDie(\\\"peer-endpoint-reconciler-controller\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tfunc() error {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tpeerEndpointCtrl.Stop()\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t\\t})\\n\\t\\tif c.Extra.PeerProxy != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t// Wait for handler to be ready\\n\\t\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"mixed-version-proxy-handler\\\", func(context genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\terr := c.Extra.PeerProxy.WaitForCacheSync(context.Done())\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t})\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// Run local-discovery sync loop\\n\\t\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"local-discovery-cache-sync\\\", func(context genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\terr := c.Extra.PeerProxy.RunLocalDiscoveryCacheSync(context.Done())\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t})\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// Run peer-discovery sync loop\\n\\t\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"peer-discovery-cache-sync\\\", func(context genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tgo c.Extra.PeerProxy.RunPeerDiscoveryCacheSync(context, 1)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t\\t})\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// RunGVDeletionWorkers processes GVs from deleted CRDs/APIServices. If a GV is no longer in use,\\n\\t\\t\\t// it is marked for removal from peer-discovery (with a deletion timestamp), triggering a grace period before cleanup.\\n\\t\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"gv-deletion-workers\\\", func(context genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tgo c.Extra.PeerProxy.RunGVDeletionWorkers(context, 1)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t\\t})\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// RunExcludedGVsReaper removes GVs from the peer-discovery exclusion list after their grace period expires.\\n\\t\\t\\t// This ensures we don't include stale CRDs/aggregated APIs from peer discovery in the aggregated discovery.\\n\\t\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"excluded-groups-reaper\\\", func(context genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tgo c.Extra.PeerProxy.RunExcludedGVsReaper(context.Done())\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t\\t})\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"start-cluster-authentication-info-controller\\\", func(hookContext genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\tcontroller := clusterauthenticationtrust.NewClusterAuthenticationTrustController(s.ClusterAuthenticationInfo, client)\\n\\t\\t// prime values and start listeners\\n\\t\\tif s.ClusterAuthenticationInfo.ClientCA != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\ts.ClusterAuthenticationInfo.ClientCA.AddListener(controller)\\n\\t\\t\\tif controller, ok := s.ClusterAuthenticationInfo.ClientCA.(dynamiccertificates.ControllerRunner); ok {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t// runonce to be sure that we have a value.\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif err := controller.RunOnce(hookContext); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\truntime.HandleError(err)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tgo controller.Run(hookContext, 1)\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif s.ClusterAuthenticationInfo.RequestHeaderCA != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\ts.ClusterAuthenticationInfo.RequestHeaderCA.AddListener(controller)\\n\\t\\t\\tif controller, ok := s.ClusterAuthenticationInfo.RequestHeaderCA.(dynamiccertificates.ControllerRunner); ok {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t// runonce to be sure that we have a value.\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif err := controller.RunOnce(hookContext); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\truntime.HandleError(err)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tgo controller.Run(hookContext, 1)\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tgo controller.Run(hookContext, 1)\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t})\\n\\n\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(apiserverfeatures.APIServerIdentity) {\\n\\t\\tleaseName := s.GenericAPIServer.APIServerID\\n\\t\\tholderIdentity := s.GenericAPIServer.APIServerID + \\\"_\\\" + string(uuid.NewUUID())\\n\\t\\tpeeraddress := getPeerAddress(c.Extra.PeerAdvertiseAddress, c.Generic.PublicAddress, publicServicePort)\\n\\n\\t\\t// must replace ':,[]' in [ip:port] to be able to store this as a valid label value\\n\\t\\tcontroller := lease.NewController(\\n\\t\\t\\tclock.RealClock{},\\n\\t\\t\\tclient,\\n\\t\\t\\tholderIdentity,\\n\\t\\t\\tint32(IdentityLeaseDurationSeconds),\\n\\t\\t\\tnil,\\n\\t\\t\\tIdentityLeaseRenewIntervalPeriod,\\n\\t\\t\\tleaseName,\\n\\t\\t\\tmetav1.NamespaceSystem,\\n\\t\\t\\t// TODO: receive identity label value as a parameter when post start hook is moved to generic apiserver.\\n\\t\\t\\tlabelAPIServerHeartbeatFunc(name, peeraddress),\\n\\t\\t)\\n\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie(\\\"start-kube-apiserver-identity-lease-controller\\\", func(hookContext genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn controller.Start(hookContext.Done())\\n\\t\\t})\\n\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.AddPreShutdownHookOrDie(\\\"stop-kube-apiserver-identity-lease-controller\\\", func() error {\\n\\t\\t\\tcontroller.Stop()\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"e40cc5b2-f57a-4a73-b1ec-e35b578d6f75\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:04.667Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"86044cf8-e130-4219-9a1c-9e0547996b5c\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"e40cc5b2-f57a-4a73-b1ec-e35b578d6f75\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01YSDDWn64mJx3e6NNRUq5it\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01X18en3256RmgHHqEVqGX4S\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubeapiserver/options\\\"\\n\\tkubeletclient \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/client\\\"\\n\\n\\t// RESTStorage installers\\n\\tadmissionregistrationrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/admissionregistration/rest\\\"\\n\\tapiserverinternalrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/apiserverinternal/rest\\\"\\n\\tappsrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/apps/rest\\\"\\n\\tauthenticationrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/authentication/rest\\\"\\n\\tauthorizationrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/authorization/rest\\\"\\n\\tautoscalingrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/autoscaling/rest\\\"\\n\\tbatchrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/batch/rest\\\"\\n\\tcertificatesrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/certificates/rest\\\"\\n\\tcoordinationrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/coordination/rest\\\"\\n\\tcorerest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/core/rest\\\"\\n\\tdiscoveryrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/discovery/rest\\\"\\n\\teventsrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/events/rest\\\"\\n\\tflowcontrolrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/flowcontrol/rest\\\"\\n\\tnetworkingrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/networking/rest\\\"\\n\\tnoderest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/node/rest\\\"\\n\\tpolicyrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/policy/rest\\\"\\n\\trbacrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/rbac/rest\\\"\\n\\tresourcerest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/resource/rest\\\"\\n\\tschedulingrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/scheduling/rest\\\"\\n\\tstoragerest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/storage/rest\\\"\\n\\tsvmrest \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/registry/storagemigration/rest\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\t// DefaultEndpointReconcilerInterval is the default amount of time for how often the endpoints for\\n\\t// the kubernetes Service are reconciled.\\n\\tDefaultEndpointReconcilerInterval = 10 * time.Second\\n\\t// DefaultEndpointReconcilerTTL is the default TTL timeout for the storage layer\\n\\tDefaultEndpointReconcilerTTL = 15 * time.Second\\n\\t// IdentityLeaseComponentLabelKey is used to apply a component label to identity lease objects, indicating:\\n\\t//   1. the lease is an identity lease (different from leader election leases)\\n\\t//   2. which component owns this lease\\n\\t// TODO(sttts): remove this indirection\\n\\tIdentityLeaseComponentLabelKey = controlplaneapiserver.IdentityLeaseComponentLabelKey\\n\\t// repairLoopInterval defines the interval used to run the Services ClusterIP and NodePort repair loops\\n\\trepairLoopInterval = 3 * time.Minute\\n)\\n\\nvar (\\n\\t// AdditionalStorageProvidersForTests allows tests to inject additional test-only API groups.\\n\\t// Only meant for use in integration tests.\\n\\tAdditionalStorageProvidersForTests func(client *kubernetes.Clientset) []controlplaneapiserver.RESTStorageProvider\\n)\\n\\n// Extra defines extra configuration for kube-apiserver\\ntype Extra struct {\\n\\tEndpointReconcilerConfig EndpointReconcilerConfig\\n\\tKubeletClientConfig      kubeletclient.KubeletClientConfig\\n\\n\\t// Values to build the IP addresses used by discovery\\n\\t// The range of IPs to be assigned to services with type=ClusterIP or greater\\n\\tServiceIPRange net.IPNet\\n\\t// The IP address for the GenericAPIServer service (must be inside ServiceIPRange)\\n\\tAPIServerServiceIP net.IP\\n\\n\\t// dual stack services, the range represents an alternative IP range for service IP\\n\\t// must be of different family than primary (ServiceIPRange)\\n\\tSecondaryServiceIPRange net.IPNet\\n\\t// the secondary IP address the GenericAPIServer service (must be inside SecondaryServiceIPRange)\\n\\tSecondaryAPIServerServiceIP net.IP\\n\\n\\t// Port for the apiserver service.\\n\\tAPIServerServicePort int\\n\\n\\t// TODO, we can probably group service related items into a substruct to make it easier to configure\\n\\t// the API server items and `Extra*` fields likely fit nicely together.\\n\\n\\t// The range of ports to be assigned to services with type=NodePort or greater\\n\\tServiceNodePortRange utilnet.PortRange\\n\\t// If non-zero, the \\\"kubernetes\\\" services uses this port as NodePort.\\n\\tKubernetesServiceNodePort int\\n\\n\\t// Number of masters running; all masters must be started with the\\n\\t// same value for this field. (Numbers > 1 currently untested.)\\n\\tMasterCount int\\n\\n\\t// MasterEndpointReconcileTTL sets the time to live in seconds of an\\n\\t// endpoint record recorded by each master. The endpoints are checked at an\\n\\t// interval that is 2/3 of this value and this value defaults to 15s if\\n\\t// unset. In very large clusters, this value may be increased to reduce the\\n\\t// possibility that the master endpoint record expires (due to other load\\n\\t// on the etcd server) and causes masters to drop in and out of the\\n\\t// kubernetes service record. It is not recommended to set this value below\\n\\t// 15s.\\n\\tMasterEndpointReconcileTTL time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// Selects which reconciler to use\\n\\tEndpointReconcilerType reconcilers.Type\\n\\n\\t// RepairServicesInterval interval used by the repair loops for\\n\\t// the Services NodePort and ClusterIP resources\\n\\tRepairServicesInterval time.Duration\\n}\\n\\n// Config defines configuration for the master\\ntype Config struct {\\n\\tControlPlane controlplaneapiserver.Config\\n\\tExtra\\n}\\n\\ntype completedConfig struct {\\n\\tControlPlane controlplaneapiserver.CompletedConfig\\n\\t*Extra\\n}\\n\\n// CompletedConfig embeds a private pointer that cannot be instantiated outside of this package\\ntype CompletedConfig struct {\\n\\t*completedConfig\\n}\\n\\n// EndpointReconcilerConfig holds the endpoint reconciler and endpoint reconciliation interval to be\\n// used by the master.\\ntype EndpointReconcilerConfig struct {\\n\\tReconciler reconcilers.EndpointReconciler\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"67c33241-ccab-41d4-8afa-bc348c205edd\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:04.816Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"81ed0d32-d135-492e-bf0b-0470b15c289b\"}\n",
    "prompt": "I need to understand how the kube-apiserver binary uses the apiserver library and how API aggregation works. Explore these areas in /workspace:\n\n1. `cmd/kube-apiserver/app/server.go` - How the kube-apiserver is set up (read the file)\n2. `cmd/kube-apiserver/app/aggregator.go` - How the aggregator layer is configured\n3. `cmd/kube-apiserver/app/config.go` - Configuration setup\n4. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/genericapiserver.go` - Focus on the delegation chain (DelegationTarget, preparedGenericAPIServer)\n5. `staging/src/k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go` - The aggregator API server\n6. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go` - CRD API server\n7. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/healthz/` - Health check subsystem\n8. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/` - List all option files to understand configuration surface\n\nRead actual file contents and provide line numbers and key type/function signatures. I need to understand the three-layer delegation: aggregator -> kube-apiserver -> apiextensions-apiserver.",

creates a *cobra.Command object with default parameters\\nfunc NewAPIServerCommand() *cobra.Command {\\n\\ts := options.NewServerRunOptions()\\n\\tctx := genericapiserver.SetupSignalContext()\\n\\tfeatureGate := s.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.FeatureGateFor(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent)\\n\\n\\tcmd := &cobra.Command{\\n\\t\\tUse: \\\"kube-apiserver\\\",\\n\\t\\tLong: `The Kubernetes API server validates and configures data\\nfor the api objects which include pods, services, replicationcontrollers, and\\nothers. The API Server services REST operations and provides the frontend to the\\ncluster's shared state through which all other components interact.`,\\n\\n\\t\\t// stop printing usage when the command errors\\n\\t\\tSilenceUsage: true,\\n\\t\\tPersistentPreRunE: func(*cobra.Command, []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := s.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.Set(); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// silence client-go warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\t// kube-apiserver loopback clients should not log self-issued warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\trest.SetDefaultWarningHandler(rest.NoWarnings{})\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\tRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tverflag.PrintAndExitIfRequested()\\n\\t\\t\\tfs := cmd.Flags()\\n\\t\\t\\t// Activate logging as soon as possible, after that\\n\\t\\t\\t// show flags with the final logging configuration.\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := logsapi.ValidateAndApply(s.Logs, featureGate); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"29cd9c91-e352-42f2-827f-d1ef71fd1b06\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:45.207Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"d6a6206b-c959-409a-b8b9-a52c09be630f\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"29cd9c91-e352-42f2-827f-d1ef71fd1b06\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01R99eknz8vkJWwUPj7nm7RB\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Good! and\\nothers. The API Server services REST operations and provides the frontend to the\\ncluster's shared state through which all other components interact.`,\\n\\n\\t\\t// stop printing usage when the command errors\\n\\t\\tSilenceUsage: true,\\n\\t\\tPersistentPreRunE: func(*cobra.Command, []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := s.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.Set(); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// silence client-go warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\t// kube-apiserver loopback clients should not log self-issued warnings.\\n\\t\\t\\trest.SetDefaultWarningHandler(rest.NoWarnings{})\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\tRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tverflag.PrintAndExitIfRequested()\\n\\t\\t\\tfs := cmd.Flags()\\n\\t\\t\\t// Activate logging as soon as possible, after that\\n\\t\\t\\t// show flags with the final logging configuration.\\n\\t\\t\\tif err := logsapi.ValidateAndApply(s.Logs, featureGate); err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\tcliflag.PrintFlags(fs)\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// set default options\\n\\t\\t\\tcompletedOptions, err := s.Complete(ctx)\\n\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t// validate options\\n\\t\\t\\tif errs := completedOptions.Validate(); len(errs) != 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn utilerrors.NewAggregate(errs)\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t// add feature enablement metrics\\n\\t\\t\\tfeatureGate.(featuregate.MutableFeatureGate).AddMetrics()\\n\\t\\t\\t// add component version metrics\\n\\t\\t\\ts.GenericServerRunOptions.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.AddMetrics()\\n\\t\\t\\treturn Run(ctx, completedOptions)\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\tArgs: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\\n\\t\\t\\tfor _, arg := range args {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif len(arg) > 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"%q does not take any arguments, got %q\\\", cmd.CommandPath(), args)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t}\\n\\tcmd.SetContext(ctx)\\n\\n\\tfs := cmd.Flags()\\n\\tnamedFlagSets := s.Flags()\\n\\ts.Flagz = flagz.NamedFlagSetsReader{\\n\\t\\tFlagSets: namedFlagSets,\\n\\t}\\n\\tverflag.AddFlags(namedFlagSets.FlagSet(\\\"global\\\"))\\n\\tglobalflag.AddGlobalFlags(namedFlagSets.FlagSet(\\\"global\\\"), cmd.Name(), logs.SkipLoggingConfigurationFlags())\\n\\tfor _, f := range namedFlagSets.FlagSets {\\n\\t\\tfs.AddFlagSet(f)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tcols, _, _ := term.TerminalSize(cmd.OutOrStdout())\\n\\tcliflag.SetUsageAndHelpFunc(cmd, namedFlagSets, cols)\\n\\n\\treturn cmd\\n}\\n\\n// Run runs the specified APIServer.  This should never exit.\\nfunc Run(ctx context.Context, opts options.CompletedOptions) error {\\n\\t// To help debugging, immediately log version\\n\\tklog.Infof(\\\"Version: %+v\\\", utilversion.Get())\\n\\n\\tklog.InfoS(\\\"Golang settings\\\", \\\"GOGC\\\", os.Getenv(\\\"GOGC\\\"), \\\"GOMAXPROCS\\\", os.Getenv(\\\"GOMAXPROCS\\\"), \\\"GOTRACEBACK\\\", os.Getenv(\\\"GOTRACEBACK\\\"))\\n\\n\\tconfig, err := NewConfig(opts)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tcompleted, err := config.Complete()\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tserver, err := CreateServerChain(completed)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tprepared, err := server.PrepareRun()\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn prepared.Run(ctx)\\n}\\n\\n// CreateServerChain creates the apiservers connected via delegation.\\nfunc CreateServerChain(config CompletedConfig) (*aggregatorapiserver.APIAggregator, error) {\\n\\tnotFoundHandler := notfoundhandler.New(config.KubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic.Serializer, genericapifilters.NoMuxAndDiscoveryIncompleteKey)\\n\\tapiExtensionsServer, err := config.ApiExtensions.New(genericapiserver.NewEmptyDelegateWithCustomHandler(notFoundHandler))\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tcrdAPIEnabled := config.ApiExtensions.GenericConfig.MergedResourceConfig.ResourceEnabled(apiextensionsv1.SchemeGroupVersion.WithResource(\\\"customresourcedefinitions\\\"))\\n\\n\\tkubeAPIServer, err := config.KubeAPIs.New(apiExtensionsServer.GenericAPIServer)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// aggregator comes last in the chain\\n\\taggregatorServer, err := controlplaneapiserver.CreateAggregatorServer(config.Aggregator, kubeAPIServer.ControlPlane.GenericAPIServer, apiExtensionsServer.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), crdAPIEnabled, apiVersionPriorities)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t// we don't need special handling for innerStopCh because the aggregator server doesn't create any go routines\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn aggregatorServer, nil\\n}\\n\\n// CreateKubeAPIServerConfig creates all the resources for running the API server, but runs none of them\\nfunc CreateKubeAPIServerConfig(\\n\\topts options.CompletedOptions,\\n\\tgenericConfig *genericapiserver.Config,\\n\\tversionedInformers clientgoinformers.SharedInformerFactory,\\n\\tstorageFactory *serverstorage.DefaultStorageFactory,\\n) (\\n\\t*controlplane.Config,\\n\\taggregatorapiserver.ServiceResolver,\\n\\t[]admission.PluginInitializer,\\n\\terror,\\n) {\\n\\t// global stuff\\n\\tcapabilities.Setup(opts.AllowPrivileged, opts.MaxConnectionBytesPerSec)\\n\\n\\t// additional admission initializers\\n\\tkubeAdmissionConfig := &kubeapiserveradmission.Config{}\\n\\tkubeInitializers, err := kubeAdmissionConfig.New()\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to create admission plugin initializer: %w\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tserviceResolver, err := buildServiceResolver(opts.EnableAggregatorRouting, genericConfig.LoopbackClientConfig.Host, versionedInformers)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error building service resolver: %w\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\tcontrolplaneConfig, admissionInitializers, err := controlplaneapiserver.CreateConfig(opts.CompletedOptions, genericConfig, versionedInformers, storageFactory, serviceResolver, kubeInitializers)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, nil, nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tconfig := &controlplane.Config{\\n\\t\\tControlPlane: *controlplaneConfig,\\n\\t\\tExtra: controlplane.Extra{\\n\\t\\t\\tKubeletClientConfig: opts.KubeletConfig,\\n\\n\\t\\t\\tServiceIPRange:          opts.PrimaryServiceClusterIPRange,\\n\\t\\t\\tAPIServerServiceIP:      opts.APIServerServiceIP,\\n\\t\\t\\tSecondaryServiceIPRange: opts.SecondaryServiceClusterIPRange,\\n\\n\\t\\t\\tAPIServerServicePort: 443,\\n\\n\\t\\t\\tServiceNodePortRange:      opts.ServiceNodePortRange,\\n\\t\\t\\tKubernetesServiceNodePort: opts.KubernetesServiceNodePort,\\n\\n\\t\\t\\tEndpointReconcilerType: reconcilers.Type(opts.EndpointReconcilerType),\\n\\t\\t\\tMasterCount:            opts.MasterCount,\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector != nil {\\n\\t\\t// Use the config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector lookup to find the dialer to connect to the kubelet\\n\\t\\tconfig.Extra.KubeletClientConfig.Lookup = config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector.Lookup\\n\\n\\t\\t// Use the config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector lookup as the transport used by the \\\"proxy\\\" subresources.\\n\\t\\tnetworkContext := egressselector.Cluster.AsNetworkContext()\\n\\t\\tdialer, err := config.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector.Lookup(networkContext)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil, nil, nil, err\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tc := config.ControlPlane.Extra.ProxyTransport.Clone()\\n\\t\\tc.DialContext = dialer\\n\\t\\tconfig.ControlPlane.ProxyTransport = c\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn config, serviceResolver, admissionInitializers, nil\\n}\\n\\nvar testServiceResolver webhook.ServiceResolver\\n\\n// SetServiceResolverForTests allows the service resolver to be overridden during tests.\\n// Tests using this function must run serially as this function is not safe to call concurrently with server start.\\nfunc SetServiceResolverForTests(resolver webhook.ServiceResolver) func() {\\n\\tif testServiceResolver != nil {\\n\\t\\tpanic(\\\"test service resolver is set: tests are either running concurrently or clean up was skipped\\\")\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ttestServiceResolver = resolver\\n\\n\\treturn func() {\\n\\t\\ttestServiceResolver = nil\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\nfunc buildServiceResolver(enabledAggregatorRouting bool, hostname string, informer clientgoinformers.SharedInformerFactory) (webhook.ServiceResolver, error) {\\n\\tif testServiceResolver != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn testServiceResolver, nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tendpointSliceGetter, err := proxy.NewEndpointSliceIndexerGetter(informer.Discovery().V1().EndpointSlices())\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar serviceResolver webhook.ServiceResolver\\n\\tif enabledAggregatorRouting {\\n\\t\\tserviceResolver = aggregatorapiserver.NewEndpointServiceResolver(\\n\\t\\t\\tinformer.Core().V1().Services().Lister(),\\n\\t\\t\\tendpointSliceGetter,\\n\\t\\t)\\n\\t} else {\\n\\t\\tserviceResolver = aggregatorapiserver.NewClusterIPServiceResolver(\\n\\t\\t\\tinformer.Core().V1().Services().Lister(),\\n\\t\\t)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// resolve kubernetes.default.svc locally\\n\\tif localHost, err := url.Parse(hostname); err == nil {\\n\\t\\tserviceResolver = aggregatorapiserver.NewLoopbackServiceResolver(serviceResolver, localHost)\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn serviceResolver, nil\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"1fec8c65-662d-4957-af69-9db44023e4f4\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:48.991Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"4f6bf9f6-727f-43fa-8543-3d977b9bdfee\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"1fec8c65-662d-4957-af69-9db44023e4f4\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01KucyNP517ASGit1Hv8Jq3h\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01AhiZskMunTPpTv6KDwGBxT\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git
