2017 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\n// Package app does all of the work necessary to create a Kubernetes\\n// APIServer by binding together the API, master and APIServer infrastructure.\\n// It can be configured and called directly or via the hyperkube framework.\\npackage app\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\tcontrolplaneapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/apiserver\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// The proper way to resolve this letting the aggregator know the desired group and version-within-group order of the underlying servers\\n// is to refactor the genericapiserver.DelegationTarget to include a list of priorities based on which APIs were installed.\\n// This requires the APIGroupInfo struct to evolve and include the concept of priorities and to avoid mistakes, the core storage map there needs to be updated.\\n// That ripples out every bit as far as you'd expect, so for 1.7 we'll include the list here instead of being built up during storage.\\nvar apiVersionPriorities = merge(controlplaneapiserver.DefaultGenericAPIServicePriorities(), map[schema.GroupVersion]controlplaneapiserver.APIServicePriority{\\n\\t{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}: {Group: 18000, Version: 1},\\n\\t// to my knowledge, nothing below here collides\\n\\t{Group: \\\"apps\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:                    {Group: 17800, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"autoscaling\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:             {Group: 17500, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"autoscaling\\\", Version: \\\"v2\\\"}:             {Group: 17500, Version: 30},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"autoscaling\\\", Version: \\\"v2beta1\\\"}:        {Group: 17500, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"autoscaling\\\", Version: \\\"v2beta2\\\"}:        {Group: 17500, Version: 1},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"batch\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:                   {Group: 17400, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"batch\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:              {Group: 17400, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"batch\\\", Version: \\\"v2alpha1\\\"}:             {Group: 17400, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"networking.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:       {Group: 17200, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"networking.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:  {Group: 17200, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"policy\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:                  {Group: 17100, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"policy\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:             {Group: 17100, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"storage.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:          {Group: 16800, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"storage.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:     {Group: 16800, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"storage.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1alpha1\\\"}:    {Group: 16800, Version: 1},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"scheduling.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:       {Group: 16600, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"scheduling.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1alpha1\\\"}: {Group: 16600, Version: 1},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"node.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:             {Group: 16300, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"node.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1alpha1\\\"}:       {Group: 16300, Version: 1},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"node.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:        {Group: 16300, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"resource.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}:         {Group: 16200, Version: 21},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"resource.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta2\\\"}:    {Group: 16200, Version: 15},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"resource.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1beta1\\\"}:    {Group: 16200, Version: 9},\\n\\t{Group: \\\"resource.k8s.io\\\", Version: \\\"v1alpha3\\\"}:   {Group: 16200, Version: 1},\\n\\t// Append a new group to the end of the list if unsure.\\n\\t// You can use min(existing group)-100 as the initial value for a group.\\n\\t// Version can be set to 9 (to have space around) for a new group.\\n})\\n\\nfunc merge(a, b map[schema.GroupVersion]controlplaneapiserver.APIServicePriority) map[schema.GroupVersion]controlplaneapiserver.APIServicePriority {\\n\\tfor k, v := range b {\\n\\t\\ta[k] = v\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn a\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"9357adf8-23db-48d5-958e-005ce35c3552\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:49.149Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"e8c8179a-9339-41f4-993f-6a7fd8ef9809\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"9357adf8-23db-48d5-958e-005ce35c3552\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01KucyNP517ASGit1Hv8Jq3h\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01Rt4RUjVsfYCvzqc8m7pk2f\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage app\\n\\nimport (\\n\\tapiextensionsapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook\\\"\\n\\taggregatorapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver\\\"\\n\\taggregatorscheme \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver/scheme\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/cmd/kube-apiserver/app/options\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/api/legacyscheme\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane\\\"\\n\\tcontrolplaneapiserver \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/controlplane/apiserver\\\"\\n\\tgeneratedopenapi \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/generated/openapi\\\"\\n)\\n\\ntype Config struct {\\n\\tOptions options.CompletedOptions\\n\\n\\tAggregator    *aggregatorapiserver.Config\\n\\tKubeAPIs      *controlplane.Config\\n\\tApiExtensions *apiextensionsapiserver.Config\\n\\n\\tExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype ExtraConfig struct {\\n}\\n\\ntype completedConfig struct {\\n\\tOptions options.CompletedOptions\\n\\n\\tAggregator    aggregatorapiserver.CompletedConfig\\n\\tKubeAPIs      controlplane.CompletedConfig\\n\\tApiExtensions apiextensionsapiserver.CompletedConfig\\n\\n\\tExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype CompletedConfig struct {\\n\\t// Embed a private pointer that cannot be instantiated outside of this package.\\n\\t*completedConfig\\n}\\n\\nfunc (c *Config) Complete() (CompletedConfig, error) {\\n\\treturn CompletedConfig{&completedConfig{\\n\\t\\tOptions: c.Options,\\n\\n\\t\\tAggregator:    c.Aggregator.Complete(),\\n\\t\\tKubeAPIs:      c.KubeAPIs.Complete(),\\n\\t\\tApiExtensions: c.ApiExtensions.Complete(),\\n\\n\\t\\tExtraConfig: c.ExtraConfig,\\n\\t}}, nil\\n}\\n\\n// NewConfig creates all the resources for running kube-apiserver, but runs none of them.\\nfunc NewConfig(opts options.CompletedOptions) (*Config, error) {\\n\\tc := &Config{\\n\\t\\tOptions: opts,\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tgenericConfig, versionedInformers, storageFactory, err := controlplaneapiserver.BuildGenericConfig(\\n\\t\\topts.CompletedOptions,\\n\\t\\t[]*runtime.Scheme{legacyscheme.Scheme, apiextensionsapiserver.Scheme, aggregatorscheme.Scheme},\\n\\t\\tcontrolplane.DefaultAPIResourceConfigSource(),\\n\\t\\tgeneratedopenapi.GetOpenAPIDefinitions,\\n\\t)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tkubeAPIs, serviceResolver, pluginInitializer, err := CreateKubeAPIServerConfig(opts, genericConfig, versionedInformers, storageFactory)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tc.KubeAPIs = kubeAPIs\\n\\n\\tapiExtensions, err := controlplaneapiserver.CreateAPIExtensionsConfig(*kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.VersionedInformers, pluginInitializer, opts.CompletedOptions, opts.MasterCount,\\n\\t\\tserviceResolver, webhook.NewDefaultAuthenticationInfoResolverWrapper(kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.ProxyTransport, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic.EgressSelector, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic.LoopbackClientConfig, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic.TracerProvider))\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tc.ApiExtensions = apiExtensions\\n\\n\\taggregator, err := controlplaneapiserver.CreateAggregatorConfig(*kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Generic, opts.CompletedOptions, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.VersionedInformers, serviceResolver, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.ProxyTransport, kubeAPIs.ControlPlane.Extra.PeerProxy, pluginInitializer)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\tc.Aggregator = aggregator\\n\\n\\treturn c, nil\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"94f8cc62-d9da-4f51-a797-8ebbfff53a80\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:49.319Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"b769cb4a-7343-4071-a4cd-53b046430672\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"94f8cc62-d9da-4f51-a797-8ebbfff53a80\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01JZFLE19LX2FKWU678XEiTK\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Excellent! License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage server\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"errors\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\tgpath \\\"path\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\tsystemd \\\"github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22/daemon\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"golang.org/x/time/rate\\\"\\n\\tapidiscoveryv2 \\\"k8s.io/api/apidiscovery/v2\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer/cbor\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/managedfields\\\"\\n\\tutilruntime \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait\\\"\\n\\tutilwaitgroup \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/waitgroup\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/authorization/authorizer\\\"\\n\\tgenericapi \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery\\\"\\n\\tdiscoveryendpoint \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery/aggregated\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/rest\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/healthz\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/routes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/statusz\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storageversion\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\trestclient \\\"k8s.io/client-go/rest\\\"\\n\\tbasecompatibility \\\"k8s.io/component-base/compatibility\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/featuregate\\\"\\n\\tzpagesfeatures \\\"k8s.io/component-base/zpages/features\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n\\topenapibuilder3 \\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/builder3\\\"\\n\\topenapicommon \\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/common\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/handler\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/handler3\\\"\\n\\topenapiutil \\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/util\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/validation/spec\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// Info about an API group.\\ntype APIGroupInfo struct {\\n\\tPrioritizedVersions []schema.GroupVersion\\n\\t// Info about the resources in this group. It's a map from version to resource to the storage.\\n\\tVersionedResourcesStorageMap map[string]map[string]rest.Storage\\n\\t// OptionsExternalVersion controls the APIVersion used for common objects in the\\n\\t// schema like api.Status, api.DeleteOptions, and metav1.ListOptions. Other implementors may\\n\\t// define a version \\\"v1beta1\\\" but want to use the Kubernetes \\\"v1\\\" internal objects.\\n\\t// If nil, defaults to groupMeta.GroupVersion.\\n\\t// TODO: Remove this when https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/19018 is fixed.\\n\\tOptionsExternalVersion *schema.GroupVersion\\n\\t// MetaGroupVersion defaults to \\\"meta.k8s.io/v1\\\" and is the scheme group version used to decode\\n\\t// common API implementations like ListOptions. Future changes will allow this to vary by group\\n\\t// version (for when the inevitable meta/v2 group emerges).\\n\\tMetaGroupVersion *schema.GroupVersion\\n\\n\\t// Scheme includes all of the types used by this group and how to convert between them (or\\n\\t// to convert objects from outside of this group that are accepted in this API).\\n\\t// TODO: replace with interfaces\\n\\tScheme *runtime.Scheme\\n\\t// NegotiatedSerializer controls how this group encodes and decodes data\\n\\tNegotiatedSerializer runtime.NegotiatedSerializer\\n\\t// ParameterCodec performs conversions for query parameters passed to API calls\\n\\tParameterCodec runtime.ParameterCodec\\n\\n\\t// StaticOpenAPISpec is the spec derived from the definitions of all resources installed together.\\n\\t// It is set during InstallAPIGroups, InstallAPIGroup, and InstallLegacyAPIGroup.\\n\\tStaticOpenAPISpec map[string]*spec.Schema\\n}\\n\\nfunc (a *APIGroupInfo) destroyStorage() {\\n\\tfor _, stores := range a.VersionedResourcesStorageMap {\\n\\t\\tfor _, store := range stores {\\n\\t\\t\\tstore.Destroy()\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// GenericAPIServer contains state for a Kubernetes cluster api server.\\ntype GenericAPIServer struct {\\n\\t// discoveryAddresses is used to build cluster IPs for discovery.\\n\\tdiscoveryAddresses discovery.Addresses\\n\\n\\t// LoopbackClientConfig is a config for a privileged loopback connection to the API server\\n\\tLoopbackClientConfig *restclient.Config\\n\\n\\t// minRequestTimeout is how short the request timeout can be.  This is used to build the RESTHandler\\n\\tminRequestTimeout time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownTimeout is the timeout used for server shutdown. This specifies the timeout before server\\n\\t// gracefully shutdown returns.\\n\\tShutdownTimeout time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// legacyAPIGroupPrefixes is used to set up URL parsing for authorization and for validating requests\\n\\t// to InstallLegacyAPIGroup\\n\\tlegacyAPIGroupPrefixes sets.String\\n\\n\\t// admissionControl is used to build the RESTStorage that backs an API Group.\\n\\tadmissionControl admission.Interface\\n\\n\\t// SecureServingInfo holds configuration of the TLS server.\\n\\tSecureServingInfo *SecureServingInfo\\n\\n\\t// ExternalAddress is the address (hostname or IP and port) that should be used in\\n\\t// external (public internet) URLs for this GenericAPIServer.\\n\\tExternalAddress string\\n\\n\\t// Serializer controls how common API objects not in a group/version prefix are serialized for this server.\\n\\t// Individual APIGroups may define their own serializers.\\n\\tSerializer runtime.NegotiatedSerializer\\n\\n\\t// \\\"Outputs\\\"\\n\\t// Handler holds the handlers being used by this API server\\n\\tHandler *APIServerHandler\\n\\n\\t// UnprotectedDebugSocket is used to serve pprof information in a unix-domain socket. This socket is\\n\\t// not protected by authentication/authorization.\\n\\tUnprotectedDebugSocket *routes.DebugSocket\\n\\n\\t// listedPathProvider is a lister which provides the set of paths to show at /\\n\\tlistedPathProvider routes.ListedPathProvider\\n\\n\\t// DiscoveryGroupManager serves /apis in an unaggregated form.\\n\\tDiscoveryGroupManager discovery.GroupManager\\n\\n\\t// AggregatedDiscoveryGroupManager serves /apis in an aggregated form.\\n\\tAggregatedDiscoveryGroupManager discoveryendpoint.ResourceManager\\n\\n\\t// PeerAggregatedDiscoveryManager serves /apis aggregated from all peer apiservers.\\n\\tPeerAggregatedDiscoveryManager discoveryendpoint.PeerAggregatedResourceManager\\n\\n\\t// AggregatedLegacyDiscoveryGroupManager serves /api in an aggregated form.\\n\\tAggregatedLegacyDiscoveryGroupManager discoveryendpoint.ResourceManager\\n\\n\\t// Enable swagger and/or OpenAPI if these configs are non-nil.\\n\\topenAPIConfig *openapicommon.Config\\n\\n\\t// Enable swagger and/or OpenAPI V3 if these configs are non-nil.\\n\\topenAPIV3Config *openapicommon.OpenAPIV3Config\\n\\n\\t// SkipOpenAPIInstallation indicates not to install the OpenAPI handler\\n\\t// during PrepareRun.\\n\\t// Set this to true when the specific API Server has its own OpenAPI handler\\n\\t// (e.g. kube-aggregator)\\n\\tskipOpenAPIInstallation bool\\n\\n\\t// OpenAPIVersionedService controls the /openapi/v2 endpoint, and can be used to update the served spec.\\n\\t// It is set during PrepareRun if `openAPIConfig` is non-nil unless `skipOpenAPIInstallation` is true.\\n\\tOpenAPIVersionedService *handler.OpenAPIService\\n\\n\\t// OpenAPIV3VersionedService controls the /openapi/v3 endpoint and can be used to update the served spec.\\n\\t// It is set during PrepareRun if `openAPIConfig` is non-nil unless `skipOpenAPIInstallation` is true.\\n\\tOpenAPIV3VersionedService *handler3.OpenAPIService\\n\\n\\t// StaticOpenAPISpec is the spec derived from the restful container endpoints.\\n\\t// It is set during PrepareRun.\\n\\tStaticOpenAPISpec *spec.Swagger\\n\\n\\t// PostStartHooks are each called after the server has started listening, in a separate go func for each\\n\\t// with no guarantee of ordering between them.  The map key is a name used for error reporting.\\n\\t// It may kill the process with a panic if it wishes to by returning an error.\\n\\tpostStartHookLock      sync.Mutex\\n\\tpostStartHooks         map[string]postStartHookEntry\\n\\tpostStartHooksCalled   bool\\n\\tdisabledPostStartHooks sets.String\\n\\n\\tpreShutdownHookLock    sync.Mutex\\n\\tpreShutdownHooks       map[string]preShutdownHookEntry\\n\\tpreShutdownHooksCalled bool\\n\\n\\t// healthz checks\\n\\thealthzRegistry healthCheckRegistry\\n\\treadyzRegistry  healthCheckRegistry\\n\\tlivezRegistry   healthCheckRegistry\\n\\n\\tlivezGracePeriod time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// auditing. The backend is started before the server starts listening.\\n\\tAuditBackend audit.Backend\\n\\n\\t// Authorizer determines whether a user is allowed to make a certain request. The Handler does a preliminary\\n\\t// authorization check using the request URI but it may be necessary to make additional checks, such as in\\n\\t// the create-on-update case\\n\\tAuthorizer authorizer.Authorizer\\n\\n\\t// EquivalentResourceRegistry provides information about resources equivalent to a given resource,\\n\\t// and the kind associated with a given resource. As resources are installed, they are registered here.\\n\\tEquivalentResourceRegistry runtime.EquivalentResourceRegistry\\n\\n\\t// delegationTarget is the next delegate in the chain. This is never nil.\\n\\tdelegationTarget DelegationTarget\\n\\n\\t// NonLongRunningRequestWaitGroup allows you to wait for all chain\\n\\t// handlers associated with non long-running requests\\n\\t// to complete while the server is shuting down.\\n\\tNonLongRunningRequestWaitGroup *utilwaitgroup.SafeWaitGroup\\n\\t// WatchRequestWaitGroup allows us to wait for all chain\\n\\t// handlers associated with active watch requests to\\n\\t// complete while the server is shuting down.\\n\\tWatchRequestWaitGroup *utilwaitgroup.RateLimitedSafeWaitGroup\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownDelayDuration allows to block shutdown for some time, e.g. until endpoints pointing to this API server\\n\\t// have converged on all node. During this time, the API server keeps serving, /healthz will return 200,\\n\\t// but /readyz will return failure.\\n\\tShutdownDelayDuration time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// The limit on the request body size that would be accepted and decoded in a write request.\\n\\t// 0 means no limit.\\n\\tmaxRequestBodyBytes int64\\n\\n\\t// APIServerID is the ID of this API server\\n\\tAPIServerID string\\n\\n\\t// StorageReadinessHook implements post-start-hook functionality for checking readiness\\n\\t// of underlying storage for registered resources.\\n\\tStorageReadinessHook *StorageReadinessHook\\n\\n\\t// StorageVersionManager holds the storage versions of the API resources installed by this server.\\n\\tStorageVersionManager storageversion.Manager\\n\\n\\t// EffectiveVersion determines which apis and features are available\\n\\t// based on when the api/feature lifecyle.\\n\\tEffectiveVersion basecompatibility.EffectiveVersion\\n\\t// EmulationForwardCompatible is an option to implicitly enable all APIs which are introduced after the emulation version and\\n\\t// have higher priority than APIs of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version.\\n\\t// If true, all APIs that have higher priority than the APIs(beta+) of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version will be installed.\\n\\t// This is needed when a controller implementation migrates to newer API versions, for the binary version, and also uses the newer API versions even when emulation version is set.\\n\\t// Not applicable to alpha APIs.\\n\\tEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n\\t// RuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible is an option to explicitly enable specific APIs introduced after the emulation version through the runtime-config.\\n\\t// If true, APIs identified by group/version that are enabled in the --runtime-config flag will be installed even if it is introduced after the emulation version. --runtime-config flag values that identify multiple APIs, such as api/all,api/ga,api/beta, are not influenced by this flag and will only enable APIs available at the current emulation version.\\n\\t// If false, error would be thrown if any GroupVersion or GroupVersionResource explicitly enabled in the --runtime-config flag is introduced after the emulation version.\\n\\tRuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n\\n\\t// FeatureGate is a way to plumb feature gate through if you have them.\\n\\tFeatureGate featuregate.FeatureGate\\n\\n\\t// lifecycleSignals provides access to the various signals that happen during the life cycle of the apiserver.\\n\\tlifecycleSignals lifecycleSignals\\n\\n\\t// destroyFns contains a list of functions that should be called on shutdown to clean up resources.\\n\\tdestroyFns []func()\\n\\n\\t// muxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignals holds signals that indicate all known HTTP paths have been registered.\\n\\t// it exists primarily to avoid returning a 404 response when a resource actually exists but we haven't installed the path to a handler.\\n\\t// it is exposed for easier composition of the individual servers.\\n\\t// the primary users of this field are the WithMuxCompleteProtection filter and the NotFoundHandler\\n\\tmuxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignals map[string]<-chan struct{}\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownSendRetryAfter dictates when to initiate shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server during the graceful termination of the apiserver. If true, we wait\\n\\t// for non longrunning requests in flight to be drained and then initiate a\\n\\t// shutdown of the HTTP Server. If false, we initiate a shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server as soon as ShutdownDelayDuration has elapsed.\\n\\t// If enabled, after ShutdownDelayDuration elapses, any incoming request is\\n\\t// rejected with a 429 status code and a 'Retry-After' response.\\n\\tShutdownSendRetryAfter bool\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod, if set to a positive value,\\n\\t// is the maximum duration the apiserver will wait for all active\\n\\t// watch request(s) to drain.\\n\\t// Once this grace period elapses, the apiserver will no longer\\n\\t// wait for any active watch request(s) in flight to drain, it will\\n\\t// proceed to the next step in the graceful server shutdown process.\\n\\t// If set to a positive value, the apiserver will keep track of the\\n\\t// number of active watch request(s) in flight and during shutdown\\n\\t// it will wait, at most, for the specified duration and allow these\\n\\t// active watch requests to drain with some rate limiting in effect.\\n\\t// The default is zero, which implies the apiserver will not keep\\n\\t// track of active watch request(s) in flight and will not wait\\n\\t// for them to drain, this maintains backward compatibility.\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"3019abab-fd68-4bfa-9dd0-f7c018e292f7\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:52.399Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"33dc71de-4b5a-4c92-9103-6f9d1c9a8902\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"3019abab-fd68-4bfa-9dd0-f7c018e292f7\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_015PeXCuPrwiZnZ5E8qRry3U\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01QaYQQVm8vSKVRj1jQCcLnx\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/genericapiserver.go | grep -A 30 \\\"type DelegationTarget\\\"\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":4,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":4242,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":50029,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":4242},\"output_tokens\":26,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2xx2xy9zigqXuDweSp\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"948da0a7-b137-4dd0-968e-6d1a0b732739\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:54.045Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"948da0a7-b137-4dd0-968e-6d1a0b732739\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01QaYQQVm8vSKVRj1jQCcLnx\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"type DelegationTarget interface {\\n\\t// UnprotectedHandler returns a handler that is NOT protected by a normal chain\\n\\tUnprotectedHandler() http.Handler\\n\\n\\t// PostStartHooks returns the post-start hooks that need to be combined\\n\\tPostStartHooks() map[string]postStartHookEntry\\n\\n\\t// PreShutdownHooks returns the pre-stop hooks that need to be combined\\n\\tPreShutdownHooks() map[string]preShutdownHookEntry\\n\\n\\t// HealthzChecks returns the healthz checks that need to be combined\\n\\tHealthzChecks() []healthz.HealthChecker\\n\\n\\t// ListedPaths returns the paths for supporting an index\\n\\tListedPaths() []string\\n\\n\\t// NextDelegate returns the next delegationTarget in the chain of delegations\\n\\tNextDelegate() DelegationTarget\\n\\n\\t// PrepareRun does post API installation setup steps. It calls recursively the same function of the delegates.\\n\\tPrepareRun() preparedGenericAPIServer\\n\\n\\t// MuxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignals exposes registered signals that indicate if all known HTTP paths have been installed.\\n\\tMuxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignals() map[string]<-chan struct{}\\n\\n\\t// Destroy cleans up its resources on shutdown.\\n\\t// Destroy has to be implemented in thread-safe way and be prepared\\n\\t// for being called more than once.\\n\\tDestroy()\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"681b5d51-5294-4b48-8572-93c799e7c483\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:54.061Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"948da0a7-b137-4dd0-968e-6d1a0b732739\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"681b5d51-5294-4b48-8572-93c799e7c483\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_015PeXCuPrwiZnZ5E8qRry3U\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01XnAnN9qypa4DehND5PCaHz\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/genericapiserver.go | grep -A 50 \\\"type preparedGenericAPIServer\\\"\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":4,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":4242,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":50029,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":4242},\"output_tokens\":26,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2xx2xy9zigqXuDweSp\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"288669e1-24eb-45d2-8871-e5801273d988\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:54.368Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"288669e1-24eb-45d2-8871-e5801273d988\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01XnAnN9qypa4DehND5PCaHz\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"type preparedGenericAPIServer struct {\\n\\t*GenericAPIServer\\n}\\n\\n// PrepareRun does post API installation setup steps. It calls recursively the same function of the delegates.\\nfunc (s *GenericAPIServer) PrepareRun() preparedGenericAPIServer {\\n\\ts.delegationTarget.PrepareRun()\\n\\n\\tif s.openAPIConfig != nil && !s.skipOpenAPIInstallation {\\n\\t\\ts.OpenAPIVersionedService, s.StaticOpenAPISpec = routes.OpenAPI{\\n\\t\\t\\tConfig: s.openAPIConfig,\\n\\t\\t}.InstallV2(s.Handler.GoRestfulContainer, s.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif s.openAPIV3Config != nil && !s.skipOpenAPIInstallation {\\n\\t\\ts.OpenAPIV3VersionedService = routes.OpenAPI{\\n\\t\\t\\tV3Config: s.openAPIV3Config,\\n\\t\\t}.InstallV3(s.Handler.GoRestfulContainer, s.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ts.installHealthz()\\n\\ts.installLivez()\\n\\n\\t// as soon as shutdown is initiated, readiness should start failing\\n\\treadinessStopCh := s.lifecycleSignals.ShutdownInitiated.Signaled()\\n\\terr := s.addReadyzShutdownCheck(readinessStopCh)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\tklog.Errorf(\\\"Failed to install readyz shutdown check %s\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\ts.installReadyz()\\n\\n\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(zpagesfeatures.ComponentStatusz) {\\n\\t\\tstatusz.Install(s.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux, \\\"apiserver\\\", statusz.NewRegistry(s.EffectiveVersion, statusz.WithListedPaths(s.ListedPaths())))\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn preparedGenericAPIServer{s}\\n}\\n\\n// Run spawns the secure http server. It only returns if stopCh is closed\\n// or the secure port cannot be listened on initially.\\n//\\n// Deprecated: use RunWithContext instead. Run will not get removed to avoid\\n// breaking consumers, but should not be used in new code.\\nfunc (s preparedGenericAPIServer) Run(stopCh <-chan struct{}) error {\\n\\tctx := wait.ContextForChannel(stopCh)\\n\\treturn s.RunWithContext(ctx)\\n}\\n\\n// RunWithContext spawns the secure http server. It only returns if ctx is canceled\\n// or the secure port cannot be listened on initially.\\n// This is the diagram of what contexts/channels/signals are dependent on each other:\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"58c01950-133f-45d0-8c9c-18a369ae623e\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:54.384Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"288669e1-24eb-45d2-8871-e5801273d988\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"58c01950-133f-45d0-8c9c-18a369ae623e\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0116pSbHyXUDQRoLBjaXfAxK\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage apiserver\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\tapierrors \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery/aggregated\\\"\\n\\tgenericfeatures \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/features\\\"\\n\\tpeerreconcilers \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/reconcilers\\\"\\n\\tgenericapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/dynamiccertificates\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/egressselector\\\"\\n\\tserverstorage \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/storage\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\tutilpeerproxy \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/peerproxy\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/transport\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/legacyregistry\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/tracing\\\"\\n\\tv1 \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apis/apiregistration/v1\\\"\\n\\tv1helper \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apis/apiregistration/v1/helper\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apis/apiregistration/v1beta1\\\"\\n\\taggregatorscheme \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/apiserver/scheme\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/client/clientset_generated/clientset\\\"\\n\\tinformers \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/client/informers/externalversions\\\"\\n\\tlisters \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/client/listers/apiregistration/v1\\\"\\n\\topenapicontroller \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/openapi\\\"\\n\\topenapiaggregator \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/openapi/aggregator\\\"\\n\\topenapiv3controller \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/openapiv3\\\"\\n\\topenapiv3aggregator \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/openapiv3/aggregator\\\"\\n\\tlocalavailability \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/status/local\\\"\\n\\tavailabilitymetrics \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/status/metrics\\\"\\n\\tremoteavailability \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/controllers/status/remote\\\"\\n\\tapiservicerest \\\"k8s.io/kube-aggregator/pkg/registry/apiservice/rest\\\"\\n\\topenapicommon \\\"k8s.io/kube-openapi/pkg/common\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// making sure we only register metrics once into legacy registry\\nvar registerIntoLegacyRegistryOnce sync.Once\\n\\nfunc init() {\\n\\t// we need to add the options (like ListOptions) to empty v1\\n\\tmetav1.AddToGroupVersion(aggregatorscheme.Scheme, schema.GroupVersion{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"})\\n\\n\\tunversioned := schema.GroupVersion{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}\\n\\taggregatorscheme.Scheme.AddUnversionedTypes(unversioned,\\n\\t\\t&metav1.Status{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIVersions{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIGroupList{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIGroup{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIResourceList{},\\n\\t)\\n}\\n\\nconst (\\n\\t// legacyAPIServiceName is the fixed name of the only non-groupified API version\\n\\tlegacyAPIServiceName = \\\"v1.\\\"\\n\\t// StorageVersionPostStartHookName is the name of the storage version updater post start hook.\\n\\tStorageVersionPostStartHookName = \\\"built-in-resources-storage-version-updater\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// ExtraConfig represents APIServices-specific configuration\\ntype ExtraConfig struct {\\n\\t// PeerAdvertiseAddress is the IP for this kube-apiserver which is used by peer apiservers to route a request\\n\\t// to this apiserver. This happens in cases where the peer is not able to serve the request due to\\n\\t// version skew. If unset, AdvertiseAddress/BindAddress will be used.\\n\\tPeerAdvertiseAddress peerreconcilers.PeerAdvertiseAddress\\n\\n\\t// ProxyClientCert/Key are the client cert used to identify this proxy. Backing APIServices use\\n\\t// this to confirm the proxy's identity\\n\\tProxyClientCertFile string\\n\\tProxyClientKeyFile  string\\n\\n\\t// If present, the Dial method will be used for dialing out to delegate\\n\\t// apiservers.\\n\\tProxyTransport *http.Transport\\n\\n\\t// Mechanism by which the Aggregator will resolve services. Required.\\n\\tServiceResolver ServiceResolver\\n\\n\\tRejectForwardingRedirects bool\\n\\n\\t// DisableRemoteAvailableConditionController disables the controller that updates the Available conditions for\\n\\t// remote APIServices via querying endpoints of the referenced services. In generic controlplane use-cases,\\n\\t// the concept of services and endpoints might differ, and might require another implementation of this\\n\\t// controller. Local APIService are reconciled nevertheless.\\n\\tDisableRemoteAvailableConditionController bool\\n\\n\\t// PeerProxy, if not nil, sets proxy transport between kube-apiserver peers for requests\\n\\t// that can not be served locally\\n\\tPeerProxy utilpeerproxy.Interface\\n}\\n\\n// Config represents the configuration needed to create an APIAggregator.\\ntype Config struct {\\n\\tGenericConfig *genericapiserver.RecommendedConfig\\n\\tExtraConfig   ExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype completedConfig struct {\\n\\tGenericConfig genericapiserver.CompletedConfig\\n\\tExtraConfig   *ExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\n// CompletedConfig same as Config, just to swap private object.\\ntype CompletedConfig struct {\\n\\t// Embed a private pointer that cannot be instantiated outside of this package.\\n\\t*completedConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype runnable interface {\\n\\tRunWithContext(ctx context.Context) error\\n}\\n\\n// preparedGenericAPIServer is a private wrapper that enforces a call of PrepareRun() before Run can be invoked.\\ntype preparedAPIAggregator struct {\\n\\t*APIAggregator\\n\\trunnable runnable\\n}\\n\\n// APIAggregator contains state for a Kubernetes cluster master/api server.\\ntype APIAggregator struct {\\n\\tGenericAPIServer *genericapiserver.GenericAPIServer\\n\\n\\t// provided for easier embedding\\n\\tAPIRegistrationInformers informers.SharedInformerFactory\\n\\n\\tdelegateHandler http.Handler\\n\\n\\t// proxyCurrentCertKeyContent holds he client cert used to identify this proxy. Backing APIServices use this to confirm the proxy's identity\\n\\tproxyCurrentCertKeyContent certKeyFunc\\n\\tproxyTransportDial         *transport.DialHolder\\n\\n\\t// proxyHandlers are the proxy handlers that are currently registered, keyed by apiservice.name\\n\\tproxyHandlers map[string]*proxyHandler\\n\\t// handledGroupVersions contain the groups that already have routes. The key is the name of the group and the value\\n\\t// is the versions for the group.\\n\\thandledGroupVersions map[string]sets.Set[string]\\n\\n\\t// lister is used to add group handling for /apis/<group> aggregator lookups based on\\n\\t// controller state\\n\\tlister listers.APIServiceLister\\n\\n\\t// Information needed to determine routing for the aggregator\\n\\tserviceResolver ServiceResolver\\n\\n\\t// Enable swagger and/or OpenAPI if these configs are non-nil.\\n\\topenAPIConfig *openapicommon.Config\\n\\n\\t// Enable OpenAPI V3 if these configs are non-nil\\n\\topenAPIV3Config *openapicommon.OpenAPIV3Config\\n\\n\\t// openAPIAggregationController downloads and merges OpenAPI v2 specs.\\n\\topenAPIAggregationController *openapicontroller.AggregationController\\n\\n\\t// openAPIV3AggregationController downloads and caches OpenAPI v3 specs.\\n\\topenAPIV3AggregationController *openapiv3controller.AggregationController\\n\\n\\t// discoveryAggregationController downloads and caches discovery documents\\n\\t// from all aggregated apiservices so they are available from /apis endpoint\\n\\t// when discovery with resources are requested\\n\\tdiscoveryAggregationController DiscoveryAggregationController\\n\\n\\t// rejectForwardingRedirects is whether to allow to forward redirect response\\n\\trejectForwardingRedirects bool\\n\\n\\t// tracerProvider is used to wrap the proxy transport and handler with tracing\\n\\ttracerProvider tracing.TracerProvider\\n}\\n\\n// Complete fills in any fields not set that are required to have valid data. It's mutating the receiver.\\nfunc (cfg *Config) Complete() CompletedConfig {\\n\\tc := completedConfig{\\n\\t\\tcfg.GenericConfig.Complete(),\\n\\t\\t&cfg.ExtraConfig,\\n\\t}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"014ee058-710e-4c77-822f-7351a227d8e8\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:55.751Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"0a8c3ede-62ca-40f4-85d9-4e7215b0fa19\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"014ee058-710e-4c77-822f-7351a227d8e8\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0116pSbHyXUDQRoLBjaXfAxK\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01RSBwqhLhtqGmgGYY3UkzWY\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage apiserver\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/install\\\"\\n\\tv1 \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1beta1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/client/clientset/clientset\\\"\\n\\texternalinformers \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/client/informers/externalversions\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/apiapproval\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/establish\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/finalizer\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/nonstructuralschema\\\"\\n\\topenapicontroller \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi\\\"\\n\\topenapiv3controller \\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/status\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/registry/customresourcedefinition\\\"\\n\\tmetav1 \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/discovery/aggregated\\\"\\n\\tgenericregistry \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/generic\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/registry/rest\\\"\\n\\tgenericapiserver \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\tserverstorage \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/storage\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/webhook\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\nvar (\\n\\tScheme = runtime.NewScheme()\\n\\tCodecs = serializer.NewCodecFactory(Scheme)\\n\\n\\t// if you modify this, make sure you update the crEncoder\\n\\tunversionedVersion = schema.GroupVersion{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"}\\n\\tunversionedTypes   = []runtime.Object{\\n\\t\\t&metav1.Status{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.WatchEvent{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIVersions{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIGroupList{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIGroup{},\\n\\t\\t&metav1.APIResourceList{},\\n\\t}\\n)\\n\\nfunc init() {\\n\\tinstall.Install(Scheme)\\n\\n\\t// we need to add the options to empty v1\\n\\tmetav1.AddToGroupVersion(Scheme, schema.GroupVersion{Group: \\\"\\\", Version: \\\"v1\\\"})\\n\\n\\tScheme.AddUnversionedTypes(unversionedVersion, unversionedTypes...)\\n}\\n\\ntype ExtraConfig struct {\\n\\tCRDRESTOptionsGetter genericregistry.RESTOptionsGetter\\n\\n\\t// MasterCount is used to detect whether cluster is HA, and if it is\\n\\t// the CRD Establishing will be hold by 5 seconds.\\n\\tMasterCount int\\n\\n\\t// ServiceResolver is used in CR webhook converters to resolve webhook's service names\\n\\tServiceResolver webhook.ServiceResolver\\n\\t// AuthResolverWrapper is used in CR webhook converters\\n\\tAuthResolverWrapper webhook.AuthenticationInfoResolverWrapper\\n}\\n\\ntype Config struct {\\n\\tGenericConfig *genericapiserver.RecommendedConfig\\n\\tExtraConfig   ExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype completedConfig struct {\\n\\tGenericConfig genericapiserver.CompletedConfig\\n\\tExtraConfig   *ExtraConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype CompletedConfig struct {\\n\\t// Embed a private pointer that cannot be instantiated outside of this package.\\n\\t*completedConfig\\n}\\n\\ntype CustomResourceDefinitions struct {\\n\\tGenericAPIServer *genericapiserver.GenericAPIServer\\n\\n\\t// provided for easier embedding\\n\\tInformers externalinformers.SharedInformerFactory\\n}\\n\\n// Complete fills in any fields not set that are required to have valid data. It's mutating the receiver.\\nfunc (cfg *Config) Complete() CompletedConfig {\\n\\tc := completedConfig{\\n\\t\\tcfg.GenericConfig.Complete(),\\n\\t\\t&cfg.ExtraConfig,\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tc.GenericConfig.EnableDiscovery = false\\n\\n\\treturn CompletedConfig{&c}\\n}\\n\\n// New returns a new instance of CustomResourceDefinitions from the given config.\\nfunc (c completedConfig) New(delegationTarget genericapiserver.DelegationTarget) (*CustomResourceDefinitions, error) {\\n\\tgenericServer, err := c.GenericConfig.New(\\\"apiextensions-apiserver\\\", delegationTarget)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// hasCRDInformerSyncedSignal is closed when the CRD informer this server uses has been fully synchronized.\\n\\t// It ensures that requests to potential custom resource endpoints while the server hasn't installed all known HTTP paths get a 503 error instead of a 404\\n\\thasCRDInformerSyncedSignal := make(chan struct{})\\n\\tif err := genericServer.RegisterMuxAndDiscoveryCompleteSignal(\\\"CRDInformerHasNotSynced\\\", hasCRDInformerSyncedSignal); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\ts := &CustomResourceDefinitions{\\n\\t\\tGenericAPIServer: genericServer,\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tapiResourceConfig := c.GenericConfig.MergedResourceConfig\\n\\tapiGroupInfo := genericapiserver.NewDefaultAPIGroupInfo(apiextensions.GroupName, Scheme, metav1.ParameterCodec, Codecs)\\n\\tstorage := map[string]rest.Storage{}\\n\\t// customresourcedefinitions\\n\\tif resource := \\\"customresourcedefinitions\\\"; apiResourceConfig.ResourceEnabled(v1.SchemeGroupVersion.WithResource(resource)) {\\n\\t\\tcustomResourceDefinitionStorage, err := customresourcedefinition.NewREST(Scheme, c.GenericConfig.RESTOptionsGetter)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tstorage[resource] = customResourceDefinitionStorage\\n\\t\\tstorage[resource+\\\"/status\\\"] = customresourcedefinition.NewStatusREST(Scheme, customResourceDefinitionStorage)\\n\\t}\\n\\tif len(storage) > 0 {\\n\\t\\tapiGroupInfo.VersionedResourcesStorageMap[v1.SchemeGroupVersion.Version] = storage\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif err := s.GenericAPIServer.InstallAPIGroup(&apiGroupInfo); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tcrdClient, err := clientset.NewForConfig(s.GenericAPIServer.LoopbackClientConfig)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t// it's really bad that this is leaking here, but until we can fix the test (which I'm pretty sure isn't even testing what it wants to test),\\n\\t\\t// we need to be able to move forward\\n\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to create clientset: %v\\\", err)\\n\\t}\\n\\ts.Informers = externalinformers.NewSharedInformerFactory(crdClient, 5*time.Minute)\\n\\n\\tdelegateHandler := delegationTarget.UnprotectedHandler()\\n\\tif delegateHandler == nil {\\n\\t\\tdelegateHandler = http.NotFoundHandler()\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tversionDiscoveryHandler := &versionDiscoveryHandler{\\n\\t\\tdiscovery: map[schema.GroupVersion]*discovery.APIVersionHandler{},\\n\\t\\tdelegate:  delegateHandler,\\n\\t}\\n\\tgroupDiscoveryHandler := &groupDiscoveryHandler{\\n\\t\\tdiscovery: map[string]*discovery.APIGroupHandler{},\\n\\t\\tdelegate:  delegateHandler,\\n\\t}\\n\\testablishingController := establish.NewEstablishingController(s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), crdClient.ApiextensionsV1())\\n\\tcrdHandler, err := NewCustomResourceDefinitionHandler(\\n\\t\\tversionDiscoveryHandler,\\n\\t\\tgroupDiscoveryHandler,\\n\\t\\ts.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(),\\n\\t\\tdelegateHandler,\\n\\t\\tc.ExtraConfig.CRDRESTOptionsGetter,\\n\\t\\tc.GenericConfig.AdmissionControl,\\n\\t\\testablishingController,\\n\\t\\tc.ExtraConfig.ServiceResolver,\\n\\t\\tc.ExtraConfig.AuthResolverWrapper,\\n\\t\\tc.ExtraConfig.MasterCount,\\n\\t\\ts.GenericAPIServer.Authorizer,\\n\\t\\tc.GenericConfig.RequestTimeout,\\n\\t\\ttime.Duration(c.GenericConfig.MinRequestTimeout)*time.Second,\\n\\t\\tapiGroupInfo.StaticOpenAPISpec,\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"b93606cd-2e77-4367-9a95-befda7e0dbb5\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:55.997Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"2d580809-2833-4276-9a4a-5dadc4e2f2ea\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"b93606cd-2e77-4367-9a95-befda7e0dbb5\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01GBdPnTPtbxLDWHxJH5roKM\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now -150\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":5,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":5197,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":55493,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":5197},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2yDQgjrL4dgzzXiB1Q\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"48d75728-4e96-4e65-867c-b8c7408c0a84\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:57.991Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"48d75728-4e96-4e65-867c-b8c7408c0a84\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01HY7QQxDmht473jxpHK9P5P\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2014 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage healthz\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"bytes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net/http\\\"\\n\\t\\\"reflect\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync\\\"\\n\\t\\\"sync/atomic\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/metrics\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/httplog\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/prometheus/slis\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst DefaultHealthzPath = \\\"/healthz\\\"\\n\\n// HealthChecker is a named healthz checker.\\ntype HealthChecker interface {\\n\\tName() string\\n\\tCheck(req *http.Request) error\\n}\\n\\ntype GroupedHealthChecker interface {\\n\\tHealthChecker\\n\\tGroupName() string\\n}\\n\\n// PingHealthz returns true automatically when checked\\nvar PingHealthz HealthChecker = ping{}\\n\\n// ping implements the simplest possible healthz checker.\\ntype ping struct{}\\n\\nfunc (ping) Name() string {\\n\\treturn \\\"ping\\\"\\n}\\n\\n// PingHealthz is a health check that returns true.\\nfunc (ping) Check(_ *http.Request) error {\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// LogHealthz returns true if logging is not blocked\\nvar LogHealthz HealthChecker = &log{}\\n\\ntype log struct {\\n\\tstartOnce    sync.Once\\n\\tlastVerified atomic.Value\\n}\\n\\nfunc (l *log) Name() string {\\n\\treturn \\\"log\\\"\\n}\\n\\nfunc (l *log) Check(_ *http.Request) error {\\n\\tl.startOnce.Do(func() {\\n\\t\\tl.lastVerified.Store(time.Now())\\n\\t\\tgo wait.Forever(func() {\\n\\t\\t\\tklog.Flush()\\n\\t\\t\\tl.lastVerified.Store(time.Now())\\n\\t\\t}, time.Minute)\\n\\t})\\n\\n\\tlastVerified := l.lastVerified.Load().(time.Time)\\n\\tif time.Since(lastVerified) < (2 * time.Minute) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"logging blocked\\\")\\n}\\n\\ntype cacheSyncWaiter interface {\\n\\tWaitForCacheSync(stopCh <-chan struct{}) map[reflect.Type]bool\\n}\\n\\ntype informerSync struct {\\n\\tcacheSyncWaiter cacheSyncWaiter\\n}\\n\\nvar _ HealthChecker = &informerSync{}\\n\\n// NewInformerSyncHealthz returns a new HealthChecker that will pass only if all informers in the given cacheSyncWaiter sync.\\nfunc NewInformerSyncHealthz(cacheSyncWaiter cacheSyncWaiter) HealthChecker {\\n\\treturn &informerSync{\\n\\t\\tcacheSyncWaiter: cacheSyncWaiter,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\nfunc (i *informerSync) Name() string {\\n\\treturn \\\"informer-sync\\\"\\n}\\n\\ntype shutdown struct {\\n\\tstopCh <-chan struct{}\\n}\\n\\n// NewShutdownHealthz returns a new HealthChecker that will fail if the embedded channel is closed.\\n// This is intended to allow for graceful shutdown sequences.\\nfunc NewShutdownHealthz(stopCh <-chan struct{}) HealthChecker {\\n\\treturn &shutdown{stopCh}\\n}\\n\\nfunc (s *shutdown) Name() string {\\n\\treturn \\\"shutdown\\\"\\n}\\n\\nfunc (s *shutdown) Check(req *http.Request) error {\\n\\tselect {\\n\\tcase <-s.stopCh:\\n\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"process is shutting down\\\")\\n\\tdefault:\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\nfunc (i *informerSync) Check(_ *http.Request) error {\\n\\tstopCh := make(chan struct{})\\n\\t// Close stopCh to force checking if informers are synced now.\\n\\tclose(stopCh)\\n\\n\\tinformersByStarted := make(map[bool][]string)\\n\\tfor informerType, started := range i.cacheSyncWaiter.WaitForCacheSync(stopCh) {\\n\\t\\tinformersByStarted[started] = append(informersByStarted[started], informerType.String())\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif notStarted := informersByStarted[false]; len(notStarted) > 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"%d informers not started yet: %v\\\", len(notStarted), notStarted)\\n\\t}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"7c3ef828-1f1c-4241-9b75-dcbaaeacf281\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:48:58.006Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"48d75728-4e96-4e65-867c-b8c7408c0a84\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"7c3ef828-1f1c-4241-9b75-dcbaaeacf281\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01GBdPnTPtbxLDWHxJH5roKM\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_015nTbpNKxVAmHRPudVXxB1k\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"ls structure:\"}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":5,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1598,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":60690,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1598},\"output_tokens\":2,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2yPQhS9PiZHLHcFfF9\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"1dc99bdc-0f31-4862-8184-eb59303c7db2\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:00.040Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"1dc99bdc-0f31-4862-8184-eb59303c7db2\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0166qEKAxzSDJTpYEPAfp27g\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01Nj4L6vKtgnHXm2WWjTHRhM\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git show HEAD:staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/server_run_options.go | head -200\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":5,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1598,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":60690,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1598},\"output_tokens\":2,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2yPQhS9PiZHLHcFfF9\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"afc5b564-a8c6-41c3-8514-086531d8011f\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:00.470Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"afc5b564-a8c6-41c3-8514-086531d8011f\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01Nj4L6vKtgnHXm2WWjTHRhM\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2016 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage options\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"net\\\"\\n\\t\\\"regexp\\\"\\n\\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/serializer\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/errors\\\"\\n\\tutilruntime \\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/compatibility\\\"\\n\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\tbasecompatibility \\\"k8s.io/component-base/compatibility\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"github.com/spf13/pflag\\\"\\n)\\n\\nconst (\\n\\tcorsAllowedOriginsHelpText = \\\"List of allowed origins for CORS, comma separated. \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"An allowed origin can be a regular expression to support subdomain matching. \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"If this list is empty CORS will not be enabled. \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"Please ensure each expression matches the entire hostname by anchoring \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"to the start with '^' or including the '//' prefix, and by anchoring to the \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"end with '$' or including the ':' port separator suffix. \\\" +\\n\\t\\t\\\"Examples of valid expressions are '//example\\\\\\\\.com(:|$)' and '^https://example\\\\\\\\.com(:|$)'\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// ServerRunOptions contains the options while running a generic api server.\\ntype ServerRunOptions struct {\\n\\tAdvertiseAddress net.IP\\n\\n\\tCorsAllowedOriginList        []string\\n\\tHSTSDirectives               []string\\n\\tExternalHost                 string\\n\\tMaxRequestsInFlight          int\\n\\tMaxMutatingRequestsInFlight  int\\n\\tRequestTimeout               time.Duration\\n\\tGoawayChance                 float64\\n\\tLivezGracePeriod             time.Duration\\n\\tMinRequestTimeout            int\\n\\tStorageInitializationTimeout time.Duration\\n\\tShutdownDelayDuration        time.Duration\\n\\t// We intentionally did not add a flag for this option. Users of the\\n\\t// apiserver library can wire it to a flag.\\n\\tJSONPatchMaxCopyBytes int64\\n\\t// The limit on the request body size that would be accepted and\\n\\t// decoded in a write request. 0 means no limit.\\n\\t// We intentionally did not add a flag for this option. Users of the\\n\\t// apiserver library can wire it to a flag.\\n\\tMaxRequestBodyBytes int64\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownSendRetryAfter dictates when to initiate shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server during the graceful termination of the apiserver. If true, we wait\\n\\t// for non longrunning requests in flight to be drained and then initiate a\\n\\t// shutdown of the HTTP Server. If false, we initiate a shutdown of the HTTP\\n\\t// Server as soon as ShutdownDelayDuration has elapsed.\\n\\t// If enabled, after ShutdownDelayDuration elapses, any incoming request is\\n\\t// rejected with a 429 status code and a 'Retry-After' response.\\n\\tShutdownSendRetryAfter bool\\n\\n\\t// ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod, if set to a positive value,\\n\\t// is the maximum duration the apiserver will wait for all active\\n\\t// watch request(s) to drain.\\n\\t// Once this grace period elapses, the apiserver will no longer\\n\\t// wait for any active watch request(s) in flight to drain, it will\\n\\t// proceed to the next step in the graceful server shutdown process.\\n\\t// If set to a positive value, the apiserver will keep track of the\\n\\t// number of active watch request(s) in flight and during shutdown\\n\\t// it will wait, at most, for the specified duration and allow these\\n\\t// active watch requests to drain with some rate limiting in effect.\\n\\t// The default is zero, which implies the apiserver will not keep\\n\\t// track of active watch request(s) in flight and will not wait\\n\\t// for them to drain, this maintains backward compatibility.\\n\\t// This grace period is orthogonal to other grace periods, and\\n\\t// it is not overridden by any other grace period.\\n\\tShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod time.Duration\\n\\n\\t// ComponentGlobalsRegistry is the registry where the effective versions and feature gates for all components are stored.\\n\\tComponentGlobalsRegistry basecompatibility.ComponentGlobalsRegistry\\n\\t// ComponentName is name under which the server's global variabled are registered in the ComponentGlobalsRegistry.\\n\\tComponentName string\\n\\t// EmulationForwardCompatible is an option to implicitly enable all APIs which are introduced after the emulation version and\\n\\t// have higher priority than APIs of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version.\\n\\t// If true, all APIs that have higher priority than the APIs(beta+) of the same group resource enabled at the emulation version will be installed.\\n\\t// This is needed when a controller implementation migrates to newer API versions, for the binary version, and also uses the newer API versions even when emulation version is set.\\n\\t// Not applicable to alpha APIs.\\n\\tEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n\\t// RuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible is an option to explicitly enable specific APIs introduced after the emulation version through the runtime-config.\\n\\t// If true, APIs identified by group/version that are enabled in the --runtime-config flag will be installed even if it is introduced after the emulation version. --runtime-config flag values that identify multiple APIs, such as api/all,api/ga,api/beta, are not influenced by this flag and will only enable APIs available at the current emulation version.\\n\\t// If false, error would be thrown if any GroupVersion or GroupVersionResource explicitly enabled in the --runtime-config flag is introduced after the emulation version.\\n\\tRuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible bool\\n}\\n\\nfunc NewServerRunOptions() *ServerRunOptions {\\n\\tif compatibility.DefaultComponentGlobalsRegistry.EffectiveVersionFor(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent) == nil {\\n\\t\\tfeatureGate := utilfeature.DefaultMutableFeatureGate\\n\\t\\teffectiveVersion := compatibility.DefaultBuildEffectiveVersion()\\n\\t\\tutilruntime.Must(compatibility.DefaultComponentGlobalsRegistry.Register(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent, effectiveVersion, featureGate))\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn NewServerRunOptionsForComponent(basecompatibility.DefaultKubeComponent, compatibility.DefaultComponentGlobalsRegistry)\\n}\\n\\nfunc NewServerRunOptionsForComponent(componentName string, componentGlobalsRegistry basecompatibility.ComponentGlobalsRegistry) *ServerRunOptions {\\n\\tdefaults := server.NewConfig(serializer.CodecFactory{})\\n\\treturn &ServerRunOptions{\\n\\t\\tMaxRequestsInFlight:                 defaults.MaxRequestsInFlight,\\n\\t\\tMaxMutatingRequestsInFlight:         defaults.MaxMutatingRequestsInFlight,\\n\\t\\tRequestTimeout:                      defaults.RequestTimeout,\\n\\t\\tLivezGracePeriod:                    defaults.LivezGracePeriod,\\n\\t\\tMinRequestTimeout:                   defaults.MinRequestTimeout,\\n\\t\\tStorageInitializationTimeout:        defaults.StorageInitializationTimeout,\\n\\t\\tShutdownDelayDuration:               defaults.ShutdownDelayDuration,\\n\\t\\tShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod: defaults.ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod,\\n\\t\\tJSONPatchMaxCopyBytes:               defaults.JSONPatchMaxCopyBytes,\\n\\t\\tMaxRequestBodyBytes:                 defaults.MaxRequestBodyBytes,\\n\\t\\tShutdownSendRetryAfter:              false,\\n\\t\\tComponentName:                       componentName,\\n\\t\\tComponentGlobalsRegistry:            componentGlobalsRegistry,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// ApplyTo applies the run options to the method receiver and returns self\\nfunc (s *ServerRunOptions) ApplyTo(c *server.Config) error {\\n\\tif err := s.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.SetFallback(); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tc.CorsAllowedOriginList = s.CorsAllowedOriginList\\n\\tc.HSTSDirectives = s.HSTSDirectives\\n\\tc.ExternalAddress = s.ExternalHost\\n\\tc.MaxRequestsInFlight = s.MaxRequestsInFlight\\n\\tc.MaxMutatingRequestsInFlight = s.MaxMutatingRequestsInFlight\\n\\tc.LivezGracePeriod = s.LivezGracePeriod\\n\\tc.RequestTimeout = s.RequestTimeout\\n\\tc.GoawayChance = s.GoawayChance\\n\\tc.MinRequestTimeout = s.MinRequestTimeout\\n\\tc.StorageInitializationTimeout = s.StorageInitializationTimeout\\n\\tc.ShutdownDelayDuration = s.ShutdownDelayDuration\\n\\tc.JSONPatchMaxCopyBytes = s.JSONPatchMaxCopyBytes\\n\\tc.MaxRequestBodyBytes = s.MaxRequestBodyBytes\\n\\tc.PublicAddress = s.AdvertiseAddress\\n\\tc.ShutdownSendRetryAfter = s.ShutdownSendRetryAfter\\n\\tc.ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod = s.ShutdownWatchTerminationGracePeriod\\n\\tc.EffectiveVersion = s.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.EffectiveVersionFor(s.ComponentName)\\n\\tc.FeatureGate = s.ComponentGlobalsRegistry.FeatureGateFor(s.ComponentName)\\n\\tc.EmulationForwardCompatible = s.EmulationForwardCompatible\\n\\tc.RuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible = s.RuntimeConfigEmulationForwardCompatible\\n\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// DefaultAdvertiseAddress sets the field AdvertiseAddress if unset. The field will be set based on the SecureServingOptions.\\nfunc (s *ServerRunOptions) DefaultAdvertiseAddress(secure *SecureServingOptions) error {\\n\\tif secure == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif s.AdvertiseAddress == nil || s.AdvertiseAddress.IsUnspecified() {\\n\\t\\thostIP, err := secure.DefaultExternalAddress()\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"Unable to find suitable network address.error='%v'. \\\"+\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"Try to set the AdvertiseAddress directly or provide a valid BindAddress to fix this.\\\", err)\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\ts.AdvertiseAddress = hostIP\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\\n\\n// Validate checks validation of ServerRunOptions\\nfunc (s *ServerRunOptions) Validate() []error {\\n\\terrors := []error{}\\n\\n\\tif s.LivezGracePeriod < 0 {\\n\\t\\terrors = append(errors, fmt.Errorf(\\\"--livez-grace-period can not be a negative value\\\"))\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif s.MaxRequestsInFlight < 0 {\\n\\t\\terrors = append(errors, fmt.Errorf(\\\"--max-requests-inflight can not be negative value\\\"))\\n\\t}\\n\\tif s.MaxMutatingRequestsInFlight < 0 {\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"a0c79598-fa90-41e8-871e-cb3230efec9e\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:00.486Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"afc5b564-a8c6-41c3-8514-086531d8011f\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"a0c79598-fa90-41e8-871e-cb3230efec9e\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0166qEKAxzSDJTpYEPAfp27g\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_015mi7TGzvDPL2PXzrZkKr9D\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"git -150\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":5,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":1598,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":60690,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":1598},\"output_tokens\":2,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYG2yPQhS9PiZHLHcFfF9\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"98fd3e63-4441-4a4e-8c81-a9762fe1e7d2\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:00.719Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"98fd3e63-4441-4a4e-8c81-a9762fe1e7d2\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_015mi7TGzvDPL2PXzrZkKr9D\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"/*\\nCopyright 2016 The Kubernetes Authors.\\n\\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\\n\\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n\\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\nlimitations under the License.\\n*/\\n\\npackage options\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"github.com/spf13/pflag\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/storagebackend\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/dynamic\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes\\\"\\n\\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/featuregate\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// RecommendedOptions contains the recommended options for running an API server.\\n// If you add something to this list, it should be in a logical grouping.\\n// Each of them can be nil to leave the feature unconfigured on ApplyTo.\\ntype RecommendedOptions struct {\\n\\tEtcd           *EtcdOptions\\n\\tSecureServing  *SecureServingOptionsWithLoopback\\n\\tAuthentication *DelegatingAuthenticationOptions\\n\\tAuthorization  *DelegatingAuthorizationOptions\\n\\tAudit          *AuditOptions\\n\\tFeatures       *FeatureOptions\\n\\tCoreAPI        *CoreAPIOptions\\n\\n\\t// FeatureGate is a way to plumb feature gate through if you have them.\\n\\tFeatureGate featuregate.FeatureGate\\n\\t// ExtraAdmissionInitializers is called once after all ApplyTo from the options above, to pass the returned\\n\\t// admission plugin initializers to Admission.ApplyTo.\\n\\tExtraAdmissionInitializers func(c *server.RecommendedConfig) ([]admission.PluginInitializer, error)\\n\\tAdmission                  *AdmissionOptions\\n\\t// API Server Egress Selector is used to control outbound traffic from the API Server\\n\\tEgressSelector *EgressSelectorOptions\\n\\t// Traces contains options to control distributed request tracing.\\n\\tTraces *TracingOptions\\n}\\n\\nfunc NewRecommendedOptions(prefix string, codec runtime.Codec) *RecommendedOptions {\\n\\tsso := NewSecureServingOptions()\\n\\n\\t// We are composing recommended options for an aggregated api-server,\\n\\t// whose client is typically a proxy multiplexing many operations ---\\n\\t// notably including long-running ones --- into one HTTP/2 connection\\n\\t// into this server.  So allow many concurrent operations.\\n\\tsso.HTTP2MaxStreamsPerConnection = 1000\\n\\n\\treturn &RecommendedOptions{\\n\\t\\tEtcd:           NewEtcdOptions(storagebackend.NewDefaultConfig(prefix, codec)),\\n\\t\\tSecureServing:  sso.WithLoopback(),\\n\\t\\tAuthentication: NewDelegatingAuthenticationOptions(),\\n\\t\\tAuthorization:  NewDelegatingAuthorizationOptions(),\\n\\t\\tAudit:          NewAuditOptions(),\\n\\t\\tFeatures:       NewFeatureOptions(),\\n\\t\\tCoreAPI:        NewCoreAPIOptions(),\\n\\t\\t// Wired a global by default that sadly people will abuse to have different meanings in different repos.\\n\\t\\t// Please consider creating your own FeatureGate so you can have a consistent meaning for what a variable contains\\n\\t\\t// across different repos.  Future you will thank you.\\n\\t\\tFeatureGate:                feature.DefaultFeatureGate,\\n\\t\\tExtraAdmissionInitializers: func(c *server.RecommendedConfig) ([]admission.PluginInitializer, error) { return nil, nil },\\n\\t\\tAdmission:                  NewAdmissionOptions(),\\n\\t\\tEgressSelector:             NewEgressSelectorOptions(),\\n\\t\\tTraces:                     NewTracingOptions(),\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\nfunc (o *RecommendedOptions) AddFlags(fs *pflag.FlagSet) {\\n\\to.Etcd.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.SecureServing.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Authentication.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Authorization.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Audit.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Features.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.CoreAPI.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Admission.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.EgressSelector.AddFlags(fs)\\n\\to.Traces.AddFlags(fs)\\n}\\n\\n// ApplyTo adds RecommendedOptions to the server configuration.\\n// pluginInitializers can be empty, it is only need for additional initializers.\\nfunc (o *RecommendedOptions) ApplyTo(config *server.RecommendedConfig) error {\\n\\tif err := o.Etcd.ApplyTo(&config.Config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.EgressSelector.ApplyTo(&config.Config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Traces.ApplyTo(config.Config.EgressSelector, &config.Config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.SecureServing.ApplyTo(&config.Config.SecureServing, &config.Config.LoopbackClientConfig); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Authentication.ApplyTo(&config.Config.Authentication, config.SecureServing, config.OpenAPIConfig); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Authorization.ApplyTo(&config.Config.Authorization); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Audit.ApplyTo(&config.Config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.CoreAPI.ApplyTo(config); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tvar kubeClient kubernetes.Interface\\n\\tvar dynamicClient dynamic.Interface\\n\\tif config.ClientConfig != nil {\\n\\t\\tvar err error\\n\\t\\tkubeClient, err = kubernetes.NewForConfig(config.ClientConfig)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tdynamicClient, err = dynamic.NewForConfig(config.ClientConfig)\\n\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Features.ApplyTo(&config.Config, kubeClient, config.SharedInformerFactory); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tinitializers, err := o.ExtraAdmissionInitializers(config)\\n\\tif err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\tif err := o.Admission.ApplyTo(&config.Config, config.SharedInformerFactory, kubeClient, dynamicClient, o.FeatureGate,\\n\\t\\tconfig.EffectiveVersion,\\n\\t\\tinitializers...); err != nil {\\n\\t\\treturn err\\n\\t}\\n\\treturn nil\\n}\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"ffb1a0f2-7ec5-483d-a2d8-20457874ddca\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T18:49:00.734Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"98fd3e63-4441-4a4e-8c81-a9762fe1e7d2\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"ffb1a0f2-7ec5-483d-a2d8-20457874ddca\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"37785fb0-7836-44bb-b599-5d8e96c419d9\",\"version\":\"2.1.42\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a664ea0\",\"slug\":\"iterative-jingling-otter\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01FeD5N7oRysph8eMjpKdV4X\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now
